reviews.author: FN
reviews.text: Food used to be better. Now it's just overpriced. The portion is tiny. I ordered mie tok tok and didnt come with a side soup/broth. The otak otak is NOT Indonesian style. That was my bad. It's a Malaysian spot. I'd come back tho, if only to scratch the itch.
reviews.textTranslated: Dulu makanannya lebih enak. Sekarang harganya terlalu mahal. Porsinya kecil sekali. Saya pesan mie tok tok dan tidak ada kuah/kuahnya. Otak-otaknya BUKAN gaya Indonesia. Itu kesalahan saya. Ini tempat makan Malaysia. Tapi saya akan kembali lagi, kalaupun hanya untuk memuaskan keinginan makan di sana.

reviews.author: Tammy Teng
reviews.text: Truly so disappointed. The quality has gone down since the last time I’d gone in 2021 - the garnish cucumbers were soggy and old, the onde onde filling was a hard piece of unmelted palm sugar, the noodles tasted dry, and the tea was too bitter and steeped. Expensive for what it is, poor food quality, and in general everything tasted like it had sat out for 2-3 days. Not for us, and would not recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Sungguh sangat kecewa. Kualitasnya menurun sejak terakhir kali saya berkunjung pada tahun 2021 - acar mentimunnya lembek dan sudah layu, isian onde-onde-nya berupa potongan gula aren yang keras dan belum meleleh, mi-nya terasa kering, dan tehnya terlalu pahit dan terlalu pekat. Harganya mahal untuk kualitasnya, makanannya buruk, dan secara umum semuanya terasa seperti sudah didiamkan selama 2-3 hari. Tidak cocok untuk kami, dan tidak akan saya rekomendasikan.

reviews.author: Sharp Loh
reviews.text:
We were thrilled to discover this gem during our weekend trip to NYC! As Malaysians craving a taste of home, we were so happy to find authentic flavors. Even though we arrived a bit late—around 9:30 PM—they were more than happy to serve us, and the place was still bustling.
We tried Pan Mee, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, Oh Chien (Oyster Omelette), Muah Chee, and Kaya Butter Toast for dessert. Coming from a Malaysian perspective, everything deserves 5 stars! The food tastes fresh and natural—no MSG, no preservatives.
Char Kway Teow was exceptional. As someone from Penang, I can confidently say it was perfect—the prawns, pork fat, noodle texture, and spice level were spot on. Authentic Char Kway Teow is hard to find outside Penang, and they nailed it.
Pan Mee (5/5) was amazing too. The noodles were clearly handmade, just like the traditional style from home, and paired perfectly with anchovies, meat, and vegetables.
Nasi Lemak (5/5) looks simple but is full of flavor. With authentic anchovies, peanuts, coconut rice, and sambal, every component complemented the others beautifully—no need for fancy additions.
Muah Chee brought back childhood memories—sticky dough, ground peanuts, sugar, and sesame, just like the street food we grew up with. This is rarely seen around town, so it was a treat.
Kaya Butter Toast is iconic at home, and here it didn’t disappoint. The Kaya is made from scratch, with the aroma of pandan shining through in every bite. We even learned they got their pandan flew in from SEA and make everything in-house. We loved it so much we bought some Kaya and sambal to take home!
The owner is wonderful—down-to-earth, funny, and passionate about her cooking. Her warmth and humor make the experience even better. Ask her about her James Beard Awards—you’ll see why she deserves them!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami sangat senang menemukan permata ini selama perjalanan akhir pekan kami ke NYC! Sebagai orang Malaysia yang mendambakan cita rasa kampung halaman, kami sangat senang menemukan cita rasa otentik. Meskipun kami tiba agak terlambat—sekitar pukul 21.30—mereka dengan senang hati melayani kami, dan tempat itu masih ramai.
Kami mencoba Pan Mee, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, Oh Chien (Omelet Tiram), Muah Chee, dan Roti Panggang Mentega Kaya untuk hidangan penutup. Dari sudut pandang orang Malaysia, semuanya layak mendapat 5 bintang! Makanan terasa segar dan alami—tanpa MSG, tanpa pengawet.
Char Kway Teow sangat luar biasa. Sebagai seseorang dari Penang, saya dapat dengan yakin mengatakan bahwa itu sempurna—udang, lemak babi, tekstur mie, dan tingkat kepedasannya tepat. Char Kway Teow otentik sulit ditemukan di luar Penang, dan mereka berhasil membuatnya.
Pan Mee (5/5) juga luar biasa. Mienya jelas buatan tangan, persis seperti gaya tradisional dari rumah, dan dipadukan sempurna dengan ikan teri, daging, dan sayuran.
Nasi Lemak (5/5) terlihat sederhana tetapi kaya rasa. Dengan ikan teri asli, kacang tanah, nasi kelapa, dan sambal, setiap komponen saling melengkapi dengan indah—tidak perlu tambahan yang mewah.
Muah Chee membangkitkan kenangan masa kecil—adonan lengket, kacang tanah giling, gula, dan wijen, persis seperti makanan jalanan yang kita makan saat kecil. Ini jarang terlihat di sekitar kota, jadi ini merupakan suguhan yang istimewa.
Roti Panggang Mentega Kaya adalah ikon di rumah, dan di sini tidak mengecewakan. Kaya dibuat sendiri, dengan aroma pandan yang terasa di setiap gigitan. Kami bahkan mengetahui bahwa mereka mendatangkan pandan dari Asia Tenggara dan membuat semuanya sendiri. Kami sangat menyukainya sehingga kami membeli Kaya dan sambal untuk dibawa pulang!
Pemiliknya luar biasa—ramah, lucu, dan bersemangat tentang masakannya. Kehangatan dan humornya membuat pengalaman ini semakin menyenangkan. Tanyakan padanya tentang Penghargaan James Beard yang diraihnya—Anda akan mengerti mengapa dia pantas mendapatkannya!

reviews.author: Aloysius Chan
reviews.text:
Chaw Kway Teow is amazing, just missing the cockles to top it off. Curry puff was not bad, ondeh ondeh was bad (thick skin and just a chunk of palm sugar inside)

Very small place and long wait. Staffs do not try to get people who have finished their food to leave
reviews.textTranslated:
Chaw Kway Teow-nya luar biasa, hanya kurang kerang sebagai topping. Curry puff-nya lumayan, ondeh-ondeh-nya kurang enak (kulitnya tebal dan hanya ada segumpal gula aren di dalamnya).

Tempatnya sangat kecil dan antriannya panjang. Staf tidak berusaha menyuruh orang yang sudah selesai makan untuk pergi.

reviews.author: Allen T
reviews.text: Very bad experience. Waited for 30mins and still didn’t get the food. We had another appointment afterwards so we had to ask them to make it takeout instead of dine-in. There’s literarily no service at all (customers need to clean their own table and dishes), so i don’t understand why they still ask for the standard-rate tips.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman yang sangat buruk. Menunggu selama 30 menit dan masih belum mendapatkan makanan. Kami ada janji lain setelah itu jadi kami harus meminta mereka untuk membawa pulang makanan daripada makan di tempat. Benar-benar tidak ada pelayanan sama sekali (pelanggan harus membersihkan meja dan piring mereka sendiri), jadi saya tidak mengerti mengapa mereka masih meminta tip dengan tarif standar.

reviews.author: Janet Chen
reviews.text: Love the kaya toast. Beef rendang is a bit tough but the rice is great (a little sticky). Bee tai bak (short noodle lumps) - very chewy, soup was very bland. Char kway teow quite spicy, decent but not amazing. Hainanese chicken comes with chili sauce and ginger scallion sauce), with skin. Curry puff is deep fried, not flaky, not a strong curry flavour.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka sekali roti bakar kaya-nya. Rendang daging sapinya agak alot tapi nasinya enak (agak lengket). Bee tai bak (mi pendek) - sangat kenyal, kuahnya sangat hambar. Char kway teow cukup pedas, lumayan tapi tidak luar biasa. Ayam Hainan disajikan dengan saus cabai dan saus jahe daun bawang, dengan kulitnya. Curry puff digoreng, tidak renyah, rasa kari tidak terlalu kuat.

reviews.author: Robin Taylor
reviews.text: Do delicious and reasonably priced too!
reviews.textTranslated: Sajikan makanan yang lezat dan harganya pun terjangkau!

reviews.author: Jaehyeon Kim
reviews.text: I’d give it a 2.5 out of 5 for the food. It was kind of heavy and greasy. The place is not really clean or well organized. The service was worse. The owner was taking my order and suddenly disappeared without saying anything. I was left waiting, and then she sat down at a table and started working on her laptop. Another staff member came a minute later and finished taking my order. This was the most bizarre service experience I’ve had in NYC.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya beri nilai 2,5 dari 5 untuk makanannya. Agak berat dan berminyak. Tempatnya tidak terlalu bersih atau terorganisir dengan baik. Pelayanannya lebih buruk lagi. Pemiliknya sedang menerima pesanan saya dan tiba-tiba menghilang tanpa mengatakan apa pun. Saya dibiarkan menunggu, lalu dia duduk di meja dan mulai mengerjakan laptopnya. Anggota staf lain datang semenit kemudian dan menyelesaikan penerimaan pesanan saya. Ini adalah pengalaman pelayanan paling aneh yang pernah saya alami di NYC.

reviews.author: Joshua Tan
reviews.text: Expensive and low quality ingredients. Used to be much better. Teh tarik was legit tho
reviews.textTranslated: Bahan-bahannya mahal dan kualitasnya rendah. Dulu jauh lebih baik. Tapi teh tariknya memang asli.

reviews.author: Minty P
reviews.text: Bek-Kopi （槟城白咖啡） was so delicious. First try and Kopitiam will become my favorite Malaysian spot. Lovely staff and ambience were cozy and relaxing. I wanna try “I don’t know” set menu next time.
reviews.textTranslated: Bek-Kopi (槟城白咖啡) sangat lezat. Ini percobaan pertama saya dan Kopitiam akan menjadi tempat makan Malaysia favorit saya. Stafnya ramah dan suasananya nyaman serta santai. Saya ingin mencoba menu set "I don't know" lain kali.

reviews.author: Jena Hong
reviews.text:
I went when it was relatively quiet, and had the Kaya toast and Hainese Chicken. There’s a good amount of seating, but the restaurant is not accessible to wheel chair users because of the steps leading to the door. They only take Zelle/Venmo/Cash and you’re expected to clear your table yourself. Simple and straightforward.

Kaya toast 10/10
Hainese chicken 5/10
The rice balls for the Hainese chicken were good, but the chicken itself was a bit lackluster texture and taste wise. Prices are pretty good for the portions.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya datang saat suasananya relatif sepi, dan memesan roti panggang Kaya dan ayam Hainan. Tersedia cukup banyak tempat duduk, tetapi restoran ini tidak dapat diakses oleh pengguna kursi roda karena ada tangga menuju pintu masuk. Mereka hanya menerima pembayaran melalui Zelle/Venmo/Tunai dan Anda diharapkan membersihkan meja sendiri. Sederhana dan mudah dipahami.

Roti panggang Kaya 10/10
Ayam Hainan 5/10
Bola nasi untuk ayam Hainan enak, tetapi ayamnya sendiri agak kurang bertekstur dan rasanya kurang enak. Harganya cukup sesuai dengan porsinya.

reviews.author: Brooklyn Roach
reviews.text:
Nasi lemak was delicious, I really enjoyed the crunch of the anchovies. It’s counter service and sort of like a no frills smaller place but our food came out fast and it was a good place to sit and chat. I also got the sunrise drink and it was a bit on the sweeter side but not overly so, I think the sweetness went really nicely with the salty flavor of the food I ordered.

My biggest complaint is that the bathroom could’ve been a bit cleaner, especially considering we came in the morning. It is also cash only but they do accept Venmo and Zelle.
reviews.textTranslated:
Nasi lemaknya enak sekali, saya sangat menikmati kerenyahan ikan terinya. Pelayanannya di konter dan tempatnya sederhana, tapi makanan kami cepat disajikan dan tempatnya nyaman untuk duduk dan mengobrol. Saya juga memesan minuman sunrise dan rasanya agak manis tapi tidak terlalu manis, menurut saya rasa manisnya sangat cocok dengan rasa asin dari makanan yang saya pesan.

Keluhan terbesar saya adalah kamar mandinya bisa lebih bersih, terutama mengingat kami datang di pagi hari. Pembayarannya hanya tunai, tetapi mereka menerima Venmo dan Zelle.

reviews.author: Faye H
reviews.text:
Hainanese chicken rice: idk what magic they work on the sauce (perilla/sesame oil?) but it was pure aromatic goodness. Had me smothering it on the chicken every chance I could get. The milder tasting rice balls also paired perfectly with the chicken, with bits of scorched rice that added to the texture.
Pandan butter toast: simple yet unbeatable combo. The pandan scent really comes thru

The place was kinda chilly and my friends and I were sitting at the big table near the door, so I thought I was gonna freeze to death, but that would’ve been a great last supper😇
reviews.textTranslated:
Nasi ayam Hainan: aku tidak tahu sihir apa yang mereka gunakan pada sausnya (minyak perilla/wijen?), tapi aromanya sangat lezat. Membuatku terus melumuri ayam dengan saus itu setiap kali ada kesempatan. Bola-bola nasi yang rasanya lebih lembut juga sangat cocok dipadukan dengan ayam, dengan sedikit nasi gosong yang menambah tekstur.
Roti panggang mentega pandan: kombinasi sederhana namun tak tertandingi. Aroma pandan benar-benar terasa.

Tempatnya agak dingin dan aku serta teman-temanku duduk di meja besar dekat pintu, jadi aku pikir aku akan membeku sampai mati, tapi itu akan menjadi makan malam terakhir yang hebat 😇

reviews.author: Foolish Reviews
reviews.text:
Came here for breakfast and ordered the Nasi Lemak, as well as the Kopitiam Sunshine drink. The nasi lemak was delicious and a dish that was truly new to me. The rice was cooked perfectly, and the anchovies provided a nice smoky, salty flavor and some nice texture to the dish. Paired with the spicy sambal sauce, it was a very nicely balanced bowl. The boiled egg was good as well, although the egg does come cold which I don’t love. Overall though, very tasty dish and very filling. The drink was also pretty outstanding. It was very fresh, and super refreshing. It was the perfect amount of sweet, tangy, and citrusy.

The downsides are that they only accepted cash, Venmo, or Zelle which I found inconvenient, and the sinks outside the restroom are in pretty rough shape. You are also expected to clear your own table, which isn’t exactly unheard of, but it’s not like putting your tray back at a fast food joint. I had to place my bowl into a bin with other dirty bowls. Not a huge complaint, just a little odd in my opinion.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya datang ke sini untuk sarapan dan memesan Nasi Lemak, serta minuman Kopitiam Sunshine. Nasi lemaknya enak dan merupakan hidangan yang benar-benar baru bagi saya. Nasinya dimasak dengan sempurna, dan ikan teri memberikan rasa asap dan asin yang enak serta tekstur yang bagus pada hidangan tersebut. Dipadukan dengan saus sambal pedas, itu adalah semangkuk nasi yang sangat seimbang. Telur rebusnya juga enak, meskipun telurnya disajikan dingin yang tidak saya sukai. Secara keseluruhan, hidangannya sangat enak dan mengenyangkan. Minumannya juga cukup luar biasa. Sangat segar dan sangat menyegarkan. Rasanya pas, perpaduan antara manis, asam, dan jeruknya.

Kekurangannya adalah mereka hanya menerima uang tunai, Venmo, atau Zelle yang menurut saya kurang praktis, dan wastafel di luar toilet kondisinya cukup buruk. Anda juga diharapkan untuk membersihkan meja sendiri, yang sebenarnya bukan hal yang aneh, tetapi tidak seperti mengembalikan nampan di restoran cepat saji. Saya harus meletakkan mangkuk saya ke dalam tempat sampah bersama mangkuk kotor lainnya. Bukan keluhan besar, hanya sedikit aneh menurut saya.

reviews.author: KarenY NYC
reviews.text:
My original plan was to eat at another Malaysian spot... and I should HAVE stuck with my plans.

I was surprised by the amount of people eating here... figured it must ve good... it's a tiny, hole-in-wall vibe, with a few tables and a communal table... some single seaters by window.

You scan a QR code, order your food at counter, pay with Cash, Venmo or Zelle (only). No cards.  We got the Hainanese Chicken, Curry Chicken, and Kaya Toast, with an ice Milktea. Total about $56.

Food: solid 2.
-Hainanese Chicken (-10), it was horrible, dried... not what we expected. If the best part of this dish is the cilantro & cucumber, it's a fail.
-Curry Chicken (4/10), it's decent... but wouldn't get again. Curry lacks spice... chicken was again dry.  It's a recurring theme.
-Kaya Toast (8/10), probably the ONLY redeeming item...
-Ice Malaysian Milk tea (5/10), was not good. No tea flavor, no condense milk flavor. Just color water.

Verdict: wouldn't recommend, listen to the visual cue (mostly gwai-lo), pricey for mediocrity, don't think this is meant for us.
reviews.textTranslated:
Rencana awal saya adalah makan di restoran Malaysia lain... dan seharusnya saya tetap pada rencana saya.

Saya terkejut dengan banyaknya orang yang makan di sini... saya pikir pasti enak... tempatnya kecil, sederhana, dengan beberapa meja dan meja komunal... beberapa tempat duduk tunggal di dekat jendela.

Anda memindai kode QR, memesan makanan di konter, membayar dengan uang tunai, Venmo, atau Zelle (saja). Tidak menerima kartu. Kami memesan Ayam Hainan, Ayam Kari, dan Roti Panggang Kaya, dengan es teh susu. Total sekitar $56.

Makanan: nilai 2.
-Ayam Hainan (-10), rasanya mengerikan, kering... bukan seperti yang kami harapkan. Jika bagian terbaik dari hidangan ini adalah daun ketumbar & mentimun, maka ini gagal.
-Ayam Kari (4/10), lumayan... tapi tidak akan memesan lagi. Kari kurang bumbu... ayamnya kering lagi. Ini tema yang berulang.

-Kaya Toast (8/10), mungkin SATU-SATUNYA item yang layak...
-Es Teh Susu Malaysia (5/10), tidak enak. Tidak ada rasa teh, tidak ada rasa susu kental. Hanya air berwarna.

Kesimpulan: tidak direkomendasikan, perhatikan isyarat visualnya (kebanyakan gwai-lo), mahal untuk kualitas biasa-biasa saja, sepertinya ini bukan untuk kita.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Karen,

Thank you for giving us a try. We are sorry to hear that it was not a good experience for you.
Our Haianese Chicken meat is intentionally sutble and not on the heavy side, to pair well with its three different sauces and chicken fat rice. Our curry chicken is not supposed to be spicy. We are really glad to hear you enjoyed our kaya toast and that it was to your taste. Do you remember if you got the teh tarik or teh c kosong? If it was the kosong, there would be no condensed milk, only evaporated. If it was the teh tarik, we do not overload with condensed milk unless it is how the person ordering wants it.
We hope that you will consider coming back to find other dishes you like, and that we can provide a more enjoyable experience. We cook all of our food with love and good intention.

Best,
KOPITEAM

reviews.author: Till Chen
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Till,

Thank you for giving us a try. Was there something in particular we could have improved upon? We hope to give you a better experience in the future.

All the best,
KOPITEAM

reviews.author: Xandra Lau
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much Xandra 🙏💚 We hope to see you again soon!!

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: Kaya toast is a must try. Also really enjoyed the bag milk tea and wings
reviews.textTranslated: Roti panggang kaya wajib dicoba. Saya juga sangat menikmati teh susu celup dan sayap ayamnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much Mochi!! The wings are my favorite too 💚 We hope to see you again soon!! 🙏

reviews.author: R W
reviews.text: unsanitary conditions, rude staff, underwhelming food
reviews.textTranslated: Kondisi tidak higienis, staf yang tidak ramah, makanan yang mengecewakan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi R W,
We value both customer service and cleanliness, and take deep pride in our food, so we are very sorry to hear you did not have a good experience with us. We hope if you decide to return we can provide a better experience next time.

reviews.author: Dave Ruan
reviews.text:
It was our first time here, and overall, it was a pretty good experience. We came as a group of five and were lucky to find a table. The place is mostly self-service—you order at the counter, they bring the food out when it’s ready, and you clean up after yourself when you’re done.

We tried the Char Kway Teow and Nasi Lemak as part of the “I don’t know what to order” set, and both were tasty. The crispy duck tongue was flavorful and enjoyable if you’re into that sort of dish, though it’s a bit pricey for just a few pieces. The oyster noodles were slightly too fishy for my taste, but still decent overall.

All in all, it was a good experience. If you’re in the area, it’s worth stopping by for a bite.
reviews.textTranslated:
Ini adalah kunjungan pertama kami ke sini, dan secara keseluruhan, pengalaman kami cukup baik. Kami datang berlima dan beruntung mendapatkan meja. Tempat ini sebagian besar swalayan—Anda memesan di konter, mereka akan membawakan makanan saat sudah siap, dan Anda membersihkan sendiri setelah selesai makan.

Kami mencoba Char Kway Teow dan Nasi Lemak sebagai bagian dari paket "Saya tidak tahu harus memesan apa", dan keduanya enak. Lidah bebek gorengnya gurih dan nikmat jika Anda menyukai hidangan seperti itu, meskipun agak mahal untuk hanya beberapa potong. Mi tiramnya agak terlalu amis untuk selera saya, tetapi secara keseluruhan masih lumayan.

Secara keseluruhan, itu adalah pengalaman yang baik. Jika Anda berada di daerah tersebut, tempat ini layak untuk dikunjungi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hello! Thank you so much for giving us a try 💚 We are so happy to hear you enjoyed the food- and thank you for your feedback. We hope to see you all again soon! 🙏

reviews.author: Jessica Peng
reviews.text: THEY SERVED US RAW CHICKEN HERE😭rest of the food was very mid, avoid at all costs!
reviews.textTranslated: MEREKA MENYAJIKAN AYAM MENTAH DI SINI😭makanan lainnya biasa saja, hindari tempat ini dengan segala cara!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Jessica,

We are sorry to hear you did not enjoy our food. Though the chicken might appear raw, the red part is due to the bone marrow, as the Hainanese Chicken is chopped through the bone. We cook our chicken thoroughly and can assure you this is cooked, but we apologize for the appearance and hope that we can provide a better experience in the future.

Best,
KOPITEAM

reviews.author: Jolie Chan
reviews.text: solid singaporean food! i think my fav is the noodles.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Singapura yang enak banget! Kurasa favoritku adalah mienya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much Jolie! 🙏 We hope to cook more noodles for you soon 💚

reviews.author: Cornelis Wouters
reviews.text: Simple and straightforward eating place with delicious stinky beans and nasi lemak. Very authentic.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan sederhana dan lugas dengan kacang bau dan nasi lemak yang lezat. Sangat otentik.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much Cornelis!! 🙏💚 We hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: fiona
reviews.text: disappointing :( idk if we got a specific bad order or smth but the kaya toast was FOUL like it tasted like lint balls oh my god….. curry was alright and mains were just ok
reviews.textTranslated: Mengecewakan :( Entah kami mendapat pesanan yang buruk atau apa, tapi roti kaya-nya SANGAT TIDAK ENAK, rasanya seperti gumpalan serat kain, ya ampun….. kari lumayan dan hidangan utama biasa saja

reviews.author: Rosalie Wilder
reviews.text:
I’m always on the lookout for the perfect Malaysian foodie spot, so I was excited to try Kopitiam with my sister (September 2025). We were both hungry and needed a quick bite. Ordering and payment are done at the counter before finding a seat. The space is hot, small with limited, and tightly packed tables. They do not take reservations. It’s very much a no-frills, DIY setup with plastic utensils.

I was disappointed with the bland Laksa as it was mostly noodles and veggies with an unexpectedly strong pineapple flavor, which isn’t what I’m used to. Thank goodness for the Sambal Sautéed Water spinach, which was spot-on with just the right amount of pungent shrimp-paste richness, and the Beef Curry delivered all the spicy goodness I hoped for. Depending on what you order, the dishes can definitely be a hit or miss and I left very unsatisfied.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya selalu mencari tempat kuliner Malaysia yang sempurna, jadi saya sangat antusias untuk mencoba Kopitiam bersama saudara perempuan saya (September 2025). Kami berdua lapar dan butuh makanan ringan. Pemesanan dan pembayaran dilakukan di konter sebelum mencari tempat duduk. Tempatnya ramai, kecil, dengan meja terbatas dan berdesakan. Mereka tidak menerima reservasi. Restoran ini benar-benar sederhana, dengan peralatan makan plastik.

Saya kecewa dengan Laksa yang hambar karena sebagian besar berisi mi dan sayuran dengan rasa nanas yang kuat dan tak terduga, yang tidak biasa saya nikmati. Syukurlah ada Sambal Tumis Bayam Air, yang pas dengan rasa pedas terasi yang pas, dan Kari Daging Sapinya memberikan semua rasa pedas yang saya harapkan. Tergantung pesanan Anda, hidangannya bisa saja memuaskan atau mengecewakan, dan saya pulang dengan sangat tidak puas.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Kristie,

Thank you for your feedback- however, we haven’t recently served the beef rendang and laksa, so we are curious when you tried them with us?

We hope if you stop by, we can provide food that you enjoy more!

reviews.author: Ivan Hernandez
reviews.text: Food is really good nice and wam fast service will be back
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak banget, hangat dan pelayanannya cepat, pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Daria Caulfield
reviews.text: I got food poisoning. Most likley from the bean sprouts. I would do a 1 star review but I chose 2 instead because the food poisoning made me skinny and I look amazing
reviews.textTranslated: Aku keracunan makanan. Kemungkinan besar karena tauge. Aku sebenarnya ingin memberi rating 1 bintang, tapi aku memilih 2 bintang karena keracunan makanan itu membuatku kurus dan aku terlihat luar biasa.

reviews.author: lucía vz
reviews.text: Perfect for snacks and sweets including sweet and refreshing drinks. Unique Malaysian dishes, I always discover a new fave. Kuih Talam and Pulut Tai Tai always hit. Hainanese Chicken Rice is go to comfort perfection.
reviews.textTranslated: Sempurna untuk camilan dan makanan manis termasuk minuman manis dan menyegarkan. Masakan Malaysia yang unik, saya selalu menemukan favorit baru. Kuih Talam dan Pulut Tai Tai selalu jadi pilihan tepat. Nasi Ayam Hainan adalah makanan penghibur yang sempurna.

reviews.author: Elaine Young
reviews.text:
I’ve been coming here since it opened 7? 8? years ago?). My friend used to work here, so I came by pretty often. I want to leave a 5 star review but am very sad that I can’t. The food remains pretty consistent (I love the Oh Chien) but please tidy up and care about the cleanliness. While I love ‘Dive-y’ and casual, I actually don’t want to bring new friends here because of the disregard for showing your clientele that you care. My assumption is that the original owners haven’t been involved for a long time.

*** Dear KopiTeam - Kopitiam remains one of my favorite spots to stop in by myself to get an Asian food fix ❤️

I really appreciate you taking the time to reply. I hope you will take special care when the leaking issues have been resolved to deep clean and tidy up the restrooms and clutter.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sudah datang ke sini sejak dibuka sekitar 7? 8? tahun yang lalu? Teman saya dulu bekerja di sini, jadi saya sering mampir. Saya ingin memberikan ulasan bintang 5 tetapi sangat sedih karena tidak bisa. Makanan tetap konsisten (saya suka Oh Chien) tetapi tolong bersihkan dan perhatikan kebersihannya. Meskipun saya suka suasana 'dive-y' dan kasual, saya sebenarnya tidak ingin mengajak teman baru ke sini karena kurangnya perhatian terhadap pelanggan. Dugaan saya adalah pemilik aslinya sudah lama tidak terlibat.

*** Kepada Tim Kopi - Kopitiam tetap menjadi salah satu tempat favorit saya untuk mampir sendirian untuk menikmati makanan Asia ❤️

Saya sangat menghargai waktu yang Anda luangkan untuk membalas. Saya harap Anda akan lebih memperhatikan kebersihan dan kerapian toilet serta barang-barang yang berserakan setelah masalah kebocoran teratasi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Elaine,

First, we want to say thank you for continuing to support us. We’re glad to hear you have enjoyed our food over the years. 
Recently, we have been experiencing leaks in the building that we are in the process of fixing- rest assured, we are working on it, and apologize for related issues as we fix things. Our original owner is at the restaurant everyday. We hope that we can host you again soon for a better experience.

Sincerely,
KOPITEAM

reviews.author: Murray Plum
reviews.text: Food was great. It’s cash/venmo/zelle only. Tables are first come first serve. Patrons need to understand that they shouldn’t stay longer than eating their meal so tables free up quicker. Would definitely be back.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak sekali. Pembayaran hanya tunai/Venmo/Zelle. Meja tersedia berdasarkan siapa yang datang lebih dulu. Pelanggan perlu memahami bahwa mereka tidak boleh berlama-lama setelah makan agar meja cepat kosong. Pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Sapphira Bella
reviews.text: I came in around 9pm and I had called beforehand to make sure they would take my order. I ordered a Mee Goreng and a Kiuh Talam- many of their dishes contain pork lard and while I am flexitarian I do not eat pork. I had really been looking forward to trying this restaurant mainly for the dessert!!! My sister was running late per usual… so while I was waiting for her I had some of the food. I ended up having to take it to go and a restaurant about to close is not a fun place to be because staff is all busy cleaning up. The noodles were OK, the Kiuh Talam was absolutely STELLAR!!! It was labeled as V+ for vegan but tasted of egg. I look forward to trying more of their menu. Update- I have been so obsessed with their desserts I have come here 3x in the last 5 days, I have since tried the Ondeh Ondeh, the Pulut Tai Tai, and the Kiuh Dadar.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya datang sekitar jam 9 malam dan saya sudah menelepon sebelumnya untuk memastikan mereka akan menerima pesanan saya. Saya memesan Mee Goreng dan Kiuh Talam - banyak hidangan mereka mengandung lemak babi dan meskipun saya fleksitarian, saya tidak makan babi. Saya sangat menantikan untuk mencoba restoran ini terutama untuk hidangan penutupnya!!! Adik saya terlambat seperti biasa… jadi sambil menunggunya, saya makan sedikit. Akhirnya saya harus membawanya pulang dan restoran yang akan tutup bukanlah tempat yang menyenangkan karena semua staf sibuk membersihkan. Mienya lumayan, Kiuh Talam benar-benar LUAR BIASA!!! Itu diberi label V+ untuk vegan tetapi rasanya seperti telur. Saya berharap dapat mencoba lebih banyak menu mereka. Update - Saya sangat terobsesi dengan hidangan penutup mereka sehingga saya telah datang ke sini 3 kali dalam 5 hari terakhir, sejak itu saya telah mencoba Ondeh Ondeh, Pulut Tai Tai, dan Kiuh Dadar.

reviews.author: Jack Daniel
reviews.text: Very nice food and Asian food fix for me. Amazing place with Asian atmosphere. If you ever miss Malaysian food during your stay in NYC, this is definitely a must-try and must-go place. A few of the must-try dishes are as attached on my pictures. A picture painted a thousand words. Judge for yourself when you are here
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat enak dan benar-benar memuaskan selera kuliner Asia saya. Tempat yang menakjubkan dengan suasana Asia. Jika Anda rindu makanan Malaysia selama berada di NYC, tempat ini wajib dicoba dan dikunjungi. Beberapa hidangan yang wajib dicoba ada di foto-foto saya. Sebuah gambar berbicara seribu kata. Nilailah sendiri saat Anda berada di sini.

reviews.author: Jerry Wang
reviews.text: cold. expensive. low quality.
reviews.textTranslated: Dingin. Mahal. Kualitas rendah.

reviews.author: Rita DeRaedt
reviews.text:
Have been coming here for the last 5 years and it never disappoints.

The Criss Cross mushrooms are everything, you have to try!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sudah datang ke sini selama 5 tahun terakhir dan tidak pernah mengecewakan.

Jamur Criss Cross-nya luar biasa, Anda harus mencobanya!

reviews.author: Mei Deng
reviews.text: Have only tried their kaya toast - superb. Can’t rate it 5 stars bc haven’t tried other dishes
reviews.textTranslated: Saya baru mencoba roti bakar kaya mereka - luar biasa. Saya tidak bisa memberi peringkat 5 bintang karena belum mencoba hidangan lainnya.

reviews.author: Chenshu Liu
reviews.text: Great authentic Malaysian dishes and deserts! Great coffee also!
reviews.textTranslated: Masakan dan hidangan penutup khas Malaysia yang lezat! Kopinya juga enak!

reviews.author: jenny
reviews.text: We went here for lunch/brunch and there was no wait at the time.  We had the kaya butter toast, nasi lemak, and bak kut teh.  Everything was pretty good, my favorites were the kaya toast and the pork dish.  The anchovies were a little hard so they were kind of hard to swallow but I did like the flavor.  Seating is somewhat limited so around closer to lunch time it seemed to be more crowded.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami pergi ke sini untuk makan siang/brunch dan saat itu tidak ada antrian. Kami memesan roti panggang kaya mentega, nasi lemak, dan bak kut teh. Semuanya cukup enak, favorit saya adalah roti panggang kaya dan hidangan daging babi. Ikan terinya agak keras sehingga agak sulit ditelan, tetapi saya menyukai rasanya. Tempat duduk agak terbatas, jadi menjelang waktu makan siang tampaknya lebih ramai.

reviews.author: Dolly Winter
reviews.text: great food, bummer that the menu is only thru a QR code. It def aims towards a younger crowd. Kids worked the counter! Jerky slider was delish!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak, sayang sekali menunya hanya melalui kode QR. Jelas sekali tempat ini menargetkan kalangan muda. Anak-anak bekerja di konter! Slider dendengnya lezat!

reviews.author: Mariam Naeem
reviews.text: I went there for a second time expecting a Malaysian spot to be halal. Unfortunately much to my dismay, not only was it Not halal but no one spoke enough English to even communicate or effectively understand what I was asking for leaving me in confusion when I tried to ask if anything was halal . I asked around my group of friends and this is not the first time this has happened at this restaurant where people were given answers ranging from yes or no due to a lack of understanding  . I personally love supporting Hole in the wall spots At the same time, I think they should be held to some standards of understanding what kind of food they are serving even if they don’t speak English and to cater to the market that they are in. I understand halal meat may be more pricey but it’s part of the inclusivity of the city to have these options especially for a cuisine predominantly known to be such: I hope you can update your staff to be knowledgeable and your restaurant flourishes
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi ke sana untuk kedua kalinya dengan harapan tempat makan Malaysia itu halal. Sayangnya, yang sangat mengecewakan, bukan hanya tidak halal, tetapi tidak ada seorang pun yang cukup fasih berbahasa Inggris untuk berkomunikasi atau memahami apa yang saya tanyakan, sehingga saya bingung ketika mencoba bertanya apakah ada makanan yang halal. Saya bertanya kepada teman-teman saya dan ini bukan pertama kalinya hal ini terjadi di restoran ini, di mana orang-orang diberi jawaban yang beragam, mulai dari ya atau tidak, karena kurangnya pemahaman. Saya pribadi suka mendukung tempat makan kecil yang sederhana. Namun, saya pikir mereka harus memiliki standar pemahaman tentang jenis makanan yang mereka sajikan, meskipun mereka tidak berbahasa Inggris, dan untuk memenuhi pasar yang mereka targetkan. Saya mengerti daging halal mungkin lebih mahal, tetapi itu adalah bagian dari inklusivitas kota untuk memiliki pilihan ini, terutama untuk masakan yang sebagian besar dikenal sebagai makanan halal. Saya harap Anda dapat meningkatkan pengetahuan staf Anda dan restoran Anda berkembang.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Mariam,

Thank you for taking the chance to walk into our restaurant- we were more than happy to welcome you and your friends to dine in with us. As we remember, your friends arrived to our restaurant 30 minutes earlier before your arrival. We explained honestly and politely that Malaysia is a multi cultural country and not all Malaysian cuisine is halal and we do not serve halal food. We think it’s really unfair that you left us a 1 star review simply because we do not serve what you expected, without even dining in our restaurant. It is very unfair to also other fellow restaurants where you also left bad reviews because they did not serve halal food. As a minority in this country, it’s hurtful to see another WOC is trying to push us down instead of offering support. We hope that deep down you understand that New York City is amazing because it welcomes everyone around the world.

reviews.author: Katerina Kossler
reviews.text: i fear you cannot go wrong here
reviews.textTranslated: Saya khawatir Anda tidak akan salah pilih di sini.

reviews.author: Tony C
reviews.text:
AVOID!! Place gave me food poisoning…

No table service, you go in and scan the QR and order and pay at the register. They don’t serve you water or anything. They bring you the food, eat and jet. Food was overpriced for the tiny portions. Place was cold and smelled like bathroom. We asked for bowls to share the food and one of the bowl was dirty….

We ordered the curry chee churn fun which was luke warm/cold with a kick of spice, underwhelming. The Kaya toast was nothing special, just two piece of hard toast slapped with Kaya. The Milo toast was decent but not enough condensed milk. The chicken jerky bun didn’t have the big slab of butter as the description said. The Malay tea with condense milk taste like regular milk tea.
Had a stomach ache and had to go #2 shortly after sooo….place was def dirty.
reviews.textTranslated:
HINDARI!! Tempat ini membuat saya keracunan makanan…

Tidak ada layanan meja, Anda masuk dan memindai QR lalu memesan dan membayar di kasir. Mereka tidak menyajikan air atau apa pun. Mereka membawakan makanan, makan, dan langsung pergi. Makanannya terlalu mahal untuk porsi kecil. Tempatnya dingin dan berbau seperti kamar mandi. Kami meminta mangkuk untuk berbagi makanan dan salah satu mangkuknya kotor….

Kami memesan kari keju churn fun yang hangat/dingin dengan sedikit rasa pedas, tapi kurang memuaskan. Roti panggang Kaya-nya biasa saja, hanya dua potong roti panggang keras yang diberi saus Kaya. Roti panggang Milo-nya lumayan, tapi susu kental manisnya kurang. Roti dendeng ayamnya tidak memiliki mentega sebanyak yang tertulis di deskripsi. Teh Melayu dengan susu kental manis rasanya seperti teh susu biasa.
Saya sakit perut dan harus pergi ke toilet kedua tak lama kemudian, jadi….tempatnya benar-benar kotor.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Tony,

We are sorry to hear you had a negative experience with us. We are not a full service restaurant, we usually take your order, give you a number, and bring the food to your table. Water, sauces and share plates can always be asked for at the counter.  From our records, your order was the first ticket in the morning- so all of our dishes would be as fresh as possible instead of lukewarm. We understand that it's a possibility that cuisine can be based on personal liking. 
- For the Milo french toast, we gave enough amount of condensed milk. However everyone’s preference for the sweetness level is different - if you prefer more, we are happy to give you more.  
As for the slab of butter that you mentioned, - it melted because the bun was hot, so that probably explain why you don’t see enough butter on top of the bun.  
We served Malaysian Classic Milk Tea,  it’s black tea and condensed milk, so it wouldn’t have any unexpected taste like Chai tea or any other spiced smoked tea.
Again, Thank you for coming to our restaurant. we hope you have a wonderful day.

reviews.author: R J (Rohan)
reviews.text:
.
Char Kway Teow was amazing. mee goreng and tofu salad were a bit bland
reviews.textTranslated:
.
Char Kway Teow-nya luar biasa. Mie goreng dan salad tahu agak hambar.

reviews.author: e c
reviews.text: Understated LES gem that serves a nourishing, flavorful pan mee that tastes like homecooking
reviews.textTranslated: Permata LES yang bersahaja yang menyajikan mie pan bergizi dan beraroma yang rasanya seperti masakan rumahan

reviews.author: Naveed Nikpour
reviews.text: A huge let down. Would not recommend the Hainanese chicken. Gave their food multiple chances but feels like quality has gone down.
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat mengecewakan. Tidak akan merekomendasikan ayam Hainan. Saya sudah mencoba beberapa kali, tetapi rasanya kualitasnya menurun.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Naveed,

We’re sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy our Hainanese chicken rice. Was there something in particular that you didn’t like?
We’re thankful that you’ve dined with us, and sorry to hear that your visits haven’t met your expectations. We sincerely hope if you decide to give us another try, that we can give you a better experience.

reviews.author: klein menachem
reviews.text: אוכל חביב , ארוחה קלה לבוצר
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak, makanan ringan untuk yang lapar

reviews.author: Alvin See
reviews.text: I’d like to share some feedback regarding the service experience today. After placing my order, I was about to take a table when another customer, who hadn’t ordered yet, rushed ahead to claim it. The staff simply mentioned that it was out of their control and that I should have secured a table before ordering. While I’ve always enjoyed the food here during my visits to New York, this situation left a disappointing impression.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya ingin berbagi masukan mengenai pengalaman layanan hari ini. Setelah memesan, saya hendak memesan meja ketika pelanggan lain, yang belum memesan, bergegas mengambilnya. Staf hanya mengatakan bahwa hal itu di luar kendali mereka dan seharusnya saya memesan meja sebelum memesan. Meskipun saya selalu menikmati makanan di sini selama kunjungan saya ke New York, situasi ini meninggalkan kesan yang mengecewakan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Alvin,

Thank you for coming in yesterday and for the feedback- we are sorry to hear your experience didn’t go smoothly. Before we took your order, we checked if you had a table, and the other guests you mentioned offered seating space, but it was refused. We wish there was more we could have done in this situation, and apologize for the inconvenience it caused you. We are thankful to hear you have consistently enjoyed our food, and hope you will consider returning to have a better experience next time. 🙏

reviews.author: Aaron Fineman
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much, we hope to see you again soon!! 🙏💚

reviews.author: Suhaib Mohammad
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much! 🙏💚 Hope to see you again soon!!

reviews.author: Crayollla
reviews.text:
HOT AND CROWDED FOR MEH OVERPRICED FOOD…
Food was not the best… the place is often crowded and busy and there is no ac so it is HOT in there. I’ve tried this place two times and believe there is better Malaysian food elsewhere.
reviews.textTranslated:
PANAS DAN RAMAI UNTUK MAKANAN YANG MAHAL…
Makanannya kurang enak… tempatnya sering ramai dan sibuk, dan tidak ada AC, jadi PANAS di sana. Saya sudah mencoba tempat ini dua kali dan yakin ada makanan Malaysia yang lebih enak di tempat lain.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for coming in to try our food. We are sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your meal, but hope you will consider coming back to try the other dishes we have to offer. 🙏
The temperature inside our restaurant, because it is chilly outside, we want to keep the temperature inside cozier.

reviews.author: Kate
reviews.text: The Kaya toast isn’t worth the price point and doesn’t match what I’ve had in Singapore. The jam was too thick and sweet and they charged $5 for 1 egg, not included with the toast. Really bummed because I miss authentic Kaya toast
reviews.textTranslated: Roti panggang Kaya-nya tidak sepadan dengan harganya dan tidak sebanding dengan yang pernah saya makan di Singapura. Selainya terlalu kental dan manis, dan mereka mematok harga $5 untuk 1 butir telur, tidak termasuk roti panggang. Sangat kecewa karena saya merindukan roti panggang Kaya yang asli.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Kate,

Thank you for trying our kaya toast- we are a Malaysian restaurant and make it the way our Chef ate it at home. We hope you will consider coming back to try our other Malaysian dishes!

reviews.author: Grace Y
reviews.text: Everytime I visit NYC I make sure to make a stop here. I love their Nasi Lemak and Criss Cross Shrooms.
reviews.textTranslated: Setiap kali ke New York City, saya selalu mampir ke sini. Saya suka Nasi Lemak dan Jamur Criss Cross mereka.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much!! We are so happy to be a special NYC stop for you <3 We hope to see you again soon!!

reviews.author: Barry Lee
reviews.responseFromOwner: 🙏💚 Thank you Barry! Hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Effy Liu
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for stopping by Effy! 🙏 We hope you enjoyed your Hainanese Chicken Rice! : )

reviews.author: Hugh Far
reviews.text: Very nice place, the food was decently priced for the area and had good flavor. I can't speak for the authenticity but I do think the food was pretty good. Would go again
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya bagus banget, makanannya lumayan murah untuk daerahnya dan rasanya enak. Saya sih kurang yakin keasliannya, tapi menurut saya makanannya lumayan enak. Bakal balik lagi nih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Hugh- thank you so much for giving us a try! We're so glad to hear you enjoyed your nasi lemak and curry puff : ) Hope to see you again soon! 🙏

reviews.author: Yi Luo
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for giving us a try- we hope you will come back and try our other dishes, and find something you like best! 🙏

reviews.author: Jessica Wong
reviews.text: Enak. Murah. Cepat. Btw teh tariknya tidak manis tapi okelah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: TERIMA KASIH!!! 🙏💚 Hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: BY Lim
reviews.text: We're from Malaysia and wanted to try this place. Apparently the owner is from Penang, Nyoya descent. We'd a chat. Great guy. Food is okay and the pork jerky bun is good. Char key teow is not up to mark though. But at least I get to have a sip of our famous Kopi-O 😇 The place is a little mess with stock cartons stacking in the shop.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami dari Malaysia dan ingin mencoba tempat ini. Rupanya pemiliknya dari Penang, keturunan Nyoya. Kami mengobrol. Orangnya baik. Makanannya lumayan dan bakpao dendeng babinya enak. Char key teow-nya kurang memuaskan. Tapi setidaknya saya bisa menikmati Kopi-O kami yang terkenal 😇 Tempatnya agak berantakan dengan tumpukan kardus stok di toko.

reviews.author: Fanta Kante
reviews.text: Only had the monkey bread French toast and milo coffee, so I can only vouch for them. Both really good. Like the atmosphere too. Nothing extraordinary but definitely worth a visit
reviews.textTranslated: Saya hanya memesan monkey bread French toast dan kopi milo, jadi saya hanya bisa memberikan ulasan untuk keduanya. Keduanya benar-benar enak. Saya juga suka suasananya. Tidak ada yang luar biasa, tetapi pasti layak dikunjungi.

reviews.author: Ya Yay
reviews.text: Small but cute cafe with a large variety of Malaysian dishes and desserts. Highly recommend the blue rice balls and the national dish. The pandan dessert has an interesting yet addicting taste (the coconut layer on top is salty!). The Milo French toast is very good but very sweet; you get a lot though. This has become my go-to cafe in the lower east side!
reviews.textTranslated: Kafe kecil tapi cantik dengan beragam hidangan dan hidangan penutup khas Malaysia. Sangat merekomendasikan bola-bola nasi biru dan hidangan nasionalnya. Hidangan penutup pandannya memiliki rasa yang menarik sekaligus adiktif (lapisan kelapa di atasnya terasa asin!). Roti panggang Milo-nya sangat enak, tetapi sangat manis; tapi rasanya cukup banyak. Kafe ini sudah menjadi favorit saya di Lower East Side!

reviews.author: Nissa Mai-Rose
reviews.text: Totally passable Malay food but about 25% overpriced for the quality
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Melayu yang lumayan, tapi harganya sekitar 25% terlalu mahal untuk kualitasnya

reviews.author: Dominique Jeton Groffman
reviews.text:
criss cross mushrooms are to die for
food is delicious and comes very quickly
casual, easy-going, and inviting
reviews.textTranslated:
Jamur silangnya enak sekali
Makanannya lezat dan disajikan dengan sangat cepat
Santai, santai, dan menarik
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Dominique,
Thank you so much! We are so happy to hear you love our criss cross shrooms : ) We sincerely hope to see you again soon! ♥️

reviews.author: Jiar Fong
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you very much Jiar! 🙏♥️

reviews.author: Gyunbae Joe
reviews.text: Really not tasty
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya tidak enak sama sekali.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hey Gyunbae,
We're sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your food! Was there a dish specifically that you didn't like? We hope you will give us another try to find something you do enjoy!

reviews.author: Z Z
reviews.text: Underrated gem! The half boiled egg + kaya butter toast is to die for for anyone who likes salty + sweet combinations. Pandan chicken tastes amazing. Fish ball soup is on the lighter side. Overall, great portion, fun dishes, friendly staff!
reviews.textTranslated: Permata yang kurang dikenal! Roti panggang telur setengah matang + mentega kaya ini benar-benar luar biasa bagi siapa pun yang menyukai kombinasi asin dan manis. Ayam pandan rasanya luar biasa. Sup bakso ikannya agak ringan. Secara keseluruhan, porsinya besar, hidangannya menyenangkan, dan stafnya ramah!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi ZZ!
Thank you so much for your review! We are so happy to hear you enjoyed the food. We also ♥️ the kaya toast + half-boiled egg combo 😁 We sincerely hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: candas gulsoy
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Candas!
Thank you for your review! What a great spread of food you had- we hope you enjoyed ♥️ Hope to see you soon for more kuih and dishes!

reviews.author: D G
reviews.text: We loved everything.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menyukai semuanya.

reviews.author: Josephine Lee
reviews.text:
I'm picky about my Malaysia food, having grown up with the good stuff. Kopitiam always seemed to garner mixed reviews at best, so I kind of avoided the spot until recently, when a friend wanted to meet her new long distance beau and he picked Kopitiam to be judged, juried and (potentially) executed.

I wish I could say we had a merry time, but it was a weird night. Mostly because HE was weird.....and brand new to Malaysian food, which made it just so much more painful for me (I hate playing tour guide/translator when I haven't offered to do so).

But I digress. You didn't come here for my tea. You came for tea on Kopitiam.

The good:

- Kaya Butter Toast: Properly thick and large, with tons of delicious kaya

- Nasi Lemak: Of course I've had better in the motherland, but for NYC, this hit all the right notes of coconut rice, plenty of ikan bilis, and tasty a sambal

- Pan Mee with soup: Could've used more noodles, but the friedn anchovies were popping, and the broth was umami-tastic

- Sambal Sauteed Water Spinach: What can I say, Asians just do veggies better. Get this when you need to see some green on your plate

- Ondeh Ondeh: Hard to find and definitely worth the effort, so make sure to come early to hedge your bets. Then enjoy that sweet, sweet mochi-like texture with glorious palm sugar filling

- Honeycomb Cake: Moist and decadent without being too sweet

- Penang-Style Hand-Rolled Muah Chee: Made to order, but worth it if you've never experienced the glory of warm ground peanuts and sesame seeds served in chewy pieces. Mmmm, my childhood....

The Okay:

- Otak Otak: Spicy grilled fish "quiche", but not quite aromatic enough and a bit dry

- Malaysian Style Half Boiled Eggs: I like mine saltier

- Oh Chien: Not bad, but needed way more oyster

- Pandan Chicken: No pandan flavor + oversalted chicken + dry meat = I regret choosing this as a last-minute add-on

All in all, I liked Kopitiam more than I expected. Can't wait to go back without having to entertain a insular white guy who can't use chopsticks just because he's boinking my friend.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya agak pilih-pilih soal makanan Malaysia, karena tumbuh besar dengan makanan enak. Kopitiam sepertinya selalu mendapat ulasan beragam, jadi saya agak menghindarinya sampai baru-baru ini, ketika seorang teman ingin bertemu pacar jarak jauhnya dan dia memilih Kopitiam untuk dinilai, dijuri, dan (berpotensi) dieksekusi.

Saya berharap bisa bilang kami bersenang-senang, tapi malam itu aneh. Terutama karena DIA aneh.....dan benar-benar baru dalam hal makanan Malaysia, yang membuatnya jauh lebih menyakitkan bagi saya (saya benci berperan sebagai pemandu wisata/penerjemah padahal saya belum menawarkan diri).

Tapi saya ngelantur. Kamu datang ke sini bukan untuk minum teh saya. Kamu datang untuk minum teh di Kopitiam.

Keunggulannya:

- Roti Panggang Mentega Kaya: Tebal dan besar, dengan saus kaya yang lezat

- Nasi Lemak: Tentu saja saya pernah makan yang lebih enak di tanah air, tapi untuk ukuran New York, ini punya semua rasa yang pas: nasi kelapa, ikan bilis yang melimpah, dan sambal yang lezat

- Mie Pan dengan sup: Mienya bisa lebih banyak, tapi ikan teri gorengnya meletup-letup, dan kuahnya umami-tastis

- Sambal Tumis Bayam Air: Apa lagi yang bisa saya katakan, orang Asia memang lebih suka sayuran. Pesan ini saat Anda ingin melihat sayuran hijau di piring Anda

- Ondeh Ondeh: Sulit ditemukan dan pasti sepadan dengan usahanya, jadi pastikan datang lebih awal untuk menghindari risiko. Nikmati tekstur mochi yang manis dan manis dengan isian gula aren yang lezat.

- Kue Sarang Lebah: Lembap dan mewah tanpa terlalu manis.

- Muah Chee Gulung Tangan ala Penang: Dibuat sesuai pesanan, tetapi sepadan jika Anda belum pernah merasakan nikmatnya kacang tanah dan biji wijen hangat yang disajikan dalam potongan-potongan kenyal. Mmmm, masa kecilku....

Yang Lumayan:

- Otak Otak: "Quiche" ikan bakar pedas, tetapi kurang aromatik dan agak kering.

- Telur Setengah Matang ala Malaysia: Saya lebih suka yang lebih asin.

- Oh Chien: Lumayan, tetapi perlu lebih banyak tiram.

- Ayam Pandan: Tanpa rasa pandan + ayam yang terlalu asin + daging kering = Saya menyesal memilih ini sebagai tambahan di menit-menit terakhir.

Secara keseluruhan, saya lebih menyukai Kopitiam daripada yang saya harapkan. Tidak sabar untuk kembali tanpa harus menjamu pria kulit putih yang tertutup yang tidak bisa menggunakan sumpit hanya karena dia sedang bercinta dengan teman saya.

reviews.author: T Spoon
reviews.text:
Ordered chicken rice.  Chicken was raw inside,  no taste and bland.  Tasted like they just boiled the chicken in hot water.
There were flies in the restroom and in the dining area.
reviews.textTranslated:
Memesan nasi ayam. Ayamnya mentah di dalam, hambar, dan hambar. Rasanya seperti ayamnya direbus dalam air panas.
Ada lalat di toilet dan di ruang makan.

reviews.author: Ivan Poljakov
reviews.text: If I'm ever in this area again, I'll make sure to return. Five stars doesn't do justice to what this place offers. The employees maintained perfect service flow. Every dish pleased our palates completely. This place is worth a visit - I'm glad I found it.
reviews.textTranslated: Kalau ke daerah ini lagi, saya pasti akan kembali. Lima bintang saja tidak cukup untuk menggambarkan apa yang ditawarkan tempat ini. Para karyawannya selalu memberikan pelayanan yang sempurna. Setiap hidangan benar-benar memuaskan selera kami. Tempat ini patut dikunjungi - saya senang menemukannya.

reviews.author: J Song (winterboy)
reviews.text: I enjoyed traditonal Malaysian food blends Chienes, but it was difficult to hear the description from the cashier and had to wait long even though it was after 1pm. In addition, there is no ticketing system or number.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menikmati makanan tradisional Malaysia yang dipadukan dengan masakan Cina, tetapi sulit untuk mendengar penjelasan dari kasir dan harus menunggu lama meskipun sudah lewat pukul 1 siang. Selain itu, tidak ada sistem tiket atau nomor antrian.

reviews.author: Deborah Yoo
reviews.text:
We were excited to visit because my Malaysian boyfriend wanted a bit of home. It was definitely bumping when we went for lunch on the weekend, but were lucky enough to grab a table.
We were most excited for the kaya toast, and it was pretty good!
The food was alright and a bit underwhelming, but the vibes were great.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami sangat senang berkunjung karena pacar saya yang orang Malaysia ingin merasakan sedikit suasana rumah. Tempat itu memang ramai saat kami makan siang di akhir pekan, tetapi kami beruntung mendapatkan meja.
Yang paling kami nantikan adalah roti bakar kaya, dan rasanya cukup enak!
Makanannya lumayan dan agak mengecewakan, tetapi suasananya sangat menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Sriya Reddi
reviews.text:
The food is really good, people are so nice and the vibe is very chill like a cafe. They said to expect 10-15 mins wait the food came so fast in less than 10 mins.

1. Milo Dinosaur (SO GOOD!)
2. Kaya Butter Toast (Generous amount of Kaya and well toasted)
3. Malaysian Style Milo French Toast (A little sweet but that's expected :))
4. Chicken Jerky Bun
5. Kopi Tarik (Pretty good, strong coffee)
6. Curry Chicken Rice (So good wish there was a boneless chicken choice)
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya enak banget, orang-orangnya ramah dan suasananya santai banget seperti kafe. Mereka bilang tunggu 10-15 menit, tapi makanannya datang sangat cepat, kurang dari 10 menit.

1. Milo Dinosaur (ENAK BANGET!)
2. Roti Panggang Kaya Butter (Kaya butternya banyak dan dipanggang dengan baik)
3. Roti Panggang Prancis Milo Gaya Malaysia (Agak manis tapi wajar :))
4. Roti Isi Ayam Kering
5. Kopi Tarik (Lumayan enak, kopinya kuat)
6. Nasi Kari Ayam (Enak banget, sayang sekali tidak ada pilihan ayam tanpa tulang)

reviews.author: Amy Choo
reviews.text: Amazing service and the food was authenticity Malaysian. To be more accurate, authenticity Penang.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya luar biasa dan makanannya benar-benar khas Malaysia. Lebih tepatnya, benar-benar khas Penang.

reviews.author: Natalie Vera
reviews.text:
Nasi lemak - the rice is very aromatic, and the slightly spicy anchovies worked very well with the rice. Sambal chilli is not very authentic though.

Chicken rice - yellow rice and a huge dry drumstick. The meat texture is very dry.

Char kway teow - okay taste. A little coagulated and thick on the starch.

Price is okay for Manhattan. A little expensive for the type of food.

Pretty crowded for a Sunday lunch. Free seating. Mostly Americans rather than Asians.
reviews.textTranslated:
Nasi lemak - nasinya sangat harum, dan ikan teri yang sedikit pedas sangat cocok dengan nasi. Namun, sambalnya kurang otentik.

Nasi ayam - nasi kuning dan paha ayam yang besar dan kering. Tekstur dagingnya sangat kering.

Char kway teow - rasanya lumayan. Sedikit menggumpal dan kental.

Harganya lumayan untuk Manhattan. Agak mahal untuk jenis makanan seperti ini.

Cukup ramai untuk makan siang hari Minggu. Tempat duduk bebas. Kebanyakan orang Amerika, bukan Asia.

reviews.author: Ryan Z.
reviews.text: Food is ok. The environment is way too dirty. Not recommended.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan. Lingkungannya terlalu kotor. Tidak direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: 紀嘉淯
reviews.text:
202508
趕時間來不及等鹹食 外帶咖椰吐司和白咖啡 都不錯
reviews.textTranslated: 202508 Karena terburu-buru dan tidak punya waktu untuk menunggu makanan gurih, roti bakar kaya dan kopi putih yang dibeli untuk dibawa pulang sama-sama enak.

reviews.author: James Korge
reviews.text: Lots of great food and even better coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak makanan enak dan kopinya pun lebih nikmat.

reviews.author: Jude Jhons
reviews.text: The consistency here comes from genuine commitment to excellence. Each menu item demonstrates taste richness. You'll notice the endearing touches. Their workers delivered timely, warm service that would be good for family outings. I fully expect to return!
reviews.textTranslated: Konsistensi di sini berasal dari komitmen tulus terhadap keunggulan. Setiap menu menunjukkan kekayaan rasa. Anda akan merasakan sentuhan-sentuhan yang memikat. Para staf mereka memberikan layanan yang tepat waktu dan hangat, cocok untuk acara keluarga. Saya sangat berharap untuk kembali!

reviews.author: nelson cooper
reviews.text: Delicious lunch and cute space!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makan siang yang lezat dan tempat yang nyaman!!

reviews.author: Michel Nee
reviews.text: This restaurant delivers quality across the board. Their cooking demonstrates real skill. All workers are consistently nice and remarkably welcoming. You'll meet nice workers who make excellent food. A genuinely exceptional experience.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran ini memberikan kualitas terbaik. Masakan mereka menunjukkan keahlian yang sesungguhnya. Semua pekerja selalu ramah dan sangat ramah. Anda akan bertemu dengan pekerja-pekerja ramah yang menyajikan hidangan lezat. Sebuah pengalaman yang sungguh luar biasa.

reviews.author: Nhi Hoang
reviews.text: Loved the Kaya butter toast!!! Everything was slightly saltier to my liking but seasoning was really yummy.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget sama roti panggang mentega Kaya!!! Semuanya agak terlalu asin untuk seleraku, tapi bumbunya benar-benar enak.

reviews.author: Mari Hua
reviews.text: This restaurant wins in terms of value and flavor - the food is delicious, satisfying, unique, and authentic (according to my companion who brought me here, excited to share it because they said it reminded them of the food their mom and relatives in Malaysia would make). Many good flavor combinations I haven’t had anywhere else - including incorporating pandan in lovely sandwiches. I do wish they’d do a bit of renovations, but they definitely benefit from good food privilege so this isn’t a pressing wish haha.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran ini unggul dalam hal nilai dan rasa - makanannya lezat, mengenyangkan, unik, dan otentik (menurut teman saya yang mengajak saya ke sini, yang dengan senang hati membagikannya karena katanya mengingatkan mereka pada masakan ibu dan kerabat mereka di Malaysia). Banyak kombinasi rasa enak yang belum pernah saya temukan di tempat lain - termasuk penggunaan pandan dalam sandwich yang lezat. Saya berharap mereka melakukan sedikit renovasi, tetapi mereka jelas diuntungkan oleh kualitas makanan yang bagus, jadi ini bukan keinginan yang mendesak haha.

reviews.author: Janelle Cheung
reviews.text: If you’re a foodie, this place is a serious disappointment. The noodle soup was so bland, curry chicken was watery and unimpressive, the sweet rose milk drink tasted like straight milk. The pandan kaya toast was the only redeeming thing, but that’s hard to mess up. I grew up in this area and this a tourist trap for real
reviews.textTranslated: Kalau kamu pecinta kuliner, tempat ini benar-benar mengecewakan. Kuah mi-nya hambar sekali, kari ayamnya encer dan kurang mengesankan, dan minuman susu mawarnya yang manis terasa seperti susu murni. Roti bakar pandan kaya-nya adalah satu-satunya yang bisa menebusnya, tapi itu sulit untuk diabaikan. Saya tumbuh besar di daerah ini dan ini benar-benar jebakan turis.

reviews.author: Mandy Rajhans
reviews.text:
Went there after a 2 year hiatus and I was disappointed.  Positives: the curry puff and the sunrise drink.
Negatives the price of a tiny curry puff although tasty.  Wanted a nasi lemak but learned they give you a drizzle of sambal and if you want a full 1oz container you pay an extra dollar!!  Chicken jerky bun….huge disappointment!  2 tiny pieces of jerky in each bun.  $9.00 and all you taste is bread!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya kembali ke sana setelah absen selama 2 tahun dan saya kecewa. Hal positif: kue kari dan minuman sunrise.
Hal negatif: harga kue kari yang kecil meskipun rasanya enak. Saya ingin nasi lemak tetapi ternyata mereka hanya memberi sedikit sambal dan jika Anda ingin wadah sambal penuh (1 ons), Anda harus membayar tambahan satu dolar!! Roti isi dendeng ayam… sangat mengecewakan! Hanya ada 2 potong dendeng kecil di setiap roti. Harganya $9,00 dan yang terasa hanyalah roti!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Mandy!

We’re happy you came back : ) But are sorry to hear you were disappointed!
Our dishes are presented the same as they were 2 years ago, as we have always served nasi lemak with a side of sambal, and charged for an additional serving as it is a specialty sauce we work hard to make in house. For the chicken jerky bun as well, the bread is intended to be part of the highlight, since we bake it ourselves. Our intention is never to offend but fairly relate the quality and intention of our food to their cost.

We hope we can change your mind and see you again soon!

All the best,
KOPITEAM

reviews.author: Edith Pilaf
reviews.text: It is a special place with special flavors, kopi tarik, teh tarik, delicious kaya toast and soft runny eggs with lots of pepper. A place to get your fill of pandan. A place to try something new yet it always feels comforting. I kind of miss the coziness of their previous spot across the street many years ago, it was intimate and real, a great place to sit if you found a place, it got more popular but I’m not mad about it, I’m happy this type of particular place found a steady footing in the city for as many years as it has.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah tempat istimewa dengan cita rasa istimewa, kopi tarik, teh tarik, roti bakar kaya yang lezat, dan telur setengah matang lembut dengan banyak lada. Tempat untuk menikmati aroma pandan sepuasnya. Tempat untuk mencoba sesuatu yang baru namun selalu terasa nyaman. Saya agak merindukan kenyamanan tempat mereka sebelumnya di seberang jalan bertahun-tahun yang lalu, tempat itu intim dan otentik, tempat yang bagus untuk duduk jika Anda menemukan tempat kosong. Tempat itu menjadi lebih populer, tetapi saya tidak keberatan, saya senang tempat seperti ini tetap bertahan di kota selama bertahun-tahun.

reviews.author: Mark Lumerman
reviews.text: Some of the best wings in the city plus a great Nasi Lemak
reviews.textTranslated: Beberapa sayap ayam terbaik di kota ini ditambah Nasi Lemak yang lezat
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Mark, 

Thanks for stopping by and grabbing a meal with us, and for the review! The wings and Nasi Lemak are some of our favorites too :)! We welcome you back for a meal any time! Have a great rest of your week 😊!

reviews.author: MUHAMMAD ROBI ABDURAHMAN
reviews.text: Walk ins welcome policy provides incredible convenience for spontaneous appointments, and the complimentary drinks while waiting are always a pleasant surprise for customers! My nails always receive compliments after visiting this professionally managed salon.
reviews.textTranslated: Kebijakan penerimaan tanpa janji temu memberikan kemudahan luar biasa untuk janji temu spontan, dan minuman gratis selama menunggu selalu menjadi kejutan yang menyenangkan bagi pelanggan! Kuku saya selalu mendapat pujian setelah mengunjungi salon yang dikelola secara profesional ini.

reviews.author: zihao zhang
reviews.text: Good food
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak

reviews.author: Ricky Brown
reviews.text: It's ok. The salted toast for dessert was the best thing. Friendly staff!
reviews.textTranslated: Lumayan. Roti panggang asin untuk hidangan penutup adalah yang terbaik. Stafnya ramah!

reviews.author: Roovacka Shishkabab
reviews.text: The food was just OK, not great. Maybe even a bit below average. It's also overpriced for the location.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya biasa saja, tidak luar biasa. Bahkan mungkin sedikit di bawah rata-rata. Harganya juga terlalu mahal untuk lokasinya.

reviews.author: Sanjid
reviews.text: Soooo overpriced
reviews.textTranslated: Terlalu mahal sekali

reviews.author: Jacob McGinnis
reviews.text: Very good food, excellent drinks, no rush.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan sangat enak, minuman luar biasa, tidak terburu-buru.

reviews.author: Lauren Hoffmann
reviews.text:
My favorite cafe in NYC!! You heard me!!
-Everything is Delicious
-Friendly and knowledgeable staff
-Affordable
-Somany new things to try
-Allergen-friendly options!!
-So charming!!

I come here every time I’m in the area, and have brought many friends here that also gush at what a gem Kopitiam is. Keep up the magic!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kafe favoritku di NYC!! Kamu tidak salah dengar!!

-Semuanya Enak
-Staf ramah dan berpengetahuan
-Terjangkau
-Banyak hal baru untuk dicoba
-Pilihan ramah alergi!!

Sangat menawan!!

Aku datang ke sini setiap kali berada di daerah ini, dan telah mengajak banyak teman ke sini yang juga memuji betapa istimewanya Kopitiam. Teruslah pertahankan keajaibannya!!

reviews.author: Tuong Lukas
reviews.text: The food is very bland, one of the most disappointing places I have been to in NYC despite living here for 4 years now . Would never comeback
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat hambar, salah satu tempat paling mengecewakan yang pernah saya kunjungi di NYC meskipun sudah tinggal di sini selama 4 tahun. Saya tidak akan pernah kembali lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Tuong,

We’re sorry to hear you did not enjoy your food. Based off of your photo, you had the jerky bun and the fish ball soup- both of which are on the milder side of our menu. If you are looking for stronger flavors, we would definitely recommend our nasi lemak or the sambal sautéed waterspinach, both of which are cooked with our homemade sambal sauce. Besides adding heat, it’s an amazing savory flavor you can’t find anywhere else. In addition to those dishes, we have many more flavorful options- so we hope you’ll consider giving us another try! 🙏

reviews.author: Manuel Morrobel
reviews.text: Pay & order at counter, and find a spot to have your meal. Great choices, loved the Nasi Lemak  & Lobak. Highly recommend  to stop by.
reviews.textTranslated: Bayar & pesan di konter, lalu cari tempat untuk menikmati makanan Anda. Pilihannya banyak, saya suka Nasi Lemak & Lobak. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk mampir.

reviews.author: John Crandon
reviews.text: Super delicious and authentic food very very flavorful. I used to live in Indonesia and this is the type of cooking that we used to get every day.  They even have stinky beans. Things I have not seen in the US in a very long time
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang super lezat dan autentik, sangat kaya rasa. Saya pernah tinggal di Indonesia dan ini adalah jenis masakan yang biasa kami makan setiap hari. Mereka bahkan punya kacang bau. Hal-hal yang sudah lama tidak saya lihat di AS.

reviews.author: Jim Leung
reviews.text: Ordered take out.
reviews.textTranslated: Memesan makanan untuk dibawa pulang.

reviews.author: Carolina Ortiz
reviews.text: Really great servers very friendly and knowledgeable about the menu
reviews.textTranslated: Para pelayannya sangat ramah dan berpengetahuan luas tentang menu.

reviews.author: Marshall Shaffer
reviews.text: Thought toast and smaller plates were good. A little less impressed by mains, but that might also be in part because I found them tough to share in their small serving dishes.
reviews.textTranslated: Menurut saya roti panggang dan hidangan kecil lainnya enak. Sedikit kurang terkesan dengan hidangan utamanya, tapi mungkin itu juga karena saya merasa sulit untuk membaginya karena porsi sajinya yang kecil.

reviews.author: Christina W.
reviews.text:
The nice thing about this spot is they offer up a lot of traditional Malaysian dishes and the menu has a pretty decent selection. Food wise, it’s decent. There aren’t any frills but will say their toast was good. We couldn’t get the Hainese chicken since they sold out. Drinks aren’t bad either.

It’s quite an informal spot, you order up front and grab seating after. They do bring the food to you but it’s not your typical waiter service. Maybe because of the more casual nature and the crowd, the place doesn’t feel very cleanly. It can get kind of loud as well if there are larger groups. Some people do take up seating after they’re finished with their meal, so if you’re looking for a sit down spot, it’s just easier with a smaller group.
reviews.textTranslated:
Hal yang bagus dari tempat ini adalah mereka menawarkan banyak hidangan tradisional Malaysia dan menunya memiliki pilihan yang cukup beragam. Dari segi makanan, lumayan. Tidak ada yang istimewa, tetapi roti panggangnya enak. Kami tidak bisa mendapatkan ayam Hainan karena sudah habis. Minumannya juga tidak buruk.

Tempat ini cukup informal, Anda memesan di depan dan mencari tempat duduk setelahnya. Mereka memang mengantarkan makanan kepada Anda, tetapi bukan layanan pelayan yang biasa. Mungkin karena suasananya yang lebih santai dan ramainya pengunjung, tempat ini terasa kurang bersih. Tempat ini juga bisa agak berisik jika ada kelompok besar. Beberapa orang memang menempati tempat duduk setelah selesai makan, jadi jika Anda mencari tempat untuk duduk santai, akan lebih mudah jika datang dengan kelompok kecil.

reviews.author: Lisa FF
reviews.text: Good food for snacking. Nasi lemak. Drinks were awesome. Had the sunrise and moonlight.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang enak untuk camilan. Nasi lemak. Minumannya luar biasa. Menikmati matahari terbit dan bulan purnama.

reviews.author: Amanda Suhalim
reviews.text: Waited 40 minutes, they forgot the order, have to follow up
reviews.textTranslated: Menunggu 40 menit, mereka lupa pesanan, harus ditindaklanjuti.

reviews.author: Nazia Wolters
reviews.text: The atmosphere and food are just ok, service is great though. So are the drinks. Overall it's overpriced. Much better options are available in the city.
reviews.textTranslated: Suasana dan makanannya biasa saja, tetapi pelayanannya bagus. Minumannya juga enak. Secara keseluruhan harganya terlalu mahal. Ada banyak pilihan yang jauh lebih baik di kota ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Nazia,
Thank you for taking the time to try our restaurant. We’re so happy to hear that you enjoyed the drinks : )) We hope you’ll give our menu another chance to find something you love!

reviews.author: Michael Suarez
reviews.text: Poor quality. Undercooke food. Avoid. I d better go to other place. No value for money paid. Owner does not take care of workers
reviews.textTranslated: Kualitas buruk. Makanan kurang matang. Hindari. Lebih baik pergi ke tempat lain. Tidak sepadan dengan uang yang dibayarkan. Pemilik tidak memperhatikan pekerja.

reviews.author: Peter P.
reviews.text: I rarely write reviews but have to do it unfortunately. Avoid by all means. Poor quality service and food. Owner Kyo does not care about customers and food quality.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya jarang menulis ulasan, tetapi sayangnya harus melakukannya. Hindari tempat ini dengan segala cara. Pelayanan dan makanan berkualitas buruk. Pemiliknya, Kyo, tidak peduli dengan pelanggan dan kualitas makanan.

reviews.author: Chan Woo Park
reviews.text: Oyster omelette was good!
reviews.textTranslated: Omelet tiramnya enak!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Chan Woo,

We're glad you like our Oh Chien! Thanks for stopping by, and we hope you have a great day 👍!!

reviews.author: Nande Mohkp
reviews.text: It used to be passable. Now it's an unpleasant slog to eat your food and get out as fast as you can. But at least it didn't smell like toilet freshener like it did last time. Hainan chicken rice is good but I recall it used to come with rice boiled in chicken broth. Now it's coconut rice. Uncomfortable seating arrangement. Dirty tables. Boxes of supplies piled up in the middle of the space. Tiny paper napkins that are useless given the amount of oil they use in the food. Shabby, limp chopsticks that are barely useful. Staff are completely indifferent to anything. Feels like a fast food joint left to teenagers to run on the overnight shift, except late night BK or McD is guaranteed to be cleaner. This place has been coasting on reputation for years now.
reviews.textTranslated: Dulu lumayanlah. Sekarang makan di sana terasa tidak menyenangkan, hanya untuk makan dan segera keluar. Tapi setidaknya tidak berbau pengharum toilet seperti dulu. Nasi ayam Hainan enak, tapi saya ingat dulu disajikan dengan nasi yang dimasak dengan kaldu ayam. Sekarang nasi kelapa. Tata letak tempat duduk tidak nyaman. Meja kotor. Kotak-kotak persediaan menumpuk di tengah ruangan. Serbet kertas kecil yang tidak berguna mengingat banyaknya minyak yang digunakan dalam makanan. Sumpit lusuh dan lemas yang hampir tidak berguna. Staf sama sekali tidak peduli. Terasa seperti restoran cepat saji yang dikelola oleh remaja pada shift malam, kecuali BK atau McD larut malam dijamin lebih bersih. Tempat ini sudah mengandalkan reputasinya selama bertahun-tahun.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Nande,
We are sorry to hear that you feel this way about our restaurant.
For the Hainanese chicken rice, we give notice if we are serving it with coconut rice instead of the chicken fat rice.
We put a lot of love and care into all of our food, and we are sorry that you felt so poorly about your experience.

reviews.author: Samantha Y
reviews.text: Great breakfast. Did not like the coffee (might have just been made poorly that day) but the food is good. Kaya toast & pan mee (Soup version) were very good. The Palut panggang doesn’t have too much flavor but with the sambal it was tasty. I think it’s a great spot for unique breakfast - I would definitely come back
reviews.textTranslated: Sarapannya enak. Saya kurang suka kopinya (mungkin karena penyajiannya kurang baik hari itu), tapi makanannya enak. Kaya toast & pan mee (versi sup) sangat enak. Palut panggangnya kurang berasa, tapi dengan sambalnya terasa lezat. Menurut saya, tempat ini cocok untuk sarapan yang unik - saya pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Cody Wang
reviews.text: Food was life changing. Full stop. The "I don't know what I want" set for $39 is the best value in the city, hands down. You have to come hereeeeee, you won't regret it.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar mengubah hidup. Titik. Paket "Aku tidak tahu aku mau apa" seharga $39 adalah yang paling hemat di kota ini, tanpa diragukan lagi. Kamu harus datang ke sini, kamu tidak akan menyesal.

reviews.author: Judy Wong
reviews.text: This reminds me of a fast food restaurant. Order at the register. You had to order off a Q code, they didn’t have any menus. Seats are first come first serve so if you see a seat throw your jacket, bag or umbrella there to hold the seat. After you order the give you a number and someone brings you the foods. I found the food a little different from the Malaysian I’m use to and it left a little after taste in my mouth afterwards. You can get water if you ask them and take out containers if you have left over. And clean your space for the next person. Take your trash to the assigned area. I did 4 star instead of 3 because even though I found the food only ok, the Staff was nice but mainly because I wasn’t use to the type of restaurant it was an that’s more on me.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini mengingatkan saya pada restoran cepat saji. Pesan di kasir. Anda harus memesan menggunakan kode QR, mereka tidak punya menu.
