Tempat duduk tersedia berdasarkan siapa yang datang duluan, jadi jika Anda melihat tempat duduk kosong, letakkan jaket, tas, atau payung Anda di sana untuk memesan tempat duduk. Setelah memesan, mereka akan memberi Anda nomor dan seseorang akan membawakan makanan Anda. Saya merasa makanannya sedikit berbeda dari makanan Malaysia yang biasa saya makan dan meninggalkan sedikit rasa tidak enak di mulut saya setelahnya. Anda bisa mendapatkan air minum jika meminta dan membawa pulang wadah jika ada sisa makanan. Dan bersihkan tempat Anda untuk orang berikutnya. Buang sampah Anda ke tempat yang telah ditentukan. Saya memberi bintang 4, bukan 3, karena meskipun saya merasa makanannya biasa saja, stafnya ramah, tetapi terutama karena saya tidak terbiasa dengan jenis restoran seperti itu dan itu lebih karena kesalahan saya sendiri.

reviews.author: Kathleen Chan
reviews.text:
I had the following:

1. Silver Needle Rice Noodles in Claypot (瓦煲老鼠粉
Verdict: 1/5
Wasted my $20 on this dish. I expected a dish that’s packed full of flavor but instead it was bland and there were barely any ingredients in the dish except for a few morsels of mushroom and I don’t even know if there was any meat in it. It was 99% noodles and 1% ingredients. I wanted to take the dish back and ask for a refund but the Asian in me sucked it up and eat this dish cuz it’s so expensive. Ugh.

2. Kaya butter toast
Verdict: 4/5
Thick fluffy toast with a good amount of kaya. My only beef is that there’s not enough salted butter to balance out the sweetness.

3. Pan Mee Soup
Verdict: 4/5
The “kuay” is cooked perfectly with the right amount chewiness to it. The soup was so good packed full of flavor. The ikan bilis adds a really nice crunch and nutty flavor to the dish. My only beef was there’s not enough chilli padi in the condiments

4. Kopi
Verdict: 4/5
I ordered a Cham and a white coffee. It was the pick me up I needed. The coffee could have been stronger that it gives people anxiety from drinking it
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan menu berikut:

1. Mie Jagung Silver Needle dalam Panci Tanah Liat (瓦煲老鼠粉)
Penilaian: 1/5
Saya menghabiskan $20 untuk hidangan ini. Saya mengharapkan hidangan yang kaya rasa, tetapi ternyata hambar dan hampir tidak ada bahan lain selain beberapa potongan jamur, dan saya bahkan tidak yakin apakah ada daging di dalamnya. 99% mie dan 1% bahan lainnya. Saya ingin mengembalikan hidangan ini dan meminta pengembalian uang, tetapi naluri Asia saya memaksa saya untuk memakannya karena harganya sangat mahal. Aduh.

2. Roti Panggang Mentega Kaya
Penilaian: 4/5
Roti panggang tebal dan empuk dengan banyak mentega kaya. Satu-satunya keluhan saya adalah mentega asinnya kurang untuk menyeimbangkan rasa manisnya.

3. Sup Pan Mee
Penilaian: 4/5
Kuaynya dimasak dengan sempurna dengan kekenyalan yang pas. Supnya sangat enak dan kaya rasa. Ikan bilis menambahkan tekstur renyah dan rasa gurih yang sangat enak pada hidangan ini. Satu-satunya keluhan saya adalah kurangnya cabai rawit dalam bumbu pelengkapnya.

4. Kopi
Penilaian: 4/5
Saya memesan Cham dan kopi putih. Itu adalah minuman yang saya butuhkan untuk menyegarkan diri. Kopinya bisa lebih kuat agar tidak menimbulkan kecemasan saat meminumnya.

reviews.author: Lexus Lam (Lex)
reviews.text: This place was amazing! Will be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini luar biasa! Pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Camille Duperier
reviews.text: Delicious food, very salty though
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan lezat, meskipun sangat asin

reviews.author: Christopher Yip
reviews.text:
Love how the neighborhood is evolving but unfortunately the dishes here are a miss. We tried a variety of plates including the Chilled Spicy Sesame Noodles, Garlic Sauteed Waterspinach, Belachan Wings, and Kaya Butter Toast.

Only the wings and kaya toast were worth remembering. The flavors on the other dishes are MIA. Best of luck to the team.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya suka bagaimana lingkungan sekitar berkembang, tetapi sayangnya hidangan di sini mengecewakan. Kami mencoba berbagai macam hidangan termasuk Mi Wijen Pedas Dingin, Kangkung Tumis Bawang Putih, Sayap Belachan, dan Roti Panggang Kaya Mentega.

Hanya sayap ayam dan roti panggang kaya yang layak diingat. Rasa pada hidangan lainnya hilang begitu saja. Semoga sukses untuk timnya.

reviews.author: Miles
reviews.text:
We ordered the set menu with nasi lemak and half boiled eggs and kaya toast. A delicious combo, all made well, generous kaya filling which was stellar. We also ordered the hainanese chicken rice. The sambal and chili in these sets were great. Teh Tarik was tasty too.

The only down side was the pulut panggang. The photos are a bit deceptive where it is rich with shrimp filling. In reality, it is a very small, sometimes not even visible amount of shrimp filling, and 90% sticky rice.

It's a small place with not a lot of tables / seats so gets crowded quickly!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami memesan set menu dengan nasi lemak, telur setengah matang, dan roti bakar kaya. Kombinasi yang lezat, semuanya dimasak dengan sempurna, isian kaya yang melimpah, dan sungguh luar biasa. Kami juga memesan nasi ayam Hainan. Sambal dan cabai dalam set ini sangat lezat. Teh Tariknya juga lezat.

Satu-satunya kekurangannya adalah pulut panggangnya. Foto-fotonya agak menipu karena isinya banyak udang. Padahal, isinya udangnya sangat sedikit, terkadang bahkan tidak terlihat, dan 90% nasi ketannya.

Tempatnya kecil dan tidak banyak meja/kursi, jadi cepat penuh!

reviews.author: PHILLFS
reviews.text: This place is busy but still imbibes good vibes.  I  had a pastry and a sparkling tea, and both have satisfying flavors. The pastry had crispy crust and deep fried with a filling of curried potatoes.  This Malaysian version of the samosa is deliciously tasty, that is not overpowering.  I also had coffee and Hainanese chicken for  brunch.  Very delicious and  flavorful !
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini ramai, tetapi tetap memberikan suasana yang menyenangkan. Saya memesan kue kering dan teh bersoda, dan keduanya memiliki rasa yang memuaskan. Kue keringnya renyah dan digoreng dengan isian kentang kari. Samosa versi Malaysia ini sangat lezat, tidak terlalu kuat. Saya juga memesan kopi dan ayam Hainan untuk brunch. Sangat lezat dan beraroma!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Phillfs, 

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your meal and had such a positive experience with us, while enjoying all the flavors we have to offer. We hope to welcome you back soon for more delicious bites and good vibes. Have a great rest of your day! :)

reviews.author: Yu Yu
reviews.text:
The exterior and interior spaces are dirty. Trashes outside, sticky floor and sticky tables. Toilet was not so well kept.

The food was OK:
The char kuey teow was kinda sweet with no wok hei. The bean sprout is juicy though unlike the pho’s ones.

Pan mee was kinda sweet too. There were plenty of meat mushrooms and veges but it was not coming together.

The Pandan chicken was also too salty.

The Kaya toast is the one that is kinda nice.

I appreciate the great variety but nothing was extraordinary that I would make the effort to come back.

If I’m in the area again I might want to taste their tuk tuk mee and fish ball soup with glass noodle and vermicelli. Hopefully they will change my mind.
reviews.textTranslated:
Ruang luar dan dalam kotor. Sampah berserakan di luar, lantai dan meja lengket. Toiletnya kurang terawat.

Makanannya lumayan:
Char kuey teow-nya agak manis tanpa wok hei. Taugenya agak berair, tidak seperti pho.

Pan mee-nya juga agak manis. Ada banyak daging, jamur, dan sayuran, tetapi rasanya kurang pas.

Ayam pandannya juga terlalu asin.

Roti panggang kaya-nya lumayan enak.

Saya menghargai variasinya yang banyak, tetapi tidak ada yang istimewa sehingga saya akan berusaha untuk kembali lagi.

Jika saya ke daerah ini lagi, saya mungkin ingin mencoba tuk tuk mee dan sup bakso ikan dengan soun dan bihun. Semoga mereka berubah pikiran.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi,

Thank you for stopping by. We put a lot of heart, soul, and flavor into all of our dishes. No sugar is added to the pan mee or the char koay teow. The pan mee has a somewhat sweet flavor from the minced pork, but is overall salty and savory with the anchovy broth. The char koay teow has a sweetness from the sweet Chinese sausage, but is supposed to be salty as you said as it's cooked with pork lard. The fish ball noodle soup is definitely a good option for a more mild taste and the saltiness/spice level can be adjusted with the side of chili soy sauce. We sincerely hope you will return to give it a try.

reviews.author: Benjamin Kotton
reviews.text: Great casual Malaysian place with good food and drinks
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan kasual khas Malaysia yang enak dengan makanan dan minuman yang lezat.

reviews.author: Megan Chui
reviews.text:
I visited on a Sunday night and it was empty!
You order at the counter and they bring the food to your table. You clean your table/tray when you are finished.

I got the Nasi Lemak and it was really tasty, but the portions are pretty small. Prices are fine for the size of the dish, but I wouldn’t go here if I was super hungry. I really enjoyed the flavors in this dish- Malaysian food is new to me and this was a good introduction to the cuisine.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya berkunjung pada Minggu malam dan tempatnya kosong!
Anda memesan di konter dan mereka akan mengantarkan makanan ke meja Anda. Anda akan membersihkan meja/nampan Anda setelah selesai.

Saya memesan Nasi Lemak dan rasanya sangat lezat, tetapi porsinya agak kecil. Harganya cukup terjangkau untuk ukuran hidangan ini, tetapi saya tidak akan ke sana jika saya sangat lapar. Saya sangat menikmati cita rasa hidangan ini - masakan Malaysia adalah hal baru bagi saya dan ini merupakan pengantar yang baik untuk masakan ini.

reviews.author: L P
reviews.text: Most of the offerings are decent. Some dishes are great but I always find myself coming back for their kaya toast
reviews.textTranslated: Sebagian besar menunya lumayan. Beberapa hidangannya enak, tapi saya selalu kembali lagi untuk menikmati roti panggang kaya mereka.

reviews.author: Aliya Tang
reviews.text: Almost $10 for Kaya toast is insane...
reviews.textTranslated: Hampir $10 untuk roti panggang Kaya sungguh gila...

reviews.author: peter ong
reviews.text: I am disappointed with the coffee ... does not taste original malaysia coffee. The Kaya is good only but if they can do their own breads will be good.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya kecewa dengan kopinya... rasanya bukan kopi asli Malaysia. Kaya memang enak, tapi kalau mereka bisa membuat roti sendiri, pasti enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi,

Thank you for stopping by. We’re really glad to hear you liked the Kaya Jam! We make it in house, along with the bread it’s served on for the Kaya Butter Toast.
We’re sorry you didn’t like the coffee- it is shipped to us from Malaysia, and prepared according to our Baba Nyonya chef’s direction. We hope you’ll give us another try and find other dishes you enjoy!

reviews.author: Ab
reviews.text: Good tasting Malaysian food. I always get their fish noodles, idk why. The Nasi Lemak is also good, just wish they served it with chicken wings (which you could separately). Kaya Toast is phenomenal.
reviews.textTranslated: Mencicipi makanan Malaysia yang enak. Saya selalu mendapatkan mie ikan mereka, entah kenapa. Nasi Lemaknya juga enak, hanya saja mereka menyajikannya dengan sayap ayam (bisa terpisah). Kaya Toast sangat fenomenal.

reviews.author: vivi Chanle
reviews.text: This Malaysian restaurant didn’t really impress me. The food was very average—nothing stood out or felt particularly special. The interior was a bit messy and unorganized, which took away from the overall experience. If you care about a clean and comfortable dining environment, this might not be the right place for you.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran Malaysia ini tidak terlalu membuat saya terkesan. Makanannya sangat biasa saja—tidak ada yang istimewa atau terasa khusus. Interiornya agak berantakan dan tidak teratur, yang mengurangi pengalaman keseluruhan. Jika Anda mementingkan lingkungan makan yang bersih dan nyaman, ini mungkin bukan tempat yang tepat untuk Anda.

reviews.author: Attisaurus Rex
reviews.text:
So sad - this used to be one of our favorite kopitiams in nyc but it has gone completely downhill in the past year… the Kaya jam in the kaya toast had gone RANCID and had this awful chalky vomit-flavored aftertaste and when we told the staff they said ok and went back to playing on their phones. Didn’t care at all…
I’m not someone who really cares about service or atmosphere but wow guys this place is a dump - saw small roach like bugs on the floor and the tables are brown and caked in layers of food debris because no one is wiping down the tables between customers, and even the windows are splattered with old food stains from god knows when. Whyyyyyyyy???
Also instead of being greeted upon entering the staff barked us that they are cash or Venmo only because their machine is broken - which has been the case the last 3 times we’ve been here… like if you want to be a cash only place just be a cash only place??

Teh tarik is mediocre at best. There is so much better if you just go a few streets north. Never again for this place.
reviews.textTranslated:
Sedih sekali - dulu ini salah satu kopitiam favorit kami di New York City, tapi tahun lalu kondisinya benar-benar menurun drastis... selai Kaya di roti panggang Kaya-nya tengik dan ada sisa rasa kapur muntah yang mengerikan. Ketika kami memberi tahu staf, mereka bilang oke dan kembali bermain ponsel. Sama sekali tidak peduli...
Saya bukan orang yang peduli dengan pelayanan atau suasana, tapi wow, teman-teman, tempat ini kumuh - melihat serangga kecil seperti kecoa di lantai dan meja-mejanya cokelat dan dipenuhi sisa makanan karena tidak ada yang membersihkan meja di antara pelanggan, dan bahkan jendelanya berlumuran noda makanan lama entah dari kapan. Kenapaaaaaaa???
Alih-alih disambut saat masuk, staf malah membentak kami bahwa mereka hanya menerima pembayaran tunai atau Venmo karena mesinnya rusak - yang sudah terjadi 3 kali terakhir kami ke sini... seperti kalau mau jadi tempat yang hanya menerima pembayaran tunai, ya jadilah tempat yang hanya menerima pembayaran tunai??

Teh tariknya biasa saja. Jauh lebih baik jika Anda pergi beberapa jalan ke utara. Jangan pernah kembali ke tempat ini lagi.

reviews.author: Paulina Posada
reviews.text: A small and self-service restaurant, serves traditional Malaysian dishes. I highly recommend the Criss Cross ‘Shrooms!
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran kecil swalayan ini menyajikan hidangan tradisional Malaysia. Saya sangat merekomendasikan Criss Cross ‘Shrooms!

reviews.author: Louis Nghiem
reviews.text: Food was ok. Nothing memorable when compared to other foods across asia. Value is definitely pretty bad. Even after spending $40+ I was still hungry and ate a slice of pizza after.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan. Tidak ada yang istimewa dibandingkan dengan makanan lain di Asia. Harganya memang agak buruk. Bahkan setelah menghabiskan $40+, saya masih lapar dan makan sepotong pizza setelahnya.

reviews.author: Brianna Parcell
reviews.text: Good! Wish I tried more things and also wish I ate pork and could try more things. Just got the Nasi Lemak. Super good, a little dry/undercooked rice but I know nothing about Malaysian cuisine so maybe that’s just how it is! Loved it otherwise and would comeback!
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus! Andai saja aku bisa mencoba lebih banyak hal, dan juga ingin makan daging babi agar bisa mencoba lebih banyak hal. Baru saja mencoba Nasi Lemak. Enak sekali, nasinya agak kering/kurang matang, tapi aku tidak tahu apa-apa tentang masakan Malaysia, jadi mungkin memang begitulah! Aku suka sekali dan akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Anyka Chakravarty
reviews.text: Loved our coffee - we tried the iced Salted Bek-Kopi and Hor KaShai as well as the "Kopitiam Classics" set menu. Good value for money and was a great selection
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sangat menyukai kopi kami - kami mencoba Bek-Kopi Asin dingin dan Hor KaShai serta menu set "Kopitiam Classics". Harganya terjangkau dan pilihannya sangat banyak.

reviews.author: Ernest Lee
reviews.text: Food is fine but a little expensive - bak kut teh fairly authentic, tea in uncanny valley
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak tapi agak mahal - bak kut tehnya cukup otentik, tehnya terasa aneh sekali.

reviews.author: alfibert
reviews.text: Honestly one of my favorite spots, with friends or on your own. The food and coffee are so good and feels like home.
reviews.textTranslated: Jujur, ini salah satu tempat favoritku, baik bersama teman maupun sendirian. Makanan dan kopinya enak banget dan terasa seperti di rumah.

reviews.author: Lisa Williams
reviews.text: Passing by and have always wanted to try it. Took it home to Brooklyn, but the char kway teow was still warm and delicious. Decent char and really flavorful. Also got some ondeh ondeh that didn't make it home...honeycomb cake was also delicious.  I didn't love the morning glory sticky rice, but I chalk it up to preference. Really tasty and cool and casual atmosphere.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya kebetulan lewat dan selalu ingin mencobanya. Saya membawanya pulang ke Brooklyn, dan char kway teow-nya masih hangat dan enak. Bagian luarnya agak gosong dan rasanya sangat lezat. Saya juga membeli ondeh-ondeh yang tidak sempat saya bawa pulang... kue sarang lebahnya juga enak. Saya kurang suka nasi ketan kangkungnya, tapi itu mungkin hanya masalah selera. Suasananya sangat enak, keren, dan santai.

reviews.author: BackpackingAndy
reviews.text: Cozy Malay place to eat and get traditional Malaysian coffe (kopi). Definitely worth it and a great spot for a date or a quick bite to eat. Seems very youthful snd student friendly
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan khas Melayu yang nyaman dan kopi tradisional Malaysia. Sangat layak dikunjungi dan cocok untuk kencan atau makan cepat. Suasananya sangat muda dan ramah mahasiswa.

reviews.author: Sofie Michalak
reviews.text: The wood ear mushrooms changed my life
reviews.textTranslated: Jamur kuping kayu mengubah hidupku.

reviews.author: Libby Armon
reviews.text: Nice array of savory and sweet Malaysian dishes to try. Highly recommend going with a few people to do a tapas style spread. The store is a bit small so seating at peak times can be a challenge. The pastries in the front counter display are very good
reviews.textTranslated: Beragam pilihan hidangan Malaysia gurih dan manis yang patut dicoba. Sangat disarankan untuk datang bersama beberapa orang untuk menikmati hidangan ala tapas. Tokonya agak kecil sehingga tempat duduk di jam sibuk bisa jadi sulit. Kue-kue di etalase depan sangat enak.

reviews.author: Caroline VOS
reviews.text:
We recently visited Kopitiam and tried their Kopitiam Classics Set Menu for $27, and it was a fantastic experience! The set includes nasi lemak, kaya butter toast, Malaysian-style half-boiled eggs, and a choice of drink (we opted for the black coffee).

The food was delicious, and the highlight for us was definitely the Malaysian-style half-boiled eggs—perfectly soft and flavorful. The kaya butter toast was also a standout, with just the right balance of sweetness and creaminess. The nasi lemak was hearty and satisfying, rounding out the meal. As for the coffee, it was rich and bold, a great complement to the food.

Overall, the Kopitiam Classics Set Menu is a great value for a well-rounded and authentic Malaysian experience. Highly recommend for anyone looking to enjoy a taste of traditional Malaysian flavors!
reviews.textTranslated:
Baru-baru ini kami mengunjungi Kopitiam dan mencoba Set Menu Kopitiam Classics seharga $27, dan itu pengalaman yang fantastis! Set tersebut termasuk nasi lemak, roti panggang mentega kaya, telur setengah matang ala Malaysia, dan pilihan minuman (kami memilih kopi hitam).

Makanannya lezat, dan yang paling menonjol bagi kami adalah telur setengah matang ala Malaysia—sangat lembut dan beraroma. Roti panggang mentega kaya juga luar biasa, dengan keseimbangan rasa manis dan creamy yang pas. Nasi lemaknya mengenyangkan dan memuaskan, melengkapi hidangan. Sedangkan untuk kopinya, kaya dan kuat, sangat cocok dengan makanannya.

Secara keseluruhan, Set Menu Kopitiam Classics adalah pilihan yang sangat berharga untuk pengalaman kuliner Malaysia yang lengkap dan otentik. Sangat direkomendasikan bagi siapa pun yang ingin menikmati cita rasa tradisional Malaysia!

reviews.author: Kiariladyboss
reviews.text:
I went to Kopitiam with a friend in a Friday evening and we both enjoyed the food. We tried the cold sesame noodles and the mushroom coconut rice. Flavorful!!!

I don’t usually have Malesian food so this was a great discovery!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya pergi ke Kopitiam bersama seorang teman pada Jumat malam dan kami berdua menikmati makanannya. Kami mencoba mie wijen dingin dan nasi kelapa jamur. Rasanya enak sekali!!!

Saya biasanya tidak makan makanan Malaysia jadi ini adalah penemuan yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Sonia Siaw
reviews.text: Although I was expecting the boiled version of the wontons, it was still a pretty good "Tok Tok Mee". Kopitiam has always been one of my go to place whenever I am craving for some Malaysian eats.
reviews.textTranslated: Meskipun saya mengharapkan pangsit rebus, "Tok Tok Mee"-nya tetap cukup enak. Kopitiam selalu menjadi salah satu tempat favorit saya setiap kali saya menginginkan makanan Malaysia.

reviews.author: Christopher Meron
reviews.text: Awesome authentic eatery. Order at the counter, take a number and sit. Gets really crowded at peak times. Cold noodles and wings are both amazing. Very very good food. Atmosphere is great as a street food place, boxes around, bare bones tables. Fun place to eat amazing food and head out. Not a place to mess around or linger. Serious eaters only. 😉
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan otentik yang luar biasa. Pesan di konter, ambil nomor, dan duduk. Sangat ramai pada jam sibuk. Mie dingin dan sayap ayamnya sama-sama enak. Makanannya sangat enak. Suasananya bagus sebagai tempat makan kaki lima, kotak-kotak berserakan, meja-meja sederhana. Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk makan makanan enak dan langsung pergi. Bukan tempat untuk berlama-lama atau bersantai. Hanya untuk penikmat makanan sejati. 😉

reviews.author: Ann
reviews.text: Disappointing. Was hoping for some good Malayan food, but it was very average, the anchovies in the nasi lemak were dry and not crunchy, chicken of questionable quality, dishes are small for the price, also considering that they do not offer table service, the place was dirty and untidy with a funny smell, won’t repeat.
reviews.textTranslated: Mengecewakan. Berharap bisa mendapatkan makanan Melayu yang enak, tetapi rasanya sangat biasa saja, ikan teri dalam nasi lemaknya kering dan tidak renyah, ayamnya kualitasnya dipertanyakan, porsinya kecil untuk harganya, juga mengingat mereka tidak menyediakan layanan meja, tempatnya kotor dan tidak rapi dengan bau yang aneh, tidak akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Erica Delgado
reviews.text: Was craving for kaya toast and this restaurant came up. We liked everything, although I prefer the traditional kaya (coconut) and not the pandan flaviored one. The drinks in plastic pouches reminded me of how drinks are packed in SEA when I was a kid. Will be back to try their other dishes.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat ingin makan roti panggang kaya dan restoran ini muncul. Kami menyukai semuanya, meskipun saya lebih menyukai kaya (kelapa) tradisional dan bukan yang rasa pandan. Minuman dalam kantong plastik mengingatkan saya pada cara minuman dikemas di Asia Tenggara saat saya masih kecil. Saya akan kembali untuk mencoba hidangan mereka yang lain.

reviews.author: techin kraikhajornkitti
reviews.text: Very interesting cuisine, cosy and delicious
reviews.textTranslated: Masakan yang sangat menarik, nyaman dan lezat

reviews.author: corenzo wilkerson
reviews.text: Tasty little casual spot. There credit machine was acting up so you have to use Venmo or cash app. But other than that it's a super relaxing 😌 spot. The food is appealing to look at and to taste. The portion size is good you will fill full after you finish. The wings are super delicious 😋. The tok Tok mee was good and the Street Style Oyster Noodles were super flavorful. The broth just blows you away. For drinks we hd the Lychee Bandung (Iced) and it hits the spot.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat santai kecil yang enak. Mesin kartu kredit mereka agak bermasalah jadi Anda harus menggunakan Venmo atau Cash App. Tapi selain itu, tempatnya sangat santai 😌. Makanannya menarik dilihat dan rasanya enak. Porsinya pas, Anda akan kenyang setelah selesai makan. Sayap ayamnya sangat lezat 😋. Tok Tok mee-nya enak dan mie tiram ala jalanannya sangat gurih. Kuahnya benar-benar luar biasa. Untuk minuman, kami memesan Lychee Bandung (Es) dan rasanya pas sekali.

reviews.author: ZQ Zhao
reviews.text: Good food
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak

reviews.author: Kronic Care
reviews.text: Support locally owned and small shops .keep fight and servicing the community.
reviews.textTranslated: Dukunglah toko-toko lokal dan kecil. Teruslah berjuang dan layani masyarakat.

reviews.author: Kira “NYC foodie”
reviews.text: The portions are so small and the price charged is outrageous for the fast food type service provided. There are tons of better quality restaurants that serve the same cuisine.
reviews.textTranslated: Porsinya sangat kecil dan harganya sangat mahal untuk layanan ala makanan cepat saji. Ada banyak restoran berkualitas lebih baik yang menyajikan masakan yang sama.

reviews.author: T M
reviews.text: Food was okay, not enough meat.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan, tapi dagingnya kurang.

reviews.author: Subash Chellappan
reviews.text: My favorite Malaysian restaurant in the city.  Nasi lemak, Roti Kaya, and Teh Tarik are my go to options here
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran Malaysia favorit saya di kota ini. Nasi Lemak, Roti Kaya, dan Teh Tarik adalah pilihan favorit saya di sini.

reviews.author: Leon Yeap
reviews.text: Terrible Malaysian food that caters to people who don’t know what real Malaysian food tastes like. Wonton mee was cold, small, hard wontons, hard two+ day old cold hard pork, grocery store bought dry noodles, packaged sauce from h mart probably.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Malaysia yang mengerikan, ditujukan untuk orang-orang yang tidak tahu seperti apa rasa makanan Malaysia yang sebenarnya. Wonton mee-nya dingin, pangsitnya kecil dan keras, daging babinya keras dan sudah berumur dua hari lebih, mie keringnya dibeli dari supermarket, dan sausnya mungkin dari H Mart.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Leon, 

Thanks for paying us a visit, and we're sorry to hear that your experience wasn't the best. We want to take this chance and clarify that our sauces are all made in-house, and every dish is made hot to order :)! Although we can't control the chilly weather recently, we made sure to promptly replace your wontons for you to address the issue. We hope you give us another try in the future. Wishing you happy holidays!

reviews.author: Gigi
reviews.text: Muah chee was freshly made! Best item
reviews.textTranslated: Muah chee-nya baru dibuat! Menu terbaik.

reviews.author: Xiaolan You
reviews.text: I really wanted to like this place but the Teh C was watery, lukewarm, and had little flavor.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sungguh ingin menyukai tempat ini tetapi Teh C-nya encer, hangat, dan kurang berasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Xiaolan,

Thank you for visiting us! We’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet your expectations. We take great care in preparing our drinks fresh and piping hot, including your Teh C of course! However, after you asked us to charge your phone, we noticed that some time had passed before you were able to enjoy your tea, which may have caused it to cool down and affected the flavor.

We’d love another chance to serve you and provide a more flavorful experience that's more akin to us. Thank you for your support, and we hope you have a wonderful rest of your week! :)

reviews.author: Harvey Liu
reviews.text: Coffee is expensive.  Condensed milk shouldn’t jack up cost to $6 for a cup of coffee.  Will stick to Chinese bakery coffee.  Cute place though
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi itu mahal. Susu kental manis seharusnya tidak menaikkan harga hingga $6 untuk secangkir kopi. Akan tetap pesan kopi dari toko roti Cina. Tapi tempatnya lucu.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Harvey,

Thank you for your feedback! We’re so glad you enjoyed the aesthetic of our shop. Our coffee is a bit more specialized—it’s shipped directly from Malaysia and roasted using a traditional process with sugar, salt, butter, and charcoal to create its rich, distinctive flavor. This method does add to the cost, but it allows us to bring an authentic taste of Malaysia stateside for more to enjoy. We hope you’ll visit us again soon. Have a wonderful week!

reviews.author: tait berwick
reviews.text: Love this place! Menu is creative and fairly priced. Food feels fresh and authentic. Delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget tempat ini! Menunya kreatif dan harganya terjangkau. Makanannya terasa segar dan autentik. Lezat.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Tait, 

Thanks so much for stopping by and leaving us a review! We're happy to hear you enjoyed our food :)! We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another great experience. Have a wonderful rest of your week! :)

reviews.author: Sharon Gao
reviews.text:
Kopitiam is exceptional for what it is- quick and reliable comfort food with extensive appetizer, dessert, AND drink menus. I ordered 3 of those sunrise drinks man it’s that good. Fairly priced, cozy atmosphere for dine in, flavorful food, and thoughtful menu items- even for someone who often find dishes to taste generically bland. Only complaint is the online menu layout can seem a little confusing so I recommend looking through the Grubhub menu, which also has pictures.
One of the best South East Asian restaurants in NYC so far. Such a breath of fresh air among many mediocre and generic restaurants even above this price range.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopitiam luar biasa untuk apa adanya—hidangan nyaman yang cepat dan andal dengan menu lengkap, mulai dari hidangan pembuka, hidangan penutup, hingga minuman. Saya memesan 3 minuman Sunrise itu, sungguh nikmat. Harganya cukup terjangkau, suasananya nyaman untuk makan di tempat, makanannya lezat, dan menu-menunya yang penuh pertimbangan—bahkan untuk seseorang yang sering merasa hidangannya hambar. Satu-satunya keluhan adalah tata letak menu online-nya agak membingungkan, jadi saya sarankan untuk melihat menu Grubhub, yang juga dilengkapi gambar.
Salah satu restoran Asia Tenggara terbaik di NYC sejauh ini. Sungguh menyegarkan di antara banyak restoran biasa-biasa saja dan generik, bahkan di atas kisaran harga ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Sharon,

Thank you so much for your review, and for continuously supporting us! We're glad you enjoyed our sunrise drink-- this was actually created in house by one of our staff members! Your kind words about our food definitely made our day. 

Thanks for also bringing to us the issue about the online menu-- we'll try to work around and fix the layout, but we're unfortunately a little limited in terms of design. We welcome you back any time you're craving Malaysian food. Have an amazing rest of your day :)!

reviews.author: Elaine Fung
reviews.text:
Owner Kyo is super friendly! Food is authentic and “home” reciped. I appreciate that each ingredients are housemade and put into her heart to make it.

Super surprised w such high quality milk tea and one of a kind Kaya toast! Must try!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Pemiliknya, Kyo, sangat ramah! Makanannya autentik dan dimasak di rumah. Saya sangat menghargai setiap bahannya yang dibuat sendiri dan dicurahkan sepenuh hati.

Sangat terkejut dengan teh susu berkualitas tinggi dan roti panggang Kaya yang unik! Wajib dicoba!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Elaine, 

Thank you for having a meal with us, and for your kind words about Kyo! She is more than happy to chat with guests! 

It means a lot to us that you enjoy our traditional familial recipes! We use tea imported from Malaysia and the Kaya Toast is a true labor of love item 💖! Please visit us again to try some of our other dishes :)! We hope you have an amazing rest of your week!

reviews.author: Minjo Mok
reviews.text: I've never visited a malaysian cafe before. Visited with a friend, got chocolate malt drink (?) And toast with pistacio/avocado(?) Butter. It was so so good
reviews.textTranslated: Saya belum pernah ke kafe Malaysia sebelumnya. Berkunjung bersama teman, memesan minuman malt cokelat (?) dan roti panggang dengan mentega pistachio/alpukat (?). Rasanya sungguh enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Minjo,

Thanks so much for giving us a try! We’re so happy to hear we delivered on your expectations as your first Malaysian café experience :) The chocolate malt drink you enjoyed was most likely our Milo drink—it’s truly a chocolate lover’s dream! Our kaya toast is made with pandan leaves and coconut milk, which gives it a unique depth, similar to a pistachio or avocado spread.

We’d love to welcome you back to try even more items from our menu. Have a great day! ✨

reviews.author: Maia Conlon
reviews.text: Duck tongue was incredibly delicious and flavorful. I almost ordered a second to go!
reviews.textTranslated: Lidah bebeknya sangat lezat dan kaya rasa. Saya hampir memesan yang kedua untuk dibawa pulang!

reviews.author: Kevin Y
reviews.text: Small portion, a bit overpriced but the food taste good.
reviews.textTranslated: Porsi kecil, agak kemahalan tapi rasa makanannya enak.

reviews.author: Yiguang Yang
reviews.text: Very very good restaurant.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran yang sangat sangat bagus.

reviews.author: Flora Huang
reviews.text: 0/10 restaurant…walk out immediately cuz of the bad smell 🤮🤮🤮🤢🤢🤢
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran 0/10…langsung keluar karena baunya tidak sedap 🤮🤮🤮🤢🤢🤢

reviews.author: nicholas pedro
reviews.text: The anchovies are not crispy enough; these use anchovies from Korea, so they need to be fried in very hot oil to become crispy and not tough. The rice is fragrant enough... the coffee is good..
reviews.textTranslated: Ikan terinya kurang renyah; mereka menggunakan ikan teri dari Korea, jadi perlu digoreng dalam minyak yang sangat panas agar renyah dan tidak keras. Nasinya cukup harum... kopinya enak...

reviews.author: Allison
reviews.text: Found a large piece of black plastic swimming in the noodles, looks like part of their cooking handle broke off. Messaged them about the safety hazard and never gotten a response
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menemukan sepotong besar plastik hitam mengambang di dalam mi, sepertinya bagian dari gagang alat masak mereka patah. Saya mengirim pesan kepada mereka tentang bahaya keselamatan ini tetapi tidak pernah mendapat balasan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Allison,

Thank you for dining with us, and we apologize that you didn't have a great experience. 

Our kitchen only uses metal utensils, so it’s unusual for any plastic to end up in our dishes. If you ordered takeout, it’s possible a piece from the container could have accidentally broken off during delivery and mixed into the food. It seems we didn't receive your message, but we'd love to help resolve any other concerns you may have. Please reach out to us at hello@kopitiamnyc.com so we may address any other issues. Thank you for your feedback, and we hope you have a great rest of your week :)!

reviews.author: Oda Kawoi
reviews.text: Somewhat bland. Not the cleanest either. Staff is nice.
reviews.textTranslated: Agak hambar. Tidak terlalu bersih juga. Stafnya ramah.

reviews.author: Lily Yeung
reviews.text:
This place has definitely lost its charm. Years ago it was very popular spot for date night, family meals, solo meals or catching up with friends.

Now, it's become very messy and a bit depressing to eat here. The food is edible, but subpar and overpriced.

The service is poor, you order and pay at the counter. They only bring the food to the table, but do not offer water nor wipe the tables after someone leaves.

This time the door was open because someone was painting the doorway (?) so you could smell cigarette smoke from outside. Inside, one of the staff loudly ripped tape to seal one of their many cardboard boxes out in the open.

The place isn't very clean - there were flies that flew into my food 🤮

Go elsewhere!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat ini benar-benar kehilangan pesonanya. Bertahun-tahun yang lalu, tempat ini sangat populer untuk kencan, makan bersama keluarga, makan sendirian, atau berkumpul dengan teman-teman.

Sekarang, tempat ini menjadi sangat berantakan dan agak menyedihkan untuk makan di sini. Makanannya memang bisa dimakan, tetapi kualitasnya di bawah standar dan harganya terlalu mahal.

Pelayanannya buruk, Anda memesan dan membayar di konter. Mereka hanya mengantarkan makanan ke meja, tetapi tidak menawarkan air minum atau membersihkan meja setelah pelanggan pergi.

Kali ini pintunya terbuka karena seseorang sedang mengecat pintu masuk (?) sehingga Anda bisa mencium bau asap rokok dari luar. Di dalam, salah satu staf dengan keras merobek selotip untuk menutup salah satu dari banyak kotak kardus mereka di tempat terbuka.

Tempatnya tidak terlalu bersih - ada lalat yang terbang ke makanan saya 🤮

Pergi ke tempat lain saja!!

reviews.author: Yev Yak
reviews.text: The quintessential hole-in-the-wall spot - off the beaten path! I’ve only had Malaysian food a handful of times, but the food here set the bar HIGH. Ever since I came here, I have been comparing the dishes to other Malaysian restaurants (Penang, PapaRich) and there is no comparison. The quality and flavor of the food at Kopitiam is way better. However, there is a trade off… don’t expect to be comfortable when you eat here. I came in the middle of summer and there was no AC and tons of flies. It definitely didn’t feel sanitary, but the food was great. If I were to go again, I would get it to-go instead of eating in.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan sederhana yang khas - jauh dari keramaian! Saya hanya beberapa kali mencoba makanan Malaysia, tetapi makanan di sini menetapkan standar yang sangat tinggi. Sejak datang ke sini, saya selalu membandingkan hidangannya dengan restoran Malaysia lainnya (Penang, PapaRich) dan tidak ada perbandingan. Kualitas dan rasa makanan di Kopitiam jauh lebih baik. Namun, ada konsekuensinya… jangan berharap nyaman saat makan di sini. Saya datang di tengah musim panas dan tidak ada AC serta banyak lalat. Rasanya tidak higienis, tetapi makanannya enak. Jika saya datang lagi, saya akan memesan untuk dibawa pulang daripada makan di tempat.

reviews.author: WSINW
reviews.text: Y'all should figure out how to get rid of the flies. Food was otherwise good. Kopi Tarik was too bland.
reviews.textTranslated: Kalian harus mencari cara untuk menyingkirkan lalat-lalat itu. Makanan lainnya enak. Kopi Tariknya terlalu hambar.

reviews.author: ha ngan le
reviews.text: Ive never had malaysian food before and this place singlehandedly make me obsessed 🥹🥹 underrated cuisine likeee the food is so yummy and flavorful and COMPLEX. Writing what we ordered in the photo captions — perfect food to share with a group. I wanna try the whole menu tehee all the dish sounds so fun. My favorite so far is oh chien!
reviews.textTranslated: Aku belum pernah mencoba makanan Malaysia sebelumnya dan tempat ini saja sudah membuatku ketagihan 🥹🥹 Masakan yang diremehkan, padahal makanannya enak, kaya rasa, dan kompleks. Tuliskan apa yang kami pesan di keterangan foto — makanan yang sempurna untuk dinikmati bersama teman-teman. Aku ingin mencoba semua menunya, hehe, semua hidangannya terdengar sangat menarik. Favoritku sejauh ini adalah Oh Chien!

reviews.author: Javier Kohen
reviews.text: Good Malaysian food, with a few different options. Good for a quick meal, the place is always full and there isn't time or space to hang out long. The staff is friendly, but stays out of the way, so it's mostly self service.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Malaysia yang lezat, dengan beberapa pilihan berbeda. Cocok untuk makan cepat, tempatnya selalu penuh dan tidak ada waktu atau ruang untuk nongkrong lama. Stafnya ramah, tetapi tidak mengganggu, jadi sebagian besar layanannya adalah layanan mandiri.

reviews.author: Aaron Thacker
reviews.text: I recently visited Kopitiam and had a pretty good experience. I tried the vegan criss cross shrooms, and they were tasty with a unique flavor. The kaya toast had a nice pandan taste and was worth trying. Some dishes like the Oh Chien were too salty, and the Chee Cheong Fun was a bit bland. The service was fast, but finding a seat can be tricky.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya baru-baru ini mengunjungi Kopitiam dan mendapatkan pengalaman yang cukup menyenangkan. Saya mencoba jamur silang vegan, dan rasanya lezat dengan cita rasa yang unik. Roti panggang kaya memiliki rasa pandan yang lezat dan patut dicoba. Beberapa hidangan seperti Oh Chien terlalu asin, dan Chee Cheong Fun agak hambar. Pelayanannya cepat, tetapi mencari tempat duduk bisa jadi sulit.

reviews.author: Ryan Chan
reviews.text: Ban mian for $17 is seriously way too expensive. Every other store prices things so much more reasonably. Also was it so hard to print out a paper menu at the counter?
reviews.textTranslated: Ban mian seharga $17 benar-benar terlalu mahal. Toko-toko lain mematok harga jauh lebih wajar. Lagipula, sesulit apa mencetak menu kertas di kasir?

reviews.author: Tiffany V
reviews.text:
4.5/5 Kaya Toast -- thick sliced bread, super coconut-y smooth kaya!
4.5/5 Char Kway Teow - great stir fry sear on the noodles, generous ingredients, just spicy enough. So good!
3.5/5 Kuih Talam -- good texture but much saltier than the typical kuih
3/5 Milo French Toast -- super fluffy bread, a bit too burnt for us. Also wish it had more milo flavor more reminiscent a milo dinosaur drink. Would consider ordering the PB version next time.
reviews.textTranslated:
4.5/5 Roti Panggang Kaya -- roti iris tebal, kaya kelapa yang sangat lembut!
4.5/5 Char Kway Teow - tumisannya enak, bahan-bahannya banyak, cukup pedas. Enak banget!
3.5/5 Kuih Talam -- teksturnya bagus tapi jauh lebih asin daripada kuih biasa
3/5 Milo French Toast -- rotinya sangat empuk, agak gosong untuk kami. Juga berharap rasanya lebih seperti Milo, lebih mengingatkan pada minuman Milo Dinosaur. Akan mempertimbangkan untuk memesan versi selai kacang lain kali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Tiffany, thank you so much for stopping by and giving our items a try! Amazing photo taken highlighting the dishes you ordered. We do hope you'll visit again in the future to try our other kuihs we have :)

reviews.author: Flora Liu
reviews.text: Got the spicy sesame noodles which promised a sesame sauce but it was more like a bit of regular chilli oil sitting on top of a liquid that resembled dishwater… I definitely wouldn’t call it a sauce. Super disappointing especially as there aren’t many vegetarian options, you’d hope the one they do have is alright. Nothing else in the dish really redeemed it. Ate it all because I was starving and immediately felt sick and wish I had left it. Would love to try their desserts but this experience really put me off.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan mi wijen pedas yang menjanjikan saus wijen, tapi ternyata lebih seperti sedikit minyak cabai biasa yang dituang ke dalam cairan yang mirip air cucian piring... Saya sama sekali tidak akan menyebutnya saus. Sangat mengecewakan, terutama karena tidak banyak pilihan vegetarian, padahal yang mereka sediakan lumayan. Tidak ada lagi yang bisa menggantikannya. Saya menghabiskan semuanya karena lapar dan langsung merasa mual dan ingin meninggalkannya. Saya ingin sekali mencoba hidangan penutup mereka, tetapi pengalaman ini benar-benar membuat saya kecewa.

reviews.author: Isabelle J
reviews.text: One of my fav southeast Asian restaurants in NYC! Big fan of the Kaya toast, the pandas cream is so good! Also delicious morning glory and curry laksa.
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu restoran Asia Tenggara favorit saya di New York City! Saya penggemar berat roti panggang Kaya, krim panda-nya enak sekali! Morning glory dan laksa karinya juga lezat.

reviews.author: Sean Lewis
reviews.text: I went to Kopitiam and really liked the food. The vegan criss cross shrooms had a unique flavor and I would order them again. The main dish I tried was a bit too fishy, but the kaya toast was decent. Service was fast and the staff was nice, but seating was a bit hard to find. Prices are reasonable and I will visit again.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi ke Kopitiam dan sangat menyukai makanannya. Jamur vegan berbentuk silang memiliki rasa yang unik dan saya akan memesannya lagi. Hidangan utama yang saya coba agak terlalu amis, tetapi roti bakar kaya-nya lumayan. Pelayanannya cepat dan stafnya ramah, tetapi tempat duduk agak sulit ditemukan. Harganya wajar dan saya akan berkunjung lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Sean, 
Thank you for your feedback! We're thrilled you enjoyed the vegan criss cross shrooms (a fan favorite) and found our service quick and friendly. We appreciate your input on the main dish and seating, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon :)! Have a great weekend!

reviews.author: Raven Blackhart
reviews.text: Authentic Malaysian Food… but not the most flavourful or well-made. Not exactly a good representation of flavours you will actually find in proper Malaysian food
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Malaysia otentik… tapi tidak terlalu beraroma atau dibuat dengan baik. Bukan representasi yang baik dari cita rasa yang sebenarnya akan Anda temukan dalam makanan Malaysia yang sesungguhnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Raven, 
Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We're sorry to hear that the flavors didn't fully meet your expectations :( and we appreciate your honest feedback! We'll try our best to continue improving and aim to provide a more authentic experience on your next visit :)! Enjoy the rest of your night!

reviews.author: Paige C
reviews.text: A good classic kopitiam style breakfast. We got the penang white curry mee, nasi lemak, and some drinks. The nasi lemak was good - maybe could do with a bit more sambal, but was good for the price. The curry mee was delicious with two types of noodles and a great broth. The kopi tarik and calamansi-ade were also great to pair with our meals. Kopitiam overall is a great place to get a malay breakfast without having to travel across the world for it.
reviews.textTranslated: Sarapan ala kopitiam klasik yang enak. Kami memesan mie kari putih Penang, nasi lemak, dan beberapa minuman. Nasi lemaknya enak - mungkin bisa ditambahkan sedikit sambal lagi, tapi sesuai dengan harganya. Mie karinya lezat dengan dua jenis mie dan kuah yang nikmat. Kopi tarik dan calamansi-ade juga cocok dipadukan dengan makanan kami. Secara keseluruhan, kopitiam adalah tempat yang tepat untuk menikmati sarapan Melayu tanpa harus melakukan perjalanan jauh.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hey Paige, 

Thank you so much for your kind words! We're happy to hear that you enjoyed the food and drinks-- and we appreciate your suggestion about the sambal. You can request extra for a small surcharge :)! We always aim to bring a taste of Malaysia to our customers, so we're delighted to hear you think so too! Have a great weekend!

reviews.author: Khoi Pham
reviews.text: Solid walk-in only spot for some Southeastern Asian dishes, specifically from the region around Singapore. Had a craving for a classic Hainanese chicken rice, and this did not disappoint. The kaya toast was lovely too, and the Kopi O Peng was refreshing. Would recommend a visit if you're in the area.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan yang nyaman dan hanya menerima pelanggan tanpa reservasi, menawarkan berbagai hidangan Asia Tenggara, khususnya dari wilayah sekitar Singapura. Saya sedang ingin makan nasi ayam Hainan klasik, dan tempat ini tidak mengecewakan. Roti bakar kaya-nya juga enak, dan Kopi O Peng-nya menyegarkan. Saya merekomendasikan untuk berkunjung jika Anda berada di daerah tersebut.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Khoi, 

Thank you for your review! We're glad to hear that you enjoyed the Hainanese chicken rice, kaya toast, and Kopi O Peng. We appreciate your recommendation and hope to see you again soon :)!

reviews.author: Indra Gunawan
reviews.text: Not bad laah
reviews.textTranslated: Lumayan lah
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Indra, thanks ah! Do come back to visit if you're free :)!

reviews.author: MD Ram
reviews.text:
I went on July 2024 with family (3 of us), tried Hainanese chicken, Pandan chicken, Honeycomb cake and some other items and drinks. Quite surprise I could say one of the worst. Hainanese chicken was just chunk of dry meat (just like chunk of turkey legs sold in Disney parks) with soy sauce and the rice shaped like a ball that was also dry and taste like Hainanese chicken not. Honeycomb cake was small portion and overprice like also most item in the menu. 2 AC blowing air without cooling we are drenched with sweat with flies buzzing around (health violation). I went to many Malaysian restaurant in NYC, never have had something like this not even close. To satisfy my unfulfilled craving the day after I went on rampage, took revenge and spent like crazy dine in another Malaysian restaurant, and this time we are satisfied.
After I wrote my review, out of curiosity I scrolled down some review and found many similar complaints. Overprice, overhyped, dirty, not authentic, poor taste, unavailability items. I understand some establishment tried to improvised or presented in different way but should be in positive way not the opposite way. Looks like this things happen quite sometime with the owner posting wording comforting response with nothing change or slight effort. What a disappointment.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya pergi pada Juli 2024 bersama keluarga (3 orang), mencoba ayam Hainan, ayam Pandan, kue sarang lebah, dan beberapa menu serta minuman lainnya. Cukup mengejutkan, bisa dibilang salah satu yang terburuk. Ayam Hainan hanya berupa potongan daging kering (seperti potongan paha kalkun yang dijual di taman Disney) dengan kecap dan nasi berbentuk bola yang juga kering dan rasanya tidak seperti ayam Hainan. Kue sarang lebah porsinya kecil dan harganya terlalu mahal, seperti kebanyakan menu lainnya. 2 AC meniupkan udara tanpa mendinginkan, kami basah kuyup oleh keringat dengan lalat berterbangan di sekitar (pelanggaran kesehatan). Saya telah mengunjungi banyak restoran Malaysia di NYC, tetapi belum pernah mengalami hal seperti ini, bahkan tidak mendekati. Untuk memuaskan keinginan saya yang belum terpenuhi, keesokan harinya saya melampiaskan kekesalan dan menghabiskan uang seperti orang gila untuk makan di restoran Malaysia lain, dan kali ini kami puas.
Setelah saya menulis ulasan saya, karena penasaran saya menelusuri beberapa ulasan dan menemukan banyak keluhan serupa. Terlalu mahal, terlalu dibesar-besarkan, kotor, tidak otentik, rasa buruk, item yang tidak tersedia. Saya mengerti beberapa tempat usaha mencoba berimprovisasi atau menyajikan sesuatu dengan cara yang berbeda, tetapi seharusnya dengan cara yang positif, bukan sebaliknya. Sepertinya hal ini sering terjadi, di mana pemilik memposting tanggapan yang menenangkan tanpa ada perubahan atau sedikit pun usaha. Sungguh mengecewakan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hey MD, 
Thank you for sharing your detailed experience. We're genuinely sorry to hear that your visit didn't meet your expectations, especially with the Hainanese chicken, environment, and pricing. Your feedback is invaluable, and we'll take it into consideration as we strive to improve and provide a better experience for all our guests. If you do give us a try again, we hope to win your over next time. We hope you enjoy the rest of your weekend :)!

reviews.author: William Chen
reviews.text:
Absolutely disgusting restaurant, seems like the restaurant owner stopped caring about the restaurant. I noticed subtle to major changes of the environment such as how disgusting the restaurant smells (imagine standing behind a garbage truck) instant appetite lost. Paired with the putrid smell of the old food, is the amount of fly within the restaurant. To me this eating experience is comparable to eating around dumpster campfire surrounded by rats. Additionally I don't think NYC rats would eat this kind of food, especially the high prices they're charging. To simply put it, the price of the food does not match quality of the food. I been dining at this establishment for quite some time, roughly since 2020. I definitely noticed quality of the Hainanese chicken rice diminishing over time, from its chewy and dry texture to its slimy and sticky texture. Also, not sure anyone noticed but the restaurant changed their signature drink bag to clear plastic cups.
Doesn't anyone else think it's take away overall experience and quality of the drink. Overall, there changes from this establishment is gonna forever deter me ever dining here again. For anyone reading this please reconsider this restaurant and save yourself dining here.
Save the wallets and your soul.
reviews.textTranslated:
Restoran ini benar-benar menjijikkan, sepertinya pemilik restoran sudah tidak peduli lagi dengan restorannya. Saya memperhatikan perubahan kecil hingga besar pada lingkungan restoran, seperti baunya yang menjijikkan (bayangkan berdiri di belakang truk sampah), nafsu makan langsung hilang. Ditambah dengan bau busuk makanan lama, ada banyak lalat di dalam restoran. Bagi saya, pengalaman makan ini seperti makan di sekitar api unggun di tempat sampah yang dikelilingi tikus. Selain itu, saya rasa tikus di New York City tidak akan memakan makanan seperti ini, apalagi dengan harga yang sangat tinggi. Singkatnya, harga makanan tidak sesuai dengan kualitasnya. Saya sudah makan di restoran ini cukup lama, kira-kira sejak tahun 2020. Saya benar-benar memperhatikan kualitas nasi ayam Hainan yang menurun seiring waktu, dari teksturnya yang kenyal dan kering menjadi teksturnya yang berlendir dan lengket. Selain itu, saya tidak yakin ada yang memperhatikan, tetapi restoran ini mengganti kantong minuman khas mereka dengan gelas plastik bening.
Apakah ada orang lain yang berpikir ini mengurangi pengalaman dan kualitas minuman secara keseluruhan? Secara keseluruhan, perubahan-perubahan di restoran ini akan selamanya membuat saya enggan makan di sini lagi. Bagi siapa pun yang membaca ini, mohon pertimbangkan kembali restoran ini dan hindari makan di sini.
Selamatkan dompet dan jiwa Anda.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi William, 

We sincerely apologize for your recent experience with us and appreciate your feedback. These issues are not the standard we aim to uphold. Although it's disappointing to learn that we fell short of your expectations, especially given your long history with us, we'll work hard to make necessary improvements for the future. Regardless, we hope you enjoy the rest of your week!

reviews.author: Arushi Jain
reviews.text: The food was really good. I got spicy sesame noodles and coffee and I would really recommend people to try out this place.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar enak. Saya memesan mi wijen pedas dan kopi, dan saya sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini untuk dicoba.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Arushi, 
Thanks for the great review! We’re thrilled you enjoyed the spicy sesame noodles and coffee. We appreciate the recommendation and look forward to serving you again soon :)!

reviews.author: Meng Yee
reviews.text: Was in the area and just want to check out some ‘authentic’ Malaysian food, but very disappointed. Tried the Nasi Lemak, where the Ikan bellis is too sweat, no spicyness at all, also tried the Dry Pan Mee, sorry the dark source is a bit too much that it taste bitter… 😩 As a Malaysian, don’t think the food taste very authentic. Teh Tarik was ok👍🏼
reviews.textTranslated: Saya kebetulan berada di daerah itu dan hanya ingin mencoba beberapa makanan Malaysia yang 'otentik', tetapi sangat kecewa. Saya mencoba Nasi Lemak, di mana Ikan bellisnya terlalu manis, sama sekali tidak pedas, saya juga mencoba Mie Kering, maaf, kuahnya terlalu banyak sehingga rasanya pahit… 😩 Sebagai orang Malaysia, saya rasa makanannya tidak terasa otentik. Teh Tariknya lumayan 👍🏼
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Meng, we're sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy some of our menu items. Our ikan bilis definitely has a kick to it and is sweet and spicy to perfectly pair with the portion of the dish. The nasi lemak also comes with sambal to ensure that there is enough flavor in the dish. Everyone does have a different spice tolerance level and we do hope you give us another visit in the future :) Thank you for visiting and stopping by when you were in the area!

reviews.author: Qi Tian
reviews.text: 马拉松之后来吃 没有很惊艳
reviews.textTranslated: Saya makan di sini setelah maraton; rasanya tidak terlalu istimewa.

reviews.author: Hannah Johnson
reviews.text:
Coming to Kopitiam was the best decision I ever made while in NYC. I recommend this place to anyone stopping into Manhattan & its surrounding areas!

For one, I discovered the amazing national dish of Malaysia, nasi lemak. I also didn't know I would like anchovies so much. I love a multi-component dish (rice, sambal chili paste, boiled egg, cucumber, ikan bilis (anchovy) and peanuts).

My friend made me try the kaya toast - I didn't love it but it's her favorite.

As far as atmosphere, it's cute, laidback, and casual.
reviews.textTranslated:
Berkunjung ke Kopitiam adalah keputusan terbaik yang pernah saya buat selama di NYC. Saya merekomendasikan tempat ini kepada siapa pun yang singgah di Manhattan & sekitarnya!

Pertama, saya menemukan hidangan nasional Malaysia yang luar biasa, nasi lemak. Saya juga tidak menyangka akan sangat menyukai ikan teri. Saya suka hidangan multi-komponen (nasi, sambal, telur rebus, mentimun, ikan bilis (teri), dan kacang).

Teman saya menyuruh saya mencoba roti bakar kaya - saya tidak terlalu menyukainya, tetapi itu favoritnya.

Sedangkan untuk suasananya, tempatnya lucu, santai, dan kasual.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mally, thank you so much for visiting us and sharing such a thoughtful review with us. We're so happy that you enjoyed the nasi lemak and appreciate you for trying the kaya toast. We hope to see to see you on your next visit!

reviews.author: tanjiro
reviews.text: The coffee was really good. The pandan chicken was juicy and fragrant.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya sangat enak. Ayam pandannya empuk dan harum.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for your review and for giving us a visit. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our coffee and the pandan chicken!

reviews.author: Мilena Amedieva
reviews.text:
I recently dined in Kopitiam and was excited to try their famous pan mee, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to the hype. The broth lacked flavor, the flat noodles were too dry, and overall, the dish was quite bland.

I also ordered their pandan chicken and curry puffs. The curry puffs were okay but not fresh, which detracted from the experience. The pandan chicken was distasteful, with dry meat that even the sweet sauce couldn't salvage, leaving the dish bland as well.

Overall, the food lacked the expected flavor!
reviews.textTranslated:
Baru-baru ini saya makan di Kopitiam dan sangat ingin mencoba pan mee mereka yang terkenal, tetapi sayangnya, rasanya tidak sesuai dengan ekspektasi. Kuahnya kurang rasa, mi pipihnya terlalu kering, dan secara keseluruhan, hidangannya cukup hambar.

Saya juga memesan ayam pandan dan kue kari. Kue karinya lumayan, tetapi tidak segar, yang mengurangi pengalaman makan saya. Ayam pandannya tidak enak, dagingnya kering bahkan saus manis pun tidak bisa menyelamatkannya, membuat hidangannya juga hambar.

Secara keseluruhan, makanannya kurang sesuai dengan harapan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Milena, we're sorry you didn't have a great experience with us. We do have other menu items that might be a better fit, if you ever decide to give us another try. Thank you for taking the time to visit us and we hope to see you again in the future :)

reviews.author: Jacob Park
reviews.text: Nice tok tok noodles 🍜
reviews.textTranslated: Mie tok tok yang enak 🍜
reviews.responseFromOwner: Love the photo and so glad you enjoyed our Tok Tok Mee! Hope to see you on your next visit :)

reviews.author: Rukshana Nanayakkara
reviews.text:
This place stands for the reputation of Malaysian food. Delicious and authentic.
Located in China town of New York, it offers tea tharik, Nasilemak to many more Malaysian food options. Only issue is its messy and not so tidy ambiance. But I visited almost the end of the day. I would definitely visit this place again.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat ini terkenal dengan reputasi makanan Malaysia-nya. Lezat dan otentik.
Terletak di Chinatown New York, tempat ini menawarkan teh tharik, Nasilemak, dan banyak pilihan makanan Malaysia lainnya. Satu-satunya masalah adalah suasananya yang berantakan dan kurang rapi. Tapi saya berkunjung hampir di penghujung hari. Saya pasti akan mengunjungi tempat ini lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Rukshana, thank you so much for your honest review. The photos look great, and we love that you enjoyed our Malaysian dishes!

reviews.author: tiffany schiller
reviews.text: Always a banger
reviews.textTranslated: Selalu keren
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Tiffany, thank you for your sweet review :)

reviews.author: mintea
reviews.text: Cute decor, good music, friendly staff. The food is great! Highly recommend chee cheong fun (a bit spicy) and the peanut sugar French toast :)
reviews.textTranslated: Dekorasinya lucu, musiknya bagus, stafnya ramah. Makanannya enak banget! Sangat merekomendasikan chee cheong fun (agak pedas) dan French toast dengan taburan gula kacang :)
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi there! We appreciate the kind words and how detailed your review is. Super glad to hear that you enjoyed our food and our special Chee Cheong Fun and Peanut Sugar French Toast. Hope to see you on your next visit!

reviews.author: Dong Jin Shin
reviews.text: We went in a group of four to try out this place on a warm summer day. The menu is seasonal and there is a lot of items to choose from. We were very satisfied with the generous use of spices and fish sauce in our dishes. The Hainan chicken rice was very enjoyable too. The cold beverages come in plastic drink pouches and are a lot of fun. Tables are first come first serve and orders are placed at the counter, and the tables are cleaned by the customers before leaving. The service is quite fast and on point. It’s a very fun and casual brunch spot to start a weekend. Highly recommended.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami berempat datang ke tempat ini untuk mencoba hidangan di hari musim panas yang hangat. Menunya musiman dan banyak pilihannya. Kami sangat puas dengan penggunaan bumbu dan saus ikan yang melimpah. Nasi ayam Hainan-nya juga sangat lezat. Minuman dinginnya dikemas dalam kantong plastik dan sangat menyenangkan. Meja disajikan berdasarkan siapa cepat dia dapat, pesanan diletakkan di konter, dan meja dibersihkan oleh pelanggan sebelum pergi. Pelayanannya cukup cepat dan tepat. Tempat ini sangat menyenangkan dan cocok untuk brunch santai di awal akhir pekan. Sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi there! Thank you so much for sharing these beautiful photos, as well as your thoughtful review. We're super happy to hear that you had a fun experience with us and that our food satisfied you. Hope to see you at your next visit :)

reviews.author: Jenny Bee
reviews.text: I wish I could eat here every day for the rest of my life.
reviews.textTranslated: Aku berharap bisa makan di sini setiap hari selama sisa hidupku.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jenny, love this!! We'd love to have you visit everyday :D

reviews.author: Enrique Méndez
reviews.text: I'm like soup
reviews.textTranslated: Aku seperti sup

reviews.author: Asher Wen
reviews.text: Agree with peoples previous comments on modifications/quality on every classical entree dish (nasi lemak, pan mee, Hainan chicken). Coffee and snack products are okay, but dont bother with the entrees
reviews.textTranslated: Setuju dengan komentar orang-orang sebelumnya tentang modifikasi/kualitas pada setiap hidangan utama klasik (nasi lemak, mi pan, ayam Hainan). Kopi dan camilannya lumayan, tapi jangan repot-repot dengan hidangan utama.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Asher, sorry to hear that you didn't have a great experience with us. We focus on creating baba nyonya dishes and apologize if this didn't match your expectations. We hope you give us another visit in the future and find something that suits your palette.

reviews.author: C C
reviews.text: I liked the food and the concept . It’s a order and sit down and eat and clean up and leave concept . No waiters or waitress. Some people in the reviews expecting 5 star restaurant experience, without pay the price . Food Karens
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka makanan dan konsepnya. Konsepnya pesan, duduk, makan, beres-beres, lalu pulang. Tidak ada pelayan. Beberapa orang di ulasan mengharapkan pengalaman restoran bintang 5, tanpa membayar harganya. Food Karens
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi there, we're super glad to hear that you enjoyed the food and the setup of our restaurant. We do have waiters and waitresses that are also bringing out the food and taking orders. Definitely feel free to let us know if you need any assistance and we'd love to help. We hope to see you on your next visit!

reviews.author: MEOW
reviews.text:
The Kaya is quite legit, but we didn’t quite like it with the thick bread.

The teh peng (ice tea) is average but the Bandung (rose drink) was extremely diluted. The packaging was confusing as well, not sure if we should poke it in the small hole or open the zip at the top.

The place is small, table was dirty and house flies flying around. Also there was some kind of vinegary stench, not sure where it was coming from. Might make you lose your appetite if you smell it for long.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kaya-nya cukup enak, tapi kami kurang menyukainya dengan roti yang tebal.

Teh peng (es teh) rasanya biasa saja, tetapi Bandung (minuman mawar) sangat encer. Kemasannya juga membingungkan, kami tidak yakin apakah harus menusuk lubang kecil atau membuka resleting di bagian atas.

Tempatnya kecil, mejanya kotor dan banyak lalat beterbangan. Selain itu, ada bau seperti cuka, kami tidak yakin dari mana asalnya. Mungkin bisa membuat Anda kehilangan nafsu makan jika mencium baunya terlalu lama.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi there, we're glad you enjoyed our kaya jam! We're sorry to hear that there may have been complications with the ice pouch for the drinks. You can always ask a staff member if you need help with anything, as they're there to assist you. The straw can be inserted in any way you want, whether it be from unzipping the pouch or through the hole. We hope you give us another visit in the future!

reviews.author: Kevin K
reviews.text: Been wanting to try this place for a while and was super disappointed. Char kway teow was a mushy overcooked mess, and curry puff had zero flavor. Worst Malaysian food i've had in new york.
reviews.textTranslated: Sudah lama ingin mencoba tempat ini dan sangat kecewa. Char kway teow-nya lembek dan terlalu matang, dan curry puff-nya tidak berasa. Makanan Malaysia terburuk yang pernah saya makan di New York.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Kevin, we're sorry to hear that you were disappointed from your visit. Our char kway teow is made to order and everything is fried freshly with a variety of seasoning. We hope you give us another try in the future, and find something that's for you!

reviews.author: Foodie411
reviews.text: For a restaurant with so many high ratings, I was shocked at the experience we had. The amount of flies was alarming and it was pretty dirty and dingy. We gave it a try anyway and the food was pretty mid. Also the people working seemed so upset to be there which made us sad too
reviews.textTranslated: Untuk restoran dengan rating tinggi seperti ini, saya terkejut dengan pengalaman yang kami dapatkan. Jumlah lalatnya sangat banyak dan tempatnya cukup kotor dan kusam. Kami tetap mencobanya dan makanannya cukup biasa saja. Para pelayan juga tampak kesal berada di sana, yang membuat kami juga sedih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi, we are sorry to hear that you didn’t enjoy your experience. We appreciate your honesty and sharing your experience with us. We always strive for the best customer service and will definitely take this into consideration. We hope you visit us again soon.

reviews.author: Warren Teo
reviews.text: This place is WAY overhyped. I was a fan when they were still a small shop, but the taste and quality of the food has taken a dive off a cliff ever since. Service and wait time is a joke too. We had to wait more than 25 minutes to be served really bland-tasting and overpriced char kuay teow and pan mee. The wait time is simply not worth it and I'd skip those dishes entirely. The wait time is contributed to the fact that they have only one chef working on a public holiday, and it's puzzling to me why they'd do that when the place is getting pretty busy during lunchtime. Not to mention the state of the restaurant is pretty gloomy, with flies buzzing around. Overall, not a great place to dine, with the food and service being really dissapointing. If you are looking for authentic Malaysian/Singaporean flavors, this is not the place to go. For the price and more authentic flavors, I'd go uptown to Urban Hawker, or Wok Wok instead.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini terlalu dibesar-besarkan. Saya penggemar beratnya waktu mereka masih kecil, tapi rasa dan kualitas makanannya anjlok drastis sejak saat itu. Pelayanan dan waktu tunggunya juga biasa saja. Kami harus menunggu lebih dari 25 menit untuk disuguhi char kuay teow dan pan mee yang rasanya hambar dan terlalu mahal. Waktu tunggunya sungguh tidak sepadan, dan saya akan melewatkan hidangan-hidangan itu sama sekali. Waktu tunggu ini juga disebabkan oleh fakta bahwa mereka hanya memiliki satu koki yang bekerja di hari libur nasional, dan saya heran kenapa mereka melakukan itu di saat tempat ini sedang ramai saat makan siang. Belum lagi kondisi restorannya yang agak suram, dengan lalat yang berterbangan di mana-mana. Secara keseluruhan, ini bukan tempat makan yang nyaman, dengan makanan dan pelayanan yang sangat mengecewakan. Jika Anda mencari cita rasa otentik Malaysia/Singapura, ini bukan tempat yang tepat. Untuk harga dan cita rasa yang lebih otentik, saya sarankan untuk pergi ke Urban Hawker atau Wok Wok yang lebih jauh ke pusat kota.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Warren, we're so sorry you didn't enjoy your experience with us. Usually during busy hours there may be a wait time however, we always try our best to ensure that all customers are seated and served. We appreciate you for sharing your thoughts, and we do hope you give us another chance.

reviews.author: Juan Lorenzo Cobo
reviews.text: Honestly very mid if I’m being honest. I’ve had a lot of their dishes and they are just not very good. One that I’d like to specifically point out so you can avoid at all cost is the spicy cold noodles. They are basically the most bland noodle you will ever have. broth? No no, more like just room temp tap water. This is all topped off with a classic chilly flake mix that you can get at any Asian food market.
reviews.textTranslated: Jujur saja, rasanya biasa saja. Saya sudah mencoba banyak hidangan mereka dan rasanya tidak enak sama sekali. Salah satu yang ingin saya sebutkan secara khusus agar Anda hindari adalah mi dingin pedas. Pada dasarnya, itu adalah mi paling hambar yang pernah Anda makan. Kuahnya? Tidak, lebih seperti air keran suhu ruangan. Semua itu ditambah dengan campuran serpihan cabai klasik yang bisa Anda dapatkan di pasar makanan Asia mana pun.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Juan, we're sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy your spicy sesame noodles. The noodles are meant to be a refreshing chilled noodle dish that has chili's, a boiled egg, and cucumbers. We hope you give us another visit and try another menu item that you'll enjoy more.

reviews.author: GG
reviews.text: Nice place for Malaysian fare. No frills but the Kaya toast is very good.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk menikmati masakan Malaysia. Sederhana, tetapi roti panggang Kaya-nya sangat enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for visiting! Beautiful spread :)

reviews.author: Mandy Fang
reviews.text: quaint and charming spot in chinatown serving malaysian and chinese fare. the nasi lemak is a must try!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat unik dan menarik di Pecinan yang menyajikan hidangan Malaysia dan Cina. Nasi Lemaknya wajib dicoba!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mandy, thank you so much for stopping by! You ordered amazing choices.

reviews.author: suzy lam
reviews.text: Great food and awesome service
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak dan pelayanan luar biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for visiting and supporting us :)

reviews.author: Angel De La Vega
reviews.text: Food was great, wish portions were a bit bigger for some dishes but definitely will go again!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak, berharap porsinya lebih besar untuk beberapa hidangan, tetapi pasti akan kembali lagi!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Angel, thank you so much for stopping and trying the Tok Tok Mee and some refreshing summer drinks!

reviews.author: Rachel Greenwald
reviews.text: Love this spot so much! Have been coming for years, and it’s still so good.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget sama tempat ini! Sudah bertahun-tahun ke sini, dan masih bagus banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Rachel, we appreciate you so much for supporting us throughout the years. Glad to hear that you enjoyed our food :)

reviews.author: Thy Pham
reviews.text:
Kaya toast was great. The cream in the middle was delicious and so unique
Nasi lemal was also really good
We also had the tok tok mee but it wasn’t my favorite
reviews.textTranslated:
Roti panggang kaya sangat enak. Krim di tengahnya lezat dan sangat unik.
Nasi lemal juga sangat enak.
Kami juga memesan tok tok mee tetapi itu bukan favorit saya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Thy, we're glad that you enjoyed our Kaya Toast and Nasi Lemak. We hope to see you on your next visit!

reviews.author: Mowa Li
reviews.text: Such a dirty place. Slow service.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya kotor banget. Pelayanannya lama.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mowa, we're sorry to hear that you didn't have a great experience with us. We constantly strive to meet our customers needs, and we hope you give us another chance.

reviews.author: Darlene Lee
reviews.text: Few vegan options (sesame noodles was the one I found). Great coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan vegannya sedikit (saya hanya menemukan mi wijen). Kopinya enak.

reviews.author: Jenn L
reviews.text:
After having bookmarked this for years, I finally got around to trying their nasi lemak. It was a very filling dish with the salty fried anchovies and peanuts. The cucumbers were a refreshing touch to the dish and the soy sauce egg was a nice addition. I also tried their teh tarik which came in a drink bag with a little hole to insert a straw. The straw I got was flat on both ends so it was bit hard to puncture the bag, I ended up just opening the top and sticking the straw in that way. Their kaya toast was stuffed with kaya jam, so much that you get a big bite of jam with each bite. Shoutout to whoever decided on the playlist of Chinese pop songs because there were quite a few songs I'll be adding to my own playlist.

It's somewhat like self service. You order and pay at the counter then bring a numbered stand to wherever you're seated. Then the staff will bring your order to you. After you finish eating, you place the dishes and utensils into the boxes above the trash and clean up your own table.
reviews.textTranslated:
Setelah bertahun-tahun menyimpan tempat ini di bookmark, akhirnya saya berkesempatan mencoba nasi lemak mereka. Hidangan ini sangat mengenyangkan dengan ikan teri goreng asin dan kacang tanah. Mentimun memberikan sentuhan menyegarkan pada hidangan dan telur kecap asin merupakan tambahan yang enak. Saya juga mencoba teh tarik mereka yang disajikan dalam kantong minuman dengan lubang kecil untuk memasukkan sedotan. Sedotan yang saya dapatkan pipih di kedua ujungnya sehingga agak sulit untuk menusuk kantongnya, akhirnya saya hanya membuka bagian atas dan memasukkan sedotan dengan cara itu. Roti bakar kaya mereka diisi dengan selai kaya, saking banyaknya sehingga Anda mendapatkan gigitan selai yang besar di setiap gigitan. Terima kasih kepada siapa pun yang memilih daftar putar lagu pop Tiongkok karena ada beberapa lagu yang akan saya tambahkan ke daftar putar saya sendiri.

Sistemnya agak seperti swalayan. Anda memesan dan membayar di konter, lalu membawa nampan bernomor ke tempat Anda duduk. Kemudian staf akan membawakan pesanan Anda. Setelah selesai makan, Anda meletakkan piring dan peralatan makan ke dalam kotak di atas tempat sampah dan membersihkan meja Anda sendiri.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jenn, thank you so much for visiting and for sharing your experience with us in so much detail. We're glad to hear that you enjoyed our Nasi Lemak and Kaya Toast!

reviews.author: Bob Lou
reviews.text: Kaya toast was nice and thick.
reviews.textTranslated: Roti panggang kaya itu enak dan tebal.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We're glad you enjoyed our Kaya Toast :)

reviews.author: Jia W
reviews.text: The foods were delicious. I really liked the rice with salty small fish. My kids liked hainanese chicken rice and french toasts.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak sekali. Saya sangat suka nasi dengan ikan kecil asin. Anak-anak saya suka nasi ayam Hainan dan roti panggang Prancis.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jia, thank you so much for visiting. We're so glad you enjoyed the Nasi Lemak and our other dishes!

reviews.author: George Sullivan
reviews.text: I genuinely love this place, they have great coffee great dessert options. I never had much Malaysian food before and this is good because it is a contemporary intro to the Malaysian food scene. There seems to be a lot of people who are very familiar with Malaysian food at the restaurant and it’s always busy
reviews.textTranslated: Saya benar-benar menyukai tempat ini, mereka memiliki kopi yang enak dan pilihan makanan penutup yang lezat. Saya belum pernah mencoba banyak makanan Malaysia sebelumnya dan ini bagus karena merupakan pengenalan kontemporer terhadap kuliner Malaysia. Tampaknya ada banyak orang yang sangat familiar dengan makanan Malaysia di restoran ini dan selalu ramai.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for visiting and we're glad you enjoyed your experience with us. We hope to see you again in the future!

reviews.author: Lisa Tsai
reviews.text: I would say this place is very simple. If you like this approach, you would like this place. I tried the pan mee and Kaya toast.
