I also tried the white coffee with condensed milk, nasi lemak, curry puff. I wouldn’t expect frills and fancy but more so like home prepared Malaysian food or side street food from Asia. I ordered from here multiple times when I feel like I want the comfort of familiar southeast asian flavors.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya rasa tempat ini sangat sederhana. Jika Anda menyukai pendekatan ini, Anda pasti akan menyukai tempat ini. Saya mencoba pan mee dan roti panggang kaya. Saya juga mencoba kopi putih dengan susu kental manis, nasi lemak, dan kari puff. Saya tidak mengharapkan embel-embel dan kemewahan, tetapi lebih seperti makanan rumahan Malaysia atau jajanan kaki lima dari Asia. Saya memesan dari sini beberapa kali ketika saya ingin merasakan kenyamanan cita rasa Asia Tenggara yang familiar.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Lisa, thank you so much for sharing your experience and review with us! We're glad you enjoyed the food and hope to see you during your next visit.

reviews.author: Sara F
reviews.text: Great flavours, everything we tried was well executed and tasty
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya luar biasa, semua yang kami coba diolah dengan baik dan enak.

reviews.author: Meng Yee Yem
reviews.text:
As a Malaysian, the only thing I approve from the food and drinks I ordered is just teh beng and kaya toast with eggs. Don’t bother ordering nasi lemak or pan mee. It’s a modified version - too much anchovies or ikan bilis vs peanuts. Sambal was okay.

While the dry pan mee, no proper chili paste. I agree to eat cut chili/soya sauce for soup pan mee but not dry pan mee as the amount of soya sauce there used could be a mini tsunami 🌊 ? Chili paste is not the kind that you used for hainanese chicken rice.
reviews.textTranslated:
Sebagai orang Malaysia, satu-satunya makanan dan minuman yang saya setujui dari pesanan saya hanyalah teh beng dan roti kaya dengan telur. Jangan repot-repot memesan nasi lemak atau pan mee. Itu versi modifikasi - terlalu banyak ikan teri atau ikan bilis dibandingkan kacang. Sambalnya lumayan.

Sedangkan untuk pan mee kering, tidak ada pasta cabai yang tepat. Saya setuju makan cabai potong/kecap untuk pan mee berkuah, tetapi tidak untuk pan mee kering karena jumlah kecap yang digunakan bisa seperti tsunami mini 🌊 ? Pasta cabainya bukan jenis yang digunakan untuk nasi ayam Hainan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Meng, we're sorry you didn't enjoy your experience with us. We offer a generous amount of anchovies and ikan bilis for our dishes. The sauce that comes on the side of the dishes can be added based on customers preferences. You can always ask the staff about other sauce options, we also have more sambal sauce. Enjoy the rest of your day!

reviews.author: Ray
reviews.text: THIS PLACE IS NOT HALAL... 🙁
reviews.textTranslated: TEMPAT INI TIDAK HALAL... 🙁
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Ray, we understand that dietary preferences and being halal are important considerations for customers. Not all Malaysian restaurants are halal and we have not promoted ourselves as being halal. We apologize if our current menu doesn't meet your dietary requirements. Please enjoy the rest of your day!

reviews.author: Jessica Chan
reviews.text: A wonderful reminder of my childhood. Kaya toast was delicious, as were the eggs. Milo could be a bit stronger, but still okay.
reviews.textTranslated: Kenangan indah masa kecilku. Roti panggang kaya sangat lezat, begitu pula telurnya. Milo bisa sedikit lebih kuat, tapi tetap oke.

reviews.author: Jammy Jams
reviews.text:
Pretty neat this restaurant was started by an lgbtq couple from Malaysia, a country often hostile to lgbtq ppl, but unfortunately, after trying much of their menu, I can say the food is p disappointing

Renovated spot w a good amt of seating
reviews.textTranslated:
Restoran ini cukup menarik karena didirikan oleh pasangan LGBTQ dari Malaysia, negara yang seringkali tidak ramah terhadap kaum LGBTQ. Namun sayangnya, setelah mencoba sebagian besar menu mereka, saya dapat mengatakan bahwa makanannya sangat mengecewakan.

Tempat yang telah direnovasi dengan banyak tempat duduk.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jammy, our business wasn't started by an LGBTQ couple from Malaysia so we do apologize if there was any confusion. Kopitiam was founded by Chef/Owner Kyo Pang. We're sorry that you didn't have a great experience with us and we do hope you'll give us another try in the future.

reviews.author: Haruka Ichinose (ハル)
reviews.text: Nasi Lemak: worst thing I’ve ever tasted, smells like devil. Threw away the moment I got it
reviews.textTranslated: Nasi Lemak: makanan terburuk yang pernah saya cicipi, baunya seperti setan. Langsung saya buang begitu menerimanya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Haruka, we're so sorry you didn't have a great experience with us. Our Nasi Lemak uses strong authentic flavors and consists of anchovies. You may be unfamiliar with Malaysian cuisine and we do hope you'll give us another chance.

reviews.author: Lilian Liu Pan
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for visiting and sharing your spread! We're looking forward to your next visit :)

reviews.author: seipetpet
reviews.text: Authentic and delicious . Nice place to chill too
reviews.textTranslated: Otentik dan lezat. Tempat yang nyaman untuk bersantai juga.

reviews.author: David Wang
reviews.text: Solid solid spot for a brunch or snack. Great portion sizes as well. Super cosy vibes and communal seating amidst a bunch of smaller tables. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang sangat bagus untuk brunch atau camilan. Porsi makanannya juga besar. Suasananya sangat nyaman dan tempat duduknya berkelompok di antara banyak meja kecil. Sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi David, thank you for stopping by and grabbing some amazing snack options! We are thrilled to hear that you found the space cozy. We're looking forward to your next visit!

reviews.author: Jessica Davis
reviews.text: excellent service
reviews.textTranslated: pelayanan prima

reviews.author: Anna Nimos 白凤
reviews.text: The casual street food vibe was on point, felt like home away from home as an Indonesian. The Kaya toast is not to be missed!
reviews.textTranslated: Suasana jajanan kaki lima yang santai sangat pas, terasa seperti rumah sendiri sebagai orang Indonesia. Roti panggang Kaya wajib dicoba!

reviews.author: olivija
reviews.text: Love this spot - such a classic!!! 😁
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget sama tempat ini - klasik banget!!! 😁

reviews.author: Molly Lohry
reviews.text: Ive visited Kopitiam several times. Usually to get small snacks or a milk tea when running errands in the neighborhood. Consistent and good, love having a local option for all my SE asian favorites.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah beberapa kali mengunjungi Kopitiam. Biasanya untuk membeli camilan kecil atau teh susu saat menjalankan tugas di sekitar lingkungan. Konsisten dan enak, saya senang memiliki pilihan lokal untuk semua makanan favorit Asia Tenggara saya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Molly, thank you so much for your kind words and we're glad that you visited several times. We hope to continue seeing you around!

reviews.author: Victoria Geh
reviews.text:
Food 7/10
Solid flavors and small bites, but I realize I am just not the biggest fan of Malaysian cuisine. With that being said, the dishes we got for takeout were all quite yummy and unique, with a great combination of textures too. The Hainanese chicken came with thick pieces of chicken, the small bites all were very new and fun to try.
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanan 7/10
Rasa yang mantap dan porsi kecil, tetapi saya menyadari bahwa saya bukanlah penggemar berat masakan Malaysia. Meskipun begitu, hidangan yang kami pesan untuk dibawa pulang semuanya cukup enak dan unik, dengan kombinasi tekstur yang luar biasa. Ayam Hainan disajikan dengan potongan ayam yang tebal, dan semua potongan kecilnya sangat baru dan menyenangkan untuk dicoba.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Victoria, we appreciate your honestly and we're glad you gave us a try even though you aren't a fan of Malaysian cuisine. We hope you enjoyed everything and will consider ordering again in the future :)

reviews.author: Stephanie Yung
reviews.text: The snacks and coffee were excellent. Can be a bit noisy.
reviews.textTranslated: Camilan dan kopinya sangat enak. Tempatnya bisa agak berisik.

reviews.author: albert
reviews.text: the music is kinda nuts
reviews.textTranslated: Musiknya agak gila

reviews.author: Antonio Pérez
reviews.text: I ask for caffe latte and they give a plastic bag with something brown on it and this for 8 dollars... I don't like it and that's not caffe latte. Can't upload the photo
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan caffe latte dan mereka memberi saya kantong plastik dengan sesuatu berwarna cokelat di atasnya dan ini seharga 8 dolar... Saya tidak suka dan itu bukan caffe latte. Tidak bisa mengunggah foto.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Antonio

As a Malaysian coffee house, we specialize in specialty Malaysian coffee that is traditionally served in a bag. We do not sell cafe latte, so our staff likely suggested to you the closest Malaysian alternative! If you take a look at our menu, all of our coffees are properly named and described on our menu to make sure you are ordering what you want.

reviews.author: Sing M Wong
reviews.text: Felt ambitious to try out a new restaurant but it didn’t go so well tonight. Do not get Hainanese chicken at this place, it’s a bland chicken thigh chopped in 4 bulky sections😳(rice balls were kinda cute but it didn’t save the dish). And the kitchen ran out of shrimp in our other dish and the friendly person handling our order forgot to mention it. 😖 other dishes were just ok
reviews.textTranslated: Saya merasa bersemangat untuk mencoba restoran baru, tetapi malam ini tidak berjalan dengan baik. Jangan memesan ayam Hainan di tempat ini, itu hanya paha ayam hambar yang dipotong menjadi 4 bagian besar😳 (bola nasi lumayan lucu tapi tidak menyelamatkan hidangan tersebut). Dan dapur kehabisan udang di hidangan kami yang lain dan orang ramah yang menangani pesanan kami lupa menyebutkannya. 😖 Hidangan lainnya biasa saja.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Sing, we're so sorry you didn't have a great experience with us. Our Hainanese Chicken Rice consists of a poached chicken leg and is our traditional take on this chicken rice dish. We hope you'll give us another try in the future!

reviews.author: N S
reviews.text:
My first Yusheng in NYC. And honestly a bit, a lot, sad for the price. Portions damn sad I ordered large. Pick up time was set for 12, they were late and we had to wait 45 minutes with moody/dismissive staff. If it was a 10 minute wait, fine, stuff happens. And I wouldn’t have minded their mood much because slicing all that vegetable looks damn sian.

But 45 minutes?! Sorry, no. Now we both bad mood, y’all no excuse. I rather come inside help y’all slice vegetable than wait there stare at ceiling and kena grumpy face.

Also there was barely any fish like 2 if you try very hard, pray to all the gods, you can stretch that out to 3 slices max. And remember, this is for a large portion that’s supposed to feed 6-8 people. Bright side - there was a lot of crispy crispy. Like A LOT. Well, because it’s the cheapest ingredient.

100% Not worth the $$$ (64$). 100% not worth your time. And if you have to make an event or a schedule, don’t bother ordering pick up from this place.

Edit; just found out that Nyonya’s (another Malaysian restaurant) portions are way better, comes with jellyfish and $20 cheaper.
reviews.textTranslated:
Yusheng pertama saya di NYC. Dan sejujurnya, agak banyak, sayangnya harganya mahal. Porsinya sangat menyedihkan, saya pesan porsi besar. Waktu pengambilannya ditetapkan untuk 12 orang, mereka terlambat dan kami harus menunggu 45 menit dengan staf yang murung/tidak peduli. Kalau menunggu 10 menit, ya sudahlah, banyak hal yang terjadi. Dan saya tidak akan terlalu mempermasalahkan suasana hati mereka karena mengiris semua sayuran itu terlihat sangat kuno.

Tapi 45 menit?! Maaf, tidak. Sekarang suasana hati kita berdua sedang buruk, kalian tidak punya alasan. Saya lebih suka masuk dan membantu kalian mengiris sayuran daripada menunggu di sana menatap langit-langit dengan wajah kesal.

Juga, hampir tidak ada ikan, seperti 2 potong. Kalau kamu berusaha keras, berdoa kepada Tuhan, kamu bisa memperpanjangnya menjadi maksimal 3 potong. Dan ingat, ini untuk porsi besar yang seharusnya bisa untuk 6-8 orang. Sisi baiknya - ada banyak crispy crispy. Seperti BANYAK. Yah, karena itu bahan termurah.

100% tidak sepadan dengan $$$ (64$). 100% tidak sepadan dengan waktu Anda. Dan jika Anda harus membuat acara atau jadwal, jangan repot-repot memesan makanan untuk diambil dari tempat ini.

Edit; baru tahu kalau porsi Nyonya (restoran Malaysia lainnya) jauh lebih enak, dilengkapi dengan ubur-ubur, dan $20 lebih murah.

reviews.author: Maurice Windley
reviews.text:
Nice spot above a bookstore. Snag one from Aeon and head upstairs with friends to read.

Coffee is strong, and the servers are cool. Can't ask for more
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat yang bagus di atas toko buku. Dapatkan satu dari Aeon dan naik ke atas bersama teman-teman untuk membaca.

Kopinya kuat, dan pelayannya keren. Tak ada yang bisa diminta lebih.

reviews.author: Fang
reviews.text: Not good at all
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak bagus sama sekali

reviews.author: Kevin Ma
reviews.text: i had the nasi lemak, chilled spicy noodles, and milk tea. noodles were way too oily and left me with a bad feeling in my stomach. nasi lemak was fine, it’s just dried sardines over rice. not much to write home about. the tea was okay too.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pesan nasi lemak, mi pedas dingin, dan teh susu. Minya terlalu berminyak dan membuat perut saya terasa tidak enak. Nasi lemaknya biasa saja, hanya nasi dengan sarden kering. Tidak ada yang istimewa. Tehnya juga lumayan.

reviews.author: s kim
reviews.text: This place reminds me of Kopitam in Singapole, the traditional coffee shop -dinner like. They serve Great Malaysian authentic Kopi and food with modern twist. The atmosphere was just like a traditional coffee shops in Singapole nothing fancy and chaotic.  The Kaya toast was lots of kaya jam in between two thick toast. The Nasi lemak, honey come cake, pulut inti was very good and authentic. I can not wait to go back for the full breakfast.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini mengingatkan saya pada Kopitam di Singapura, kedai kopi tradisional yang menyajikan hidangan makan malam. Mereka menyajikan kopi dan makanan khas Malaysia yang lezat dengan sentuhan modern. Suasananya persis seperti kedai kopi tradisional di Singapura, tidak mewah dan semrawut. Roti panggang kaya-nya berisi selai kaya yang dijepit di antara dua roti panggang tebal. Nasi lemak, kue madu, dan pulut inti-nya sangat lezat dan autentik. Saya tak sabar untuk kembali lagi untuk menikmati sarapan lengkapnya.

reviews.author: Andy Kwong
reviews.text: The nasi lemak was very good. It was better than some of the nasi lemak that I had in Malaysia. The tok Tok mee was reminiscent of the ones from Malaysia as well. However, if you don't like your food too salty, ask them to put less sauce. The kaya toast was pandan flavored which I felt made it even better than regular kaya toast. The texture was spot on with crispy yet fluffy bread as well as the airy pandan/kaya filling. As a Chinese man, I felt it was a little sweeter than I would've liked but I still really enjoyed it. The teh tarik was also close to its Malaysia counterparts, but was a bit sweeter than I like as well. The atmosphere was very chill, almost cafe-like which I like. You are also expected to clear your own tables which I'm fine with. Tipping culture is getting a bit out of hand these days so it's great to be able to save some money especially in the city.
reviews.textTranslated: Nasi lemaknya sangat enak. Lebih enak daripada beberapa nasi lemak yang pernah saya makan di Malaysia. Tok Tok mee-nya mengingatkan saya pada yang dari Malaysia juga. Namun, jika Anda tidak suka makanan Anda terlalu asin, mintalah mereka untuk mengurangi sausnya. Roti panggang kaya beraroma pandan yang menurut saya membuatnya lebih enak daripada roti panggang kaya biasa. Teksturnya pas dengan roti yang renyah namun lembut serta isian pandan/kaya yang lapang. Sebagai orang Tionghoa, saya merasa itu sedikit lebih manis daripada yang saya suka tetapi saya tetap sangat menikmatinya. Teh tariknya juga dekat dengan rekan-rekannya di Malaysia, tetapi sedikit lebih manis dari yang saya suka. Suasananya sangat santai, hampir seperti kafe yang saya suka. Anda juga diharapkan untuk membersihkan meja Anda sendiri yang tidak masalah bagi saya. Budaya memberi tip semakin tidak terkendali akhir-akhir ini jadi sangat menyenangkan bisa menghemat uang terutama di kota.

reviews.author: AL
reviews.text: I tried the pan mee with soup and without soup, as well as the kuih talam. All of it was tasty and true to what I’ve had in Malaysia. I would come back again!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mencoba pan mee dengan kuah dan tanpa kuah, serta kuih talam. Semuanya enak dan sesuai dengan yang pernah saya makan di Malaysia. Saya pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Eric Klarman
reviews.text: Stopped in for their "white coffee" and enjoyed it very much.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mampir untuk memesan "kopi putih" mereka dan sangat menikmatinya.

reviews.author: jesuis_jasper
reviews.text: A Malaysian food stall in Chinatown area!
reviews.textTranslated: Sebuah kedai makanan Malaysia di daerah Pecinan!

reviews.author: J P
reviews.text:
Chicken was not salted at all. I generally like mild food, but it was.... just chicken.
Noodle with pork and dumpling in black sauce was pretty good.

Overall I really don't get it why they even bother to ask for tip... You need to even clean your own plate?
The cashier was fairly rude. I get that it can be busy, but isn't it service work? And ask for tip?
reviews.textTranslated:
Ayamnya sama sekali tidak asin. Saya biasanya suka makanan yang tidak terlalu asin, tapi ini... hanya ayam biasa.

Mie dengan daging babi dan pangsit saus hitam cukup enak.

Secara keseluruhan, saya benar-benar tidak mengerti mengapa mereka repot-repot meminta tip... Anda bahkan perlu membersihkan piring Anda sendiri?

Kasirnya cukup kasar. Saya mengerti bahwa tempat itu mungkin ramai, tetapi bukankah itu pekerjaan pelayanan? Dan meminta tip?

reviews.author: Alyssa P
reviews.text: I’m Singaporean/Malaysian and I’ve come here 3 times to give it a chance, each and every time it’s just been disappointment. The food is very mid and not authentic. The tok tok mee (wanton Mee) was like choking on a cloud of pepper and was so unpleasant to eat. I preordered and prepaid a dish for a certain time and when I arrived on time, they had forgotten my order and I had to wait another 20 min to get it, defeating the point of preorder. I’ve really tried to give it a chance but I always leave this place feeling so upset, there’s so many better Malaysian places out there.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya orang Singapura/Malaysia dan sudah tiga kali ke sini untuk mencoba, dan setiap kali selalu mengecewakan. Makanannya biasa saja dan tidak autentik. Tok tok mee (mi wonton)-nya seperti tersedak merica dan sangat tidak enak dimakan. Saya sudah memesan dan membayar di muka untuk hidangan tertentu, dan ketika saya tiba tepat waktu, mereka lupa pesanan saya dan saya harus menunggu 20 menit lagi, yang justru mengalahkan tujuan memesan di muka. Saya sudah berusaha keras untuk mencobanya, tetapi saya selalu pulang dengan perasaan kecewa. Padahal, masih banyak tempat makan Malaysia yang lebih enak di luar sana.

reviews.author: Amphas K
reviews.text: I had kaya toast， chicken wings, and water Spinach. Chicken wing is too sweet and you could taste that the oil to fried the chicken wings was used over and over; water spinach is death salty. The place is messy, dirty and smelly. I have no idea that how they get the A grade. The garbage can is right next to your table at the same high as your table. The glass is never clear clean wiped. And the supplies are out next to you and messy. The environment is terrible~
reviews.textTranslated: Saya makan roti panggang kaya, sayap ayam, dan bayam air. Sayap ayamnya terlalu manis dan Anda bisa merasakan minyak gorengnya digunakan berulang kali; bayam air asin sekali. Tempatnya berantakan, kotor, dan bau. Saya tidak tahu bagaimana mereka bisa mendapat nilai A. Tempat sampahnya tepat di sebelah meja Anda, setinggi meja Anda. Gelasnya tidak pernah bersih dan dilap. Dan perlengkapannya tergeletak di samping Anda dan berantakan. Lingkungannya buruk sekali~

reviews.author: Poorvi Hosabettu
reviews.text:
Food was great, service was super nice despite the busy crowd, atmosphere was lively.
It was cold, so we ordered the family style white curry noodles, kaya toast, and the iced bek kopi. Everything came quickly and tasted great.
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya enak, pelayanannya sangat baik meskipun pengunjungnya ramai, dan suasananya meriah.
Karena dingin, kami memesan mi kari putih ala keluarga, roti panggang kaya, dan es kopi bek. Semuanya datang dengan cepat dan rasanya lezat.

reviews.author: Tidalus
reviews.text: Nice atmosphere, very helpful and courteous staff. A bunch of tasty options you can mix and match.
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya nyaman, stafnya sangat membantu dan sopan. Banyak pilihan lezat yang bisa Anda padu-padankan.

reviews.author: Yan Wan Foo
reviews.text:
As a Malaysian myself, the quality of the food is good. I ordered the nasi lemak (good portions for value, the anchovies and peanuts are not crispy as you would usually have them but still packed with flavour together with the sambal - small amounts but with a really good spice kick)

The beef in the beef rendang is slightly dry (might be the cut of the beef) but good flavor and portions that came with rice.

Lastly I had the chow kueh teow (stir fried flat rice noodles) which was a longer wait but worth it - fresh out of the wok, had all authentic ingredients you would usually have - crispy pork lard, lap cheong (Chinese cured dried sausage) and mini oysters/clams.

It’s a order and pay first place and you put your used plates into assigned basket after the end of your meal
reviews.textTranslated:
Sebagai orang Malaysia, kualitas makanannya bagus. Saya memesan nasi lemak (porsinya pas untuk harga segitu, ikan teri dan kacangnya tidak terlalu renyah seperti biasanya, tetapi tetap kaya rasa, ditambah sambalnya—sedikit tapi dengan rasa pedas yang sangat kuat).

Daging sapi dalam rendang agak kering (mungkin karena potongan dagingnya), tetapi rasanya enak dan porsinya pas dengan nasi.

Terakhir, saya memesan chow kueh teow (bihun pipih yang ditumis) yang memang agak lama menunggu, tetapi sepadan. Baru diangkat dari wajan, semuanya berisi bahan-bahan autentik yang biasa Anda temukan—lemak babi renyah, lap cheong (sosis kering ala Cina), dan tiram/kerang mini.

Pesan dan bayar dulu, lalu masukkan piring bekas Anda ke keranjang yang ditentukan setelah selesai makan.

reviews.author: Frugal Cyclist
reviews.text:
Frugal Monday brought me to the outer skirts of chinatown after 40 miles of cycling. Yes, I brought my appetite too. This is a 2nd floor walk up and has a nice view of the street. You need to scan the QR code on table to see the menu.

At the counter, I ordered the Char Kway Teow without pork and a curry puff, was assigned a numbered flag. Server brought food over after 5 minutes. Very polite and accommodating, especially for allowing me to bring my bike inside. 🙏🏻🙏🏻

The food was good but I was expecting to be WOWED due to reviews. I like the location & vibe but it’s not a place I recommend for date night.

Some constructive feedback:
1) the reusable plastic chopsticks & spoons need to be replaced with wooden disposable utensils. The small reusable plastic plate also downgrades the experience. I don’t mind dining at a low cost establishment but I can’t have a date feeling that way. 😅😅
2) the noodle portion was small
3) add a LARGE menu behind counter to speed up ordering for customers that are non tech savvy
4) the place can be more organized.

I would return again in 60 days to see if any improvements. I hope these boys step up their game! It would be great to see these guys succeed 🙏🏻🙏🏻
reviews.textTranslated:
Senin Hemat membawa saya ke pinggiran Chinatown setelah bersepeda sejauh 40 mil. Ya, saya juga membawa selera makan saya. Restoran ini terletak di lantai 2 dan memiliki pemandangan jalan yang indah. Anda perlu memindai kode QR di meja untuk melihat menu.

Di konter, saya memesan Char Kway Teow tanpa daging babi dan kari puff, dan diberi bendera bernomor. Pelayan membawa makanan setelah 5 menit. Sangat sopan dan akomodatif, terutama karena mengizinkan saya membawa sepeda masuk. 🙏🏻🙏🏻

Makanannya enak, tetapi saya berharap akan TERKEJUT karena ulasannya. Saya suka lokasi & suasananya, tetapi ini bukan tempat yang saya rekomendasikan untuk kencan malam.

Beberapa masukan yang membangun:
1) Sumpit & sendok plastik yang dapat digunakan kembali perlu diganti dengan peralatan makan kayu sekali pakai. Piring plastik kecil yang dapat digunakan kembali juga mengurangi pengalaman. Saya tidak keberatan makan di tempat murah, tapi saya tidak bisa berkencan dengan suasana seperti itu. 😅😅
2) Porsi mi-nya kecil
3) Tambahkan menu BESAR di belakang meja kasir untuk mempercepat pemesanan bagi pelanggan yang kurang paham teknologi
4) Tempatnya bisa lebih tertata.

Saya akan kembali lagi dalam 60 hari untuk melihat apakah ada peningkatan. Saya harap mereka meningkatkan performanya! Senang sekali melihat mereka sukses 🙏🏻🙏🏻

reviews.author: Mau Morita
reviews.text: Cerca del Puente de Manhattan, rico desayuno ligero, ambiente agradable
reviews.textTranslated: Dekat Jembatan Manhattan, sarapan ringan yang lezat, suasana yang menyenangkan

reviews.author: Michael Germain
reviews.text: The Pan Mee and the white salted Malaysian coffee are legit. Oh Kaya butter toast also rocks.
reviews.textTranslated: Pan Mee dan kopi putih asin Malaysia-nya mantap. Roti panggang mentega Oh Kaya juga mantap.

reviews.author: Zak Kaplan
reviews.text: Bang on delish and not too pricey!! Feasted on Balachan Wings, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, and Fish Ball Soup! That anchovy crunch and that Balachan tang! Easy self serve setup nothing too fancy and everything tasty here!
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget dan harganya juga terjangkau!! Sayap Balachan, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, dan Sup Bakso Ikan! Kerenyahan ikan teri dan rasa asam Balachan-nya! Layanan swalayan yang mudah, tidak ada yang terlalu mewah, dan semuanya lezat!

reviews.author: Amy Won
reviews.text:
Penang-born and grew up on the famous Penang hawker food. I've eaten at Malaysian restaurants all over the US and I'll have to say that something about Kopitiam is magic.

The name is genius for one but they do so many things right that if you've ever been or enjoyed Penang dining you'll get it instantly.

I've tried the White Curry Mee (pig blood woohoo!!), Tok Tok Mee, Nasi Lemak - three classics and they are the best of any I've ever had in the US.

What did they do right?

First of all, the portions. There is a magical golden ratio of carb to protein to sauce/soup in a bowl or plate. Get that ratio wrong and the experience is off. Kopitiam is Penang-sized portions, perfect for quick meals, sharing with family and the 80% full satisfaction.

The flavor. They don't hold back on flavor and after dining at so many Malaysiam restaurants serving 'Penang' food,  its startling how hard it is to nail the flavor profile. Not so here, satisfies my picky Malaysian palate. Garnishes and toppings are authentic to home, sauces and soups just the right color and nuanced flavor.

Tableware. We underestimate how much tableware can add to the experience of eating. They serve their foods in classic ceramic Penang coffeeshop bowls and the ubiquitous sturdy plastic chopsticks. Not a disposable utensil in sight and everything soaked in nostalgia.

I eagerly await my next time there, please ignore all the complaints about your Penang quirkiness, keep doing what you do! We love it!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Lahir di Penang dan dibesarkan dengan makanan kaki lima Penang yang terkenal. Saya sudah makan di restoran Malaysia di seluruh AS dan harus saya akui bahwa ada sesuatu yang ajaib tentang Kopitiam.

Namanya saja sudah jenius, tetapi mereka melakukan begitu banyak hal dengan benar sehingga jika Anda pernah ke atau menikmati makanan Penang, Anda akan langsung mengerti.

Saya sudah mencoba White Curry Mee (darah babi, yey!!), Tok Tok Mee, Nasi Lemak - tiga hidangan klasik dan itu adalah yang terbaik dari semua yang pernah saya makan di AS.

Apa yang mereka lakukan dengan benar?

Pertama-tama, porsinya. Ada rasio emas ajaib antara karbohidrat, protein, dan saus/kuah dalam mangkuk atau piring. Jika rasio itu salah, pengalamannya akan kurang memuaskan. Kopitiam memiliki porsi ala Penang, sempurna untuk makan cepat, berbagi dengan keluarga, dan kepuasan 80% penuh.

Rasanya. Mereka tidak pelit soal rasa, dan setelah makan di begitu banyak restoran Malaysia yang menyajikan makanan 'Penang', sungguh mengejutkan betapa sulitnya untuk mendapatkan profil rasa yang tepat. Tidak demikian di sini, memuaskan selera saya yang pilih-pilih sebagai orang Malaysia. Hiasan dan toppingnya otentik seperti di rumah, saus dan supnya memiliki warna yang pas dan rasa yang kaya.

Peralatan makan. Kita meremehkan betapa pentingnya peralatan makan dalam meningkatkan pengalaman makan. Mereka menyajikan makanan mereka dalam mangkuk keramik klasik kedai kopi Penang dan sumpit plastik kokoh yang umum digunakan. Tidak ada peralatan makan sekali pakai yang terlihat dan semuanya dipenuhi nostalgia.

Saya sangat menantikan kunjungan saya berikutnya ke sana, mohon abaikan semua keluhan tentang keunikan Penang Anda, teruslah lakukan apa yang Anda lakukan! Kami menyukainya!!

reviews.author: J L
reviews.text: A small Malaysian restaurant. The food was good looking but overall, plain and pricy. Ingredients of some dishes suggested taste of coconut milk, but that was missing. I'll definitely avoid it.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran Malaysia kecil. Makanannya tampak menarik, tetapi secara keseluruhan, biasa saja dan mahal. Bahan-bahan di beberapa hidangan terasa seperti santan, tetapi rasanya kurang. Saya pasti akan menghindarinya.

reviews.author: Erin Curley
reviews.text:
Got their "Kopitiam Classics" Set Menu bc I don’t know a lot about Malaysian food and it was a great choice for a newbie.
Nasi Lemak was so good I’m now craving anchovies constantly. Great place to visit. Sizes on the smaller side for the price but it’s lower Manhattan so expected.
Cozy places to stop, sit and get a quick bite to eat. Def will go again!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan Set Menu "Kopitiam Classics" karena saya tidak terlalu paham tentang makanan Malaysia dan itu pilihan yang bagus untuk pemula.
Nasi Lemaknya sangat enak sampai-sampai saya jadi ketagihan ikan teri. Tempat yang bagus untuk dikunjungi. Porsinya agak kecil untuk harganya, tapi memang begitulah di Lower Manhattan jadi wajar.
Tempat yang nyaman untuk berhenti, duduk, dan makan cepat. Pasti akan datang lagi!

reviews.author: Susan Kurien
reviews.text: Very tasty food.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang sangat enak.

reviews.author: Dawn Romero
reviews.text: nice atmosphere! I was left with a very pleasant impression!
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya menyenangkan! Saya mendapat kesan yang sangat baik!

reviews.author: Noel Konagai
reviews.text: I come back here very often for the nasi lemak, pandan chicken, and the Kaya toast. The atmosphere is so perfect as the restaurant is reminiscent of actual kopitiams in Malaysia. Even the drink bags are reminders of these establishments (however the loop on them is too small to hang the cold drinks on the wrist).
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sering kembali ke sini untuk menikmati nasi lemak, ayam pandan, dan roti panggang Kaya. Suasananya sungguh sempurna karena restoran ini mengingatkan kita pada kopitiam asli di Malaysia. Bahkan kantong minumannya pun mengingatkan kita pada tempat-tempat ini (walaupun talinya terlalu kecil untuk menggantungkan minuman dingin di pergelangan tangan).

reviews.author: koa kamot
reviews.text: Not the best food, kind of dry and lacking flavor but nice atmosphere and people
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya tidak terlalu enak, agak kering dan kurang rasa, tapi suasananya menyenangkan dan orang-orangnya ramah.

reviews.author: Victor Huang
reviews.text:
I came here because I missed food from home, and it definitely satisfied it.

I got belacan wings and nasi lemak, and the taste is on point. The sambal was great with the subtle coconut rice. The prawn paste on the wings was great.

It’s mostly self service, which is how it would be done locally.
reviews.textTranslated:
Aku datang ke sini karena rindu makanan dari rumah, dan makanan di sini benar-benar memuaskan.

Aku memesan sayap belacan dan nasi lemak, dan rasanya sangat pas. Sambalnya enak sekali dengan nasi kelapa yang lembut. Pasta udang pada sayapnya juga enak.

Sebagian besar sistemnya swalayan, seperti yang biasa dilakukan di daerah setempat.

reviews.author: Meenakshi Janardhanan
reviews.text:
This place is an absolute gem and I do not miss a chance to go. The food is delicious!
The cold sesame noodles, kaya toast, haianese chicken and nasi lemak have my whole soul. It’s also very affordable!
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat ini benar-benar permata dan saya tidak pernah melewatkan kesempatan untuk mengunjunginya. Makanannya lezat!
Mi wijen dingin, roti panggang kaya, ayam Hainan, dan nasi lemaknya benar-benar memanjakan saya. Harganya juga sangat terjangkau!

reviews.author: alexis ching
reviews.text: Great breakfast spot. Super simple Malaysian home cooking.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat sarapan yang enak. Masakan rumahan Malaysia yang sangat sederhana.

reviews.author: Mel W
reviews.text:
It's hard to find good Malaysian food in NY. For a casual option, kopitiam is pretty good.
Tables are self -service, so it can be hard to get a seat if there are more than a couple of you. We ordered a few dishes to share, portions are generally on the smaller side. Share plates are all disposable paper.
Nasi lemak is very minimal without any options to add protein or curry, which was fine. Char kway teo was a bit bland.
Loved the iced drinks.
reviews.textTranslated:
Sulit menemukan makanan Malaysia yang enak di New York. Untuk pilihan santai, kopitiam cukup enak.
Meja-mejanya swalayan, jadi mungkin sulit mendapatkan tempat duduk jika ada lebih dari dua orang. Kami memesan beberapa hidangan untuk berbagi, porsinya umumnya lebih kecil. Piring untuk berbagi semuanya terbuat dari kertas sekali pakai.
Nasi lemaknya sangat minim tanpa pilihan untuk menambahkan protein atau kari, yang sebenarnya tidak masalah. Char kway teo-nya agak hambar.
Saya suka minuman esnya.

reviews.author: Chu Rebecca
reviews.text: 口味一般般 外卖很难吃
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya biasa saja, dan makanan untuk dibawa pulang sangat buruk.

reviews.author: Vivek Khatri
reviews.text: Great food and teas! Slightly overpriced.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan tehnya enak! Harganya agak kemahalan.

reviews.author: Kevin A
reviews.text: Really good malaysian cuisine, a must try!
reviews.textTranslated: Masakan Malaysia yang sangat enak, wajib dicoba!

reviews.author: G. Lee
reviews.text: Love love love this place. It’s out of way for me finally made an effort to stop by for kaya butter toast! It’s very yummy and the noodles were excellent. I wish it has multiple locations in the city!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Aku sangat suka tempat ini. Lokasinya agak jauh dari tempatku, akhirnya aku menyempatkan diri untuk mampir dan mencoba roti panggang kaya mentega! Rasanya sangat enak dan mienya juga luar biasa. Aku berharap mereka punya lebih banyak cabang di kota ini!!!!

reviews.author: nellie ping
reviews.text: Love their Nasi lemak and chicken wings . Must give it a try. Make me feel like home 🏡
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget nasi lemak dan sayap ayam mereka. Wajib coba. Bikin aku merasa seperti di rumah sendiri 🏡

reviews.author: Esther Ko
reviews.text:
Everything I had here was just average. I was craving some Hokkien mee and decided to try this place, and the food wasn’t horrible, but if you’re looking for something close to authentic, it’s not here. The food is bland, and Malaysian cuisine is far from bland.

My boyfriend ordered char koay teow that also tasted bland - absolutely nothing like char koay teow. Their teh tarik is like chai with too much water.

Overall, if you’re just looking to try something new, maybe you might like it as everyone else seems to have liked it. But if you’re a Malaysian looking for your comfort meal, please save yourself the disappointment and $30
reviews.textTranslated:
Semua yang saya pesan di sini biasa saja. Saya sedang ingin makan Hokkien mee dan memutuskan untuk mencoba tempat ini, dan makanannya tidak mengerikan, tetapi jika Anda mencari sesuatu yang mendekati otentik, tempat ini bukan tempatnya. Makanannya hambar, dan masakan Malaysia jauh dari hambar.

Pacar saya memesan char koay teow yang rasanya juga hambar - sama sekali tidak seperti char koay teow. Teh tariknya seperti chai dengan terlalu banyak air.

Secara keseluruhan, jika Anda hanya ingin mencoba sesuatu yang baru, mungkin Anda akan menyukainya karena orang lain tampaknya menyukainya. Tetapi jika Anda orang Malaysia yang mencari makanan rumahan, tolong hindari kekecewaan dan uang $30 Anda.

reviews.author: Sandy
reviews.text: Felt like the food was overhyped. Personally not my cup of tea but glad I tried
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya makanannya terlalu dibesar-besarkan. Secara pribadi, saya kurang suka, tapi senang sudah mencobanya.

reviews.author: Kanokrat Eawsiri
reviews.text: I would say Nasi Lemak here is the best and their sambal sauce is so tasty. And the kaya toast is very nice, kaya jam is very smooth and creamy. Perfect brunch set for me. Definitely come back!
reviews.textTranslated: Menurut saya, Nasi Lemak di sini adalah yang terbaik dan saus sambalnya sangat lezat. Dan roti kaya-nya juga sangat enak, selai kayanya sangat lembut dan creamy. Set brunch yang sempurna untuk saya. Pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Kelly Cooke
reviews.text: HIGHLY RECOMMEND. First time trying Nasi Lemak after seeing all the hype and it did not disappoint! Great vibes and staff was very friendly. Could come here any time of day. Great spot in LES - I’ll be back! Excited to try the Tok Tok Mee! Thanks Kopitiam! Casual vibes and could be great to go solo or with a friend/out of towners! It’s inexpensive too 🤑
reviews.textTranslated: SANGAT DIREKOMENDASIKAN. Pertama kali mencoba Nasi Lemak setelah melihat semua hype-nya dan tidak mengecewakan! Suasananya bagus dan stafnya sangat ramah. Bisa datang ke sini kapan saja. Tempat yang bagus di LES - saya akan kembali! Tidak sabar untuk mencoba Tok Tok Mee! Terima kasih Kopitiam! Suasananya santai dan cocok untuk pergi sendirian atau bersama teman/orang dari luar kota! Harganya juga terjangkau 🤑

reviews.author: Camille Roulin
reviews.text: Great !
reviews.textTranslated: Besar !

reviews.author: Monika
reviews.text: Server host cute men are nice. But the food is terrible.. will never visiting again
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayan prianya tampan dan ramah. Tapi makanannya mengerikan... tidak akan pernah berkunjung lagi.

reviews.author: anteres N
reviews.text: Food is OK. It’s overpriced in my opinion. Very small plates but huge price tag.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan. Menurut saya harganya terlalu mahal. Porsinya kecil tapi harganya selangit.

reviews.author: Juliana Montoya
reviews.text: Food was okay, would not recommend or go back. The chicken was cold and the rice had little flavor. The wings were the best thing we tried crispy
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan, tidak akan direkomendasikan atau kembali lagi. Ayamnya dingin dan nasinya kurang berasa. Sayap ayamnya renyah dan paling enak yang kami coba.

reviews.author: Rachel Lanskey
reviews.text: Cheap little spot for a quick bite , decent Malaysian food.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat kecil yang murah untuk makan cepat, makanan Malaysia yang enak.

reviews.author: Paul Hoffzimmer
reviews.text: food is great! service is great!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak! Pelayanannya bagus!

reviews.author: Jade
reviews.text:
The food is great, but the service is so disorganized that I can't give this place better than an average rating.

We came here for dinner after the first day of Electric Zoo got cancelled to get the Hainanese chicken and rice. Upon entering, you have to order first, take a number, and find a table similar to dining in at a fast food establishment. Unfortunately, a large group ordered right ahead of us, and the cashier mistakenly thought we were part of that group, so we waited over a half hour for our food before my partner got up to investigate. Sure enough, the staff forgot about us. We received our food fairly quickly after we asked about it though.

The food was quite tasty, but they ran out of chicken rice, so they gave us coconut rice instead, and mine was overly salty. My partner said the coconut rice was fine but then tried mine and agreed it tasted super salty. Despite the Hainanese chicken tasting good, it was disappointing that there was no chicken rice to go with it, which is 50% of the experience of eating the dish. It wasn't even that late, so I think they could've prepared better that night.

In conclusion, the food is good and priced affordably, but I probably wouldn't go out of my way again to get it due to the lack of organization and the variable availability of key ingredients.
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya enak, tapi pelayanannya sangat tidak terorganisir sehingga saya tidak bisa memberikan tempat ini peringkat lebih baik dari rata-rata.

Kami datang ke sini untuk makan malam setelah hari pertama Electric Zoo dibatalkan untuk memesan ayam Hainan dan nasi. Saat masuk, Anda harus memesan terlebih dahulu, mengambil nomor, dan mencari meja, mirip dengan makan di restoran cepat saji. Sayangnya, sekelompok besar orang memesan tepat di depan kami, dan kasir salah mengira kami bagian dari kelompok itu, jadi kami menunggu lebih dari setengah jam untuk makanan kami sebelum pasangan saya bangun untuk menyelidiki. Benar saja, staf lupa tentang kami. Namun, kami menerima makanan kami dengan cukup cepat setelah kami menanyakannya.

Makanannya cukup enak, tetapi mereka kehabisan nasi ayam, jadi mereka memberi kami nasi kelapa sebagai gantinya, dan nasi kelapa saya terlalu asin. Pasangan saya mengatakan nasi kelapa baik-baik saja tetapi kemudian mencoba nasi kelapa saya dan setuju rasanya sangat asin. Meskipun ayam Hainan rasanya enak, sangat mengecewakan karena tidak ada nasi ayam untuk menemaninya, yang merupakan 50% dari pengalaman makan hidangan tersebut. Bahkan belum terlalu larut, jadi menurutku mereka bisa mempersiapkan diri lebih baik malam itu.

Kesimpulannya, makanannya enak dan harganya terjangkau, tetapi mungkin aku tidak akan repot-repot datang lagi untuk makan di sana karena kurangnya organisasi dan ketersediaan bahan-bahan utama yang tidak menentu.

reviews.author: Karen Oh
reviews.text: Always tasty, good vibe, great drinks (Want coffee AND tea? Cham!). Love this place for a full meal, snacks, and/or sharing.
reviews.textTranslated: Selalu enak, suasananya nyaman, minumannya enak (Mau kopi DAN teh? Cham!). Suka tempat ini untuk makan lengkap, camilan, dan/atau berbagi.

reviews.author: Fred Noinaj
reviews.text: If you’ve had Malaysian food and coffee and are familiar with the cuisine, this place is amazing. If you haven’t had it and like Southeast Asian flavors add this to you list.
reviews.textTranslated: Jika Anda pernah mencicipi makanan dan kopi Malaysia dan familier dengan kulinernya, tempat ini sungguh luar biasa. Jika Anda belum pernah mencicipinya dan menyukai cita rasa Asia Tenggara, tambahkan tempat ini ke daftar Anda.

reviews.author: Emily
reviews.text: The tok tok mee was good, though I found the portion to be a bit small. I left not entirely full. My partner had the Milo French toast which he enjoyed. It was very soft and not too sweet. The lychee Bandung was like a fruit tea with actual lychee in it. It was very mild, but difficult to get the fruit out at the end to eat. It came in an interesting ziploc pouch so you can take it to-go if you want. My partner also got a coffee which tasted unique. They have a very big menu with items you won’t find at your usual Asian restaurant, most likely because it is a Malaysian/Chinese hybrid restaurant, which is not commonly found.
reviews.textTranslated: Tok tok mee-nya enak, meskipun menurut saya porsinya agak kecil. Saya tidak sampai kenyang. Pasangan saya memesan roti panggang Milo dan dia menyukainya. Rotinya sangat lembut dan tidak terlalu manis. Lychee Bandung seperti teh buah dengan leci asli di dalamnya. Rasanya sangat ringan, tetapi sulit untuk mengeluarkan buahnya di akhir untuk dimakan. Minuman ini dikemas dalam kantong ziploc yang menarik sehingga Anda dapat membawanya pulang jika Anda mau. Pasangan saya juga memesan kopi yang rasanya unik. Mereka memiliki menu yang sangat banyak dengan item yang tidak akan Anda temukan di restoran Asia biasa, kemungkinan besar karena ini adalah restoran campuran Malaysia/Tiongkok, yang tidak umum ditemukan.

reviews.author: Juan Carlos Matos
reviews.text: Cenas diferente otro nivel degustación única recomendado siempre que viaje a new York comida asiática
reviews.textTranslated: Makan malam yang berbeda, tingkat rasa yang unik, direkomendasikan setiap kali Anda bepergian ke New York, makanan Asia

reviews.author: Gaby Cepeda
reviews.text: so good!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus!!!!

reviews.author: MC
reviews.text: Visited on a Monday afternoon, and half of the items I wanted to order was sold out. The Kaya butter toast and the chicken wings was good, but the other two dishes were too salty.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya berkunjung pada hari Senin siang, dan setengah dari menu yang ingin saya pesan sudah habis. Roti panggang mentega Kaya dan sayap ayamnya enak, tetapi dua hidangan lainnya terlalu asin.

reviews.author: Richard
reviews.text: Consistently solid spot for breakfast.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang selalu bagus untuk sarapan.

reviews.author: Matthew Lopez
reviews.text: Amazing place! Food was great!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang luar biasa! Makanannya enak sekali!

reviews.author: Layla Obeid
reviews.text: Stuffy air and their chicken meal was a disappointment. Service is ok
reviews.textTranslated: Udara pengap dan makanan ayamnya mengecewakan. Pelayanannya lumayan.

reviews.author: Daphne Shen
reviews.text:
Nice small place for Malaysian Treats.

We had stir-fried crispy duck tongue, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, Malaysian Style Half Boiled Eggs, Pandan Chicken, Lobak, and Honeycomb cake

From the decreasing recommendation level:
Nasi Lemak = duck tongue = honeycomb cake > pandan chicken = char kway teow > lobak > half-boiled egg.

The Nasi Lemak’s anchovy with nut sauce is sweet and savory. Paired greater with cucumber. The rice is coconut flavored and we just cannot stop digging it.

The duck tongue is paired with spicy shrimp paste and taste crispy outside and chewy inside. The shrimp paste is so yummy!

The honeycomb cake is not overly sweet and like it said, has a hint of caramel and toffee. It is very very good. It reminds me of Bika Ambon (Indonesian Honeycomb Cake) or Golden Sponge Cake depends on the region you are from.

Pandan chicken is basically zongzi-shaped chicken. It taste similar to the inner pork filling of lobak, since both are sweet. The bean curd on the outside of lobak is crispy, and a bit on the dry side.

And the boiled egg… while, it has a sprinkle of umami mushroom seasoning on top of half-boiled egg, and beside that, not impressive.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat kecil yang bagus untuk menikmati hidangan khas Malaysia.

Kami memesan lidah bebek goreng renyah, Char Kway Teow, Nasi Lemak, Telur Setengah Matang ala Malaysia, Ayam Pandan, Lobak, dan Kue Sarang Lebah.

Dari tingkat rekomendasi menurun:
Nasi Lemak = lidah bebek = kue sarang lebah > ayam pandan = char kway teow > lobak > telur setengah matang.

Ikan teri dengan saus kacang pada Nasi Lemak rasanya manis dan gurih. Lebih cocok dipadukan dengan mentimun. Nasinya beraroma kelapa dan kami tidak bisa berhenti memakannya.

Lidah bebek dipadukan dengan pasta udang pedas dan rasanya renyah di luar dan kenyal di dalam. Pasta udangnya sangat lezat!

Kue sarang lebahnya tidak terlalu manis dan seperti yang dikatakan, memiliki sedikit rasa karamel dan toffee. Rasanya sangat enak. Mengingatkan saya pada Bika Ambon (Kue Sarang Lebah Indonesia) atau Kue Bolu Emas, tergantung daerah asal Anda.


Ayam pandan pada dasarnya adalah ayam berbentuk zongzi. Rasanya mirip dengan isian babi di dalam lobak, karena keduanya manis. Tahu di bagian luar lobak renyah, dan agak kering.

Dan telur rebusnya… meskipun ada taburan bumbu jamur umami di atas telur setengah matang, selain itu, tidak terlalu mengesankan.

reviews.author: Anna Liu
reviews.text: Great Authenticated Malaysia food! Will come again!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Malaysia otentik yang luar biasa! Akan datang lagi!

reviews.author: Wesley Villano
reviews.text: My favorite coffee shop in the city. Lots of heart and soul.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi favoritku di kota ini. Penuh hati dan jiwa.

reviews.author: Rebecca Jeanson
reviews.text: Delicious and cozy! Love the logo too.
reviews.textTranslated: Enak dan nyaman! Suka juga dengan logonya.

reviews.author: Anne Hathaway did not spit in my food.
reviews.text: Decent-sized bowl of Nasi Ledak (Malaysian national dish) for less than ten bucks. Anchovy lovers rejoice! Good beverage selection and cute restaurant.
reviews.textTranslated: Semangkuk Nasi Ledak (hidangan nasional Malaysia) dengan porsi lumayan besar seharga kurang dari sepuluh dolar. Pecinta ikan teri bergembira! Pilihan minuman yang beragam dan restoran yang cantik.

reviews.author: kelly lee
reviews.text: Rainy humid summer day, no air conditioner! Too humid in there. Too many noises plus loud music. Food is alright, they were better when I first found them in a tiny little store. Happy for their success but food quality went down.
reviews.textTranslated: Hari musim panas yang lembap dan hujan, tanpa AC! Terlalu lembap di sana. Terlalu banyak suara bising ditambah musik yang keras. Makanannya lumayan, rasanya lebih enak saat pertama kali saya menemukannya di toko kecil. Senang dengan kesuksesan mereka, tetapi kualitas makanannya menurun.

reviews.author: Joanna Beckenham
reviews.text: We loved it.  Definitely recommend.  Highly. I loved the delicious food and the wait staff was completely organized and the service was fantastic.    We've been here 2 or 3 times now.   Definitely will return again soon.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menyukainya. Sangat direkomendasikan. Sangat. Saya suka makanannya yang lezat, staf pelayannya sangat terorganisir, dan pelayanannya fantastis. Kami sudah ke sini 2 atau 3 kali. Pasti akan kembali lagi dalam waktu dekat.

reviews.author: Bianca
reviews.text: Went here for breakfast with friends. Could get full pretty quickly. You will need to order up front and they will bring the dish to you. I got the Nasi Lemak which was tasty and I love the coffee and the packaging.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sarapan di sini bersama teman-teman. Bisa cepat kenyang. Anda perlu memesan di depan dan mereka akan mengantarkan hidangan kepada Anda. Saya memesan Nasi Lemak yang enak dan saya suka kopinya serta kemasannya.

reviews.author: Olivia N
reviews.text:
Overall rating: 4.1

Unfortunately, I don’t have any pictures of the food other than this shot. This was my first and maybe last time trying Malaysian food. The pictures on Google made it seem like this was a high end restaurant because they are so high quality.

So I was a bit surprised & a bit turned off when I realized this is more of a cafe eatery, east village type place. Pay at the cashier, seat yourself, nyu, type place. I think I may have just had higher expectations, and that’s my b.

I can’t fully remember what I had, but it was just okay. I’m not sure if the flavors just weren’t for me. But I was missing a kick. I do want to try it again for brunch since that’s when most of the reviews highlight.

But I’m also conscious there’s a chance I don’t like Malaysian food. I’ll have to try another restaurant and report back.
reviews.textTranslated:
Nilai keseluruhan: 4.1

Sayangnya, saya tidak punya foto makanannya selain foto ini. Ini pertama kalinya dan mungkin terakhir saya mencoba makanan Malaysia. Foto-foto di Google membuatnya tampak seperti restoran kelas atas karena kualitasnya yang sangat tinggi.

Jadi saya agak terkejut & agak kecewa ketika menyadari ini lebih seperti kafe, tempat makan di East Village. Bayar di kasir, duduk sendiri, tempat makan di New York. Saya rasa saya mungkin punya ekspektasi yang lebih tinggi, dan itu kesalahan saya.

Saya tidak ingat persis apa yang saya coba, tapi rasanya lumayan. Saya tidak yakin apakah rasanya memang tidak cocok untuk saya. Tapi saya kurang suka. Saya ingin mencobanya lagi untuk brunch karena saat itulah sebagian besar ulasan menyorotinya.

Tapi saya juga sadar ada kemungkinan saya tidak suka makanan Malaysia. Saya harus mencoba restoran lain dan melaporkannya kembali.

reviews.author: Bernarda A
reviews.text: Visiting NYC and needed to check out some southeastasian delicacies ! We enjoyed the kaya toast 🥰
reviews.textTranslated: Berkunjung ke NYC dan ingin mencoba beberapa hidangan khas Asia Tenggara! Kami menikmati roti panggang kaya 🥰

reviews.author: itzelenaho
reviews.text:
What great Malaysian atmosphere as soon as your arrived at the footsteps of Kopitiam hidden by Chinatown. That Malaysian old school pay phone and other decorations really set the vibe. Inside is a casual cafe style with authentic Malaysian drinks and eats you only find in Malaysia. Hand pulled coffee and tea that comes in a bag, legit Malaysian sweets that makes you feel like your in Malaysia, delicious fiery food that brings back memories, chopsticks and spoon in a bucket, and most importantly that atmosphere! Make sure to clean up after yourself because that’s what makes it more authentically in a casual Malaysian spot. Come experience Malaysia at Kopitiam.

Otak Otak （乌塔乌塔）— 6
Street Style Chee Cheong Fun （马来西亚咖喱甜酱肠粉）— 17
Stir-Fried Crispy Duck Tongue (脆皮鸭舌) - 13
Char Kway Teow (炒粿條) – 16

Penang-Style Hand-Rolled Muah Chee (V+)（槟城麻芝）— 7
Kuih Lapis（千层糕）— 3.75

Kopi Tarik （马来西亚手拉马来咖啡）— 5.75 (+0.5 iced)
Teh Tarik （马来西亚手拉奶茶）— 5.75 (+0.5 iced)
reviews.textTranslated:
Suasana Malaysia yang begitu meriah begitu Anda tiba di Kopitiam yang tersembunyi di balik Pecinan. Telepon umum khas Malaysia dan dekorasi lainnya benar-benar menciptakan suasana yang memikat. Di dalamnya terdapat kafe bergaya kasual dengan minuman dan makanan khas Malaysia yang hanya Anda temukan di Malaysia. Kopi dan teh tarik tangan yang dikemas dalam kantong, kudapan manis khas Malaysia yang membuat Anda merasa seperti di Malaysia, makanan pedas lezat yang membangkitkan kenangan, sumpit dan sendok dalam ember, dan yang terpenting, suasananya! Pastikan untuk membersihkan diri karena itulah yang membuat suasana di tempat kasual Malaysia terasa lebih autentik. Ayo rasakan Malaysia di Kopitiam.

Otak Otak (Otak Otak) — 6
Chee Cheong Fun Gaya Jalanan (nasi kari manis Malaysia) — 17
Lidah Bebek Renyah Goreng (lidah bebek renyah) - 13
Char Kway Teow – 16

Muah Chee Gulung Tangan ala Penang (V+) (Penang Mochi) — 7
Kuih Lapis (Kue Lapis) — 3.75

Kopi Tarik (Kopi Tarik Tangan Malaysia) — 5,75 (+0,5 es)
Teh Tarik (Teh Susu Tarik Tangan Malaysia) — 5,75 (+0,5 es)

reviews.author: Ji Lin Zhu
reviews.text:
Average casual spot for Malaysian dishes. None of the dishes really stood out and lacked uniqueness. But overall the food was tasty and slightly cheaper than average.

Ordering is done at the counter (kind of like fast food), and food is brought out to your table.

Went with a large group so I got to sample a bunch of dishes. Nothing bad but nothing exceptional either.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat santai yang biasa saja untuk menikmati hidangan Malaysia. Tidak ada hidangan yang benar-benar istimewa dan kurang unik. Namun secara keseluruhan, makanannya lezat dan harganya sedikit lebih murah daripada rata-rata.

Pemesanan dilakukan di konter (seperti makanan cepat saji), dan makanan diantar ke meja Anda.

Saya datang bersama rombongan besar, jadi saya bisa mencicipi banyak hidangan. Tidak ada yang buruk, tapi juga tidak ada yang istimewa.

reviews.author: c.w.
reviews.text:
it was my first time having malaysian food but definitely won’t be the last.
ordered a set to try a variety of food & everything was delicious & generously portioned.
the drinks were SO good and the food came fresh & fast. will definitely have to come back to try more items
fish ball soup came with vermicelli like noodles fyi
reviews.textTranslated:
Ini pertama kalinya saya makan makanan Malaysia, tapi pasti bukan yang terakhir.
Saya memesan satu set untuk mencoba berbagai makanan, dan semuanya lezat dan porsinya besar.
Minumannya SANGAT enak dan makanannya datang segar dan cepat. Pasti harus kembali untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu.
Sup bakso ikan disajikan dengan bihun seperti mi. Sebagai informasi,

reviews.author: Angela Peng
reviews.text: Great place for brunch or afternoon dessert! We got the kaya toast and noodle and 2 drinks. The kaya toast was my favorite! I've had it many times in Singapore but this one is just much better! The bread is fluffier and the kaya is thicker. I love the Milo coffee too it has strong flavors of chocolate. Definitely recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang cocok untuk brunch atau hidangan penutup sore! Kami memesan roti panggang kaya, mi, dan 2 minuman. Roti panggang kaya adalah favorit saya! Saya sudah sering mencobanya di Singapura, tetapi yang ini jauh lebih enak! Rotinya lebih mengembang dan kayanya lebih kental. Saya juga suka kopi Milo-nya, dengan rasa cokelat yang kuat. Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Leah Cranston
reviews.text: get the Kaya Butter Toast! it's my favorite tiny treat in Chinatown
reviews.textTranslated: Dapatkan Kaya Butter Toast! Ini camilan kecil favoritku di Chinatown

reviews.author: Harry Yang
reviews.text: Thought the set was ok, didn’t seem special. Other items might be good
reviews.textTranslated: Menurut saya setnya lumayan, tapi tidak istimewa. Barang lain mungkin bagus.

reviews.author: Nicola Wiseman
reviews.text: Had a wonderful meal here. Friendly fast service and great food.
reviews.textTranslated: Makan malam yang luar biasa di sini. Pelayanannya ramah dan cepat, dan makanannya enak.

reviews.author: Tony Go
reviews.text: A unique spot with unique food. It's self service which is fine, but the bathroom could use some work. The drinks come in pouches which are very reminiscent of Southeast Asian night markets. If you're at all a fan of Malaysian food, this is a must-try.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat unik dengan makanan yang unik. Layanan mandirinya lumayan, tapi kamar mandinya perlu diperbaiki. Minumannya dikemas dalam kantong yang mengingatkan kita pada pasar malam Asia Tenggara. Kalau Anda penggemar makanan Malaysia, tempat ini wajib dicoba.

reviews.author: Joey Cosco
reviews.text: Awesome food at this counter service Malaysian joint. 1 friend and I split several mains and sides for a delicious meal. Standouts include the chicken wings, the 5 spiced pork roll, and the chicken jerky on the pineapple bun.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa di restoran Malaysia dengan layanan konter ini. Saya dan seorang teman berbagi beberapa hidangan utama dan lauk untuk hidangan yang lezat. Menu unggulannya antara lain sayap ayam, gulung babi 5 rempah, dan dendeng ayam dengan roti nanas.

reviews.author: Garnet Liew
reviews.text: This was at the Dragon boat festival. I saw their spot and wanted to try it! I bought the Pulut inti. It is blue sticky rice with grated coconut. This reminds me of homemade Malaysian Nyonya cuisine and it’s nice to support my family’s country. Malaysian cuisine is a lot of work and truly happy that this place is continuing to make Malaysian cuisine!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini waktu Festival Perahu Naga. Saya melihat tempat mereka dan ingin mencobanya! Saya membeli Pulut Inti. Ini adalah nasi ketan biru dengan parutan kelapa. Ini mengingatkan saya pada masakan Nyonya Malaysia buatan sendiri dan senang rasanya bisa mendukung negara keluarga saya. Masakan Malaysia memang butuh banyak usaha, dan saya sangat senang tempat ini terus menyajikan masakan Malaysia!

reviews.author: Alon Grinshpoon
reviews.text: This place is a great Malaysian restaurant! 🇲🇾 Kopitiam offers an authentic dishes 🍽️ for Malaysia! Definitely get the Kaya Butter Toast (which was delicious 🤤) and Kuih Talam (a Green 🟢 Pandan and Coconut 🥥 Cream Pan Cake 🍰 which I didn't like, but happy I tried)! Staff 👨‍🍳 is friendly and welcoming and the service is quick! ⏲️ They have plenty of indoor and outdoor seating! 🪑 I wish I came here earlier!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini restoran Malaysia yang luar biasa! 🇲🇾 Kopitiam menawarkan hidangan autentik 🍽️ untuk Malaysia! Pasti coba Kaya Butter Toast (yang lezat 🤤) dan Kuih Talam (Kue Pan Krim Hijau 🟢 Pandan dan Kelapa 🥥 🍰 yang kurang saya suka, tapi senang saya mencobanya)! Staf 👨‍🍳 ramah dan menyambut, dan pelayanannya cepat! ⏲️ Mereka punya banyak tempat duduk di dalam dan luar ruangan! 🪑 Andai saja saya datang ke sini lebih awal!

reviews.author: Ken Chester Jr
reviews.text: Unique Malaysian meals and snacks!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan camilan khas Malaysia yang unik!

reviews.author: Mahika Ala
reviews.text:
Really really loved coming here! Food was absolutely amazing! The vegan criss cross shrooms were such a unique and fulfilling flavor. Would 100% order again! We also got the classic set. The main dish was a little too fishy, but the kaya toast was decent and worth trying. The drinks come in a very cute pouch & they aren’t too sweet so they pair well with the food.

We got our food 5 minutes after ordering, and the service was very fast and nice. It’s a street food vibe & and the pricing is reasonable.

Would really recommend the criss cross shrooms, and will definitely be visiting again!
reviews.textTranslated:
Sangat suka sekali datang ke sini! Makanannya benar-benar luar biasa! Jamur vegan criss cross memiliki rasa yang unik dan memuaskan. Pasti akan memesan lagi! Kami juga memesan set klasik. Hidangan utamanya agak terlalu amis, tetapi roti kaya-nya lumayan dan layak dicoba. Minumannya disajikan dalam kantong yang sangat lucu & tidak terlalu manis sehingga cocok dipadukan dengan makanan.

Makanan kami datang 5 menit setelah memesan, dan pelayanannya sangat cepat dan ramah. Suasananya seperti makanan jalanan & harganya wajar.

Sangat merekomendasikan jamur criss cross, dan pasti akan berkunjung lagi!

reviews.author: Tahir Karmali
reviews.text: The food was okay... Their chicken rice didn't come with the usual side soup. But their sauces were great. Service was unbearable and high key rude.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lumayan... Nasi ayam mereka tidak disajikan dengan sup seperti biasanya. Tapi sausnya enak. Pelayanannya sangat tidak menyenangkan dan sangat kasar.

reviews.author: Cheng Xu
reviews.text: This place totally lives up to its Instagram hype, everything on the menu was SO GOOD (bringing the best of Malay and SEA food to NYC!), the staff was super friendly and the decor and ambience were so cute. Loved coming here for a late lunch/early dinner on a weekday when it wasn't super busy to catch up with friends. Don't miss out - highly recommend!!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar sesuai dengan hype Instagram-nya, semua menunya SANGAT ENAK (membawa hidangan Melayu dan laut terbaik ke NYC!), stafnya sangat ramah, dan dekorasi serta suasananya sangat manis. Senang sekali datang ke sini untuk makan siang/makan malam lebih awal di hari kerja ketika tidak terlalu ramai untuk bertemu teman-teman. Jangan sampai terlewat - sangat direkomendasikan!!

reviews.author: Janhavi Kadam
reviews.text:
As a Singaporean desperately craving food from back home, I was very excited to try Kopitiam. However, I left a bit disappointed. I tried the Nasi Lemak, Kopi, Kueh Lapis, Kaya Toast and Chicken rice.

Let me start by saying that the Kopi and Kueh Lapis were really good and very authentic! My belly was happy.

Buuuut, I had mixed feelings about the other dishes. The sambal in the nasi lemak was pretty good, but the rice was missing some flavor and my egg was a bit grey/overcooked. Would've appreciated a chickens wing to go with it as well. Felt a bit incomplete.

The Kaya in the kaya toast was very good, but I felt like the dish was missing some butter.

Finally , my biggest let down was the chicken rice. The chicken pieces were too big, the rice barely had any flavor, and the lack of dark soy sauce made me sad. It was strictly OK.

Service was really good though, and the person who took my order was very helpful and went out of the way in helping me find a place for me to sit. Thank you!
reviews.textTranslated:
Sebagai orang Singapura yang sangat merindukan makanan dari kampung halaman, saya sangat bersemangat untuk mencoba Kopitiam. Namun, saya agak kecewa setelah pulang. Saya mencoba Nasi Lemak, Kopi, Kue Lapis, Roti Panggang Kaya, dan Nasi Ayam.

Pertama-tama, Kopi dan Kue Lapis-nya benar-benar enak dan sangat autentik! Perut saya terasa senang.

Tapi, saya punya perasaan campur aduk tentang hidangan lainnya. Sambal di nasi lemaknya cukup enak, tetapi nasinya agak kurang rasa dan telur saya agak abu-abu/terlalu matang. Akan lebih baik jika diberi sayap ayam juga. Rasanya agak kurang lengkap.

Kaya di roti panggang kayanya sangat enak, tetapi saya merasa hidangannya kurang mentega.

Terakhir, kekecewaan terbesar saya adalah nasi ayamnya. Potongan ayamnya terlalu besar, nasinya hampir tidak berasa, dan kurangnya kecap asin membuat saya sedih. Semuanya lumayan.

Pelayanannya sangat baik, dan orang yang menerima pesanan saya sangat membantu dan membantu saya mencari tempat duduk. Terima kasih!

reviews.author: James Kachan
reviews.text: Excellent, lovely people, fantastic food. Highly recommended, casual spot.
reviews.textTranslated: Luar biasa, orang-orangnya ramah, makanannya fantastis. Sangat direkomendasikan, tempatnya santai.

reviews.author: Jen Y
reviews.text: a bit hard to get to but very decent food (serving size is on the smaller side). love the variety of non-alcoholic drink options. Had the tok tok mee most recently and it was very tasty. there is a $10 min credit card purchase though
reviews.textTranslated: Agak sulit dijangkau, tapi makanannya sangat enak (porsi sajinya agak kecil). Saya suka beragam pilihan minuman non-alkoholnya. Baru-baru ini saya memesan tok tok mee dan rasanya sangat enak. Namun, ada minimal pembelian kartu kredit sebesar $10.

reviews.author: Xinyue Fu
reviews.text: Traditional Asian food and good 斑斓。restricted portion with decent price.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Asia tradisional dan 斑斓 yang enak. Porsi terbatas dengan harga yang wajar.

reviews.author: Maria
reviews.text: All food so delicious
reviews.textTranslated: Semua makanannya sangat lezat.

reviews.author: Amanda
reviews.text: This is a little Malaysian gem not to be missed if you like Southeast Asian cuisine.  For casual indoor/outdoor dining, order the dishes and they’ll bring them to your table. I had the Chilled Spicy Sesame Noodle (perfect for the heatwave) and Lobak, both dishes were spot on.  Staff should wipe the tables after guests carry their dirty dishes to the bin. Other than that I was happy with my experience.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah permata kecil Malaysia yang tidak boleh dilewatkan jika Anda menyukai masakan Asia Tenggara. Untuk bersantap santai di dalam/luar ruangan, pesan hidangan dan mereka akan mengantarkannya ke meja Anda. Saya memesan Mi Wijen Pedas Dingin (sangat cocok untuk cuaca panas) dan Lobak, kedua hidangan tersebut sangat lezat. Staf seharusnya membersihkan meja setelah tamu membawa piring kotor mereka ke tempat sampah. Selain itu, saya senang dengan pengalaman saya.

reviews.author: John Rambo
reviews.text:
Pretty legit Malaysian food outside of Malaysia.

Nasi Lemak and the Hainanese chicken rice were the highlights of the menu. However, the experience didn’t start off great as their card machine wasn’t working, and they could only accept cash or Venmo (US only). They weren’t able to advise us where the nearest cash machine was and we were about to walk out, when fortunately a kind customer behind us who overheard our dilemma offered to pay for us if we could PayPal them the money owed - which we did. So make sure you bring some cash with you in case their card machine is down, you wouldn’t want to miss out on their food!
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanan Malaysia yang cukup otentik di luar Malaysia.

Nasi Lemak dan nasi ayam Hainan adalah menu andalannya. Namun, pengalaman awalnya tidak berjalan mulus karena mesin kartu mereka tidak berfungsi, dan mereka hanya menerima uang tunai atau Venmo (khusus AS). Mereka tidak dapat memberi tahu kami di mana ATM terdekat berada dan kami hampir saja pergi, ketika untungnya seorang pelanggan baik hati di belakang kami yang mendengar kesulitan kami menawarkan untuk membayar jika kami dapat mengirimkan uang yang terutang melalui PayPal - yang kami lakukan. Jadi pastikan Anda membawa uang tunai jika mesin kartu mereka rusak, Anda pasti tidak ingin melewatkan makanan mereka!

reviews.author: Laura Bordonaro
reviews.text: Please never close. The only place I can get authentic CKT <3
reviews.textTranslated: Tolong jangan pernah tutup. Satu-satunya tempat saya bisa mendapatkan CKT asli <3

reviews.author: Thin Thazin
reviews.text: I went there cuz it’s one of the recommendation on IG. Their food doesn’t live up the hype. The food is pricey for its portion. We ordered Pan Mee with soup, Char Kway Teow, Kaya Toast and Kopi Tarik. Pan Mee is so bland. The flavor in Char Kway Teow is not even (Some part is salty and sone part has no salt at all.) Kaya Toast  is not bad. Kopi Tarik is average. And they have so many flies. We are not going back for sure.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi ke sana karena itu salah satu rekomendasi di Instagram. Makanan mereka tidak sesuai dengan ekspektasi. Harganya mahal untuk porsinya. Kami memesan Pan Mee dengan kuah, Char Kway Teow, Kaya Toast, dan Kopi Tarik. Pan Mee-nya hambar. Rasa Char Kway Teow-nya tidak merata (ada bagian yang asin dan ada bagian yang tidak asin sama sekali). Kaya Toast-nya tidak buruk. Kopi Tariknya biasa saja. Dan ada banyak sekali lalat di sana. Kami pasti tidak akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Jen Yip
reviews.text: The food here is delicious. I am a huge hainan chicken fan and I like their version here. The rice balls are huge, more than I can usually eat, and I love the sauces they service with the chicken. The chicken is tender and delicious. I've tried other items here too including the curry puffs, and one of the soups, all are delicious. Would be 5 stars for me except that I always find it a little stressful to find a table here because it's usually pretty crowded (a good sign of course!). The staff are all very gracious and try to help with people management as best they can - the food comes out relatively quickly so you don't have to wait long once seated.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan di sini enak sekali. Saya penggemar berat ayam Hainan dan saya suka versi mereka di sini. Bola-bola nasinya besar, lebih banyak dari yang biasanya bisa saya makan, dan saya suka saus yang mereka sajikan dengan ayamnya. Ayamnya empuk dan lezat. Saya juga sudah mencoba menu lain di sini termasuk kue kari dan salah satu supnya, semuanya enak. Akan saya beri 5 bintang jika saja saya tidak selalu merasa sedikit stres mencari meja di sini karena biasanya cukup ramai (tentu saja itu pertanda baik!). Semua staf sangat ramah dan berusaha membantu mengatur pengunjung sebaik mungkin - makanan disajikan relatif cepat sehingga Anda tidak perlu menunggu lama setelah duduk.

reviews.author: P Lee
reviews.text:
Atmosphere: you walk in, order and get a number and they deliver food to your table (think Nando's) and then you bus your own table. It's fine for what it is.

Service: they take your order and wipe the tables down. Cashier was super nice and patient while I decided what to order. 3 stars is not a knock on their service but that this place is more self service.

Food: 10 stars if I could! Everything was SO GOOD. They know what they're doing back there in the kitchen. Belachan Wings were sticky, tasty and not like anything we've had before and i would definitely come back for these. Char kway teow had that nice char that is essential to this dish and good amount of meat and seafood - delicious. Tok Tok Mee was something I'd never had before and the mix of textures and flavors was again delicious. Sambal sautéed water spinach was a bit too spicy for the hubby but I loved it - a bit pricy for what you get and definitely the weakest dish of everything we ordered. Kopitiam Sunrise was the perfect refreshing drink against all the savory food.

I would definitely recommend this place and will be coming back for sure!
reviews.textTranslated:
Suasana: Anda masuk, memesan, dan mendapatkan nomor, lalu mereka mengantarkan makanan ke meja Anda (bayangkan Nando's) lalu Anda membersihkan meja Anda sendiri. Lumayanlah untuk apa adanya.

Pelayanan: Mereka menerima pesanan Anda dan membersihkan meja. Kasirnya sangat baik dan sabar saat saya memutuskan apa yang akan dipesan. 3 bintang bukan berarti layanan mereka buruk, tetapi tempat ini lebih merupakan layanan mandiri.

Makanan: 10 bintang kalau bisa! Semuanya SANGAT ENAK. Mereka tahu apa yang mereka lakukan di dapur. Sayap Belachan lengket, lezat, dan tidak seperti yang pernah kami coba sebelumnya, dan saya pasti akan kembali untuk ini. Char kway teow memiliki arang yang enak yang penting untuk hidangan ini, dan jumlah daging serta hidangan lautnya yang banyak - lezat. Tok Tok Mee adalah sesuatu yang belum pernah saya coba sebelumnya dan perpaduan tekstur dan rasanya kembali lezat. Sambal tumis kangkung agak terlalu pedas untuk suami saya, tetapi saya menyukainya - agak mahal untuk apa yang Anda dapatkan dan jelas merupakan hidangan terlemah dari semua yang kami pesan. Kopitiam Sunrise adalah minuman menyegarkan yang sempurna untuk menemani semua hidangan gurih.

Saya sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini dan pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Anond Kulthanmanusorn
reviews.text: อาหารมาเลเซีย ตอนแรกอ่านชื่อร้านนึกว่าอาหารจีน รสชาติใช้ได้ ราคาไม่แรงเท่าไร
reviews.textTranslated: Masakan Malaysia. Awalnya, ketika membaca nama restorannya, saya pikir itu masakan Cina. Rasanya enak, tapi harganya tidak terlalu mahal.

reviews.author: Jessica R
reviews.text: Had the chicken rice. The flavors were delicious but unfortunately my chicken was a little cold. Also it came on two small plates versus one big plate so it was hard to dig in comfortably. Some rice spilled off the small plate. But would definitely go back again
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan nasi ayam. Rasanya enak sekali, tapi sayangnya ayamnya agak dingin. Selain itu, disajikan di dua piring kecil, bukan satu piring besar, jadi agak sulit untuk menyantapnya dengan nyaman. Beberapa nasi tumpah dari piring kecil. Tapi saya pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: yiet Lai
reviews.text: I order  Neyah Kuih but was disappointed the kuih is tasteless and te side palm sugar was watery.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan Neyah Kuih tetapi kecewa karena kuenya hambar dan gula arennya encer.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi yiet,

Thanks so much for visiting us, and we apologize that you didn't have a great time! The Neyah Kuih should only taste like pandan as it's the star ingredient and perhaps the palm sugar was accidentally not shaken thoroughly, hence the watery texture. Regardless, we'll be sure to work harder on our dishes so that this doesn't happen again :)! We hope you give us another try!

Have a great weekend 😁👍!

reviews.author: frengen A
reviews.text: The Beef RenDANG! so good and generous with the meat. You also have to get the Kaya Butter Toast or else you missed out.
reviews.textTranslated: Rendang daging sapinya enak banget dan dagingnya banyak sekali. Kamu juga harus pesan roti panggang mentega kaya, kalau tidak, kamu akan menyesal.

reviews.author: Lynne Lee
reviews.text:
Really wanted to love it :( the char kway teow was incredibly overpriced, especially for its small size and the fact that it took 25 mins. The taste of it was mediocre. The Kaya toast was the best thing there. Oh but the egg dip for the Kaya toast was an extra $4. The beef randang was dry and tough. The Hainanese chicken lacked flavor (and was 60% bone), as did the rice it came with. The Pan Mee depended on the anchovies for flavoring, and was otherwise bland. Also this place had no chili oil? I spent months in SE Asia so I came in looking for those flavors, ready to pay premium for authenticity, and this place didn’t deliver despite the prices.

Nice people, though, and the Milo drink was good!
reviews.textTranslated:
Benar-benar ingin menyukainya :( char kway teow-nya sangat mahal, terutama untuk ukurannya yang kecil dan fakta bahwa dimasak selama 25 menit. Rasanya biasa saja. Roti panggang Kaya adalah yang terbaik di sana. Oh, tapi saus telur untuk roti panggang Kaya harganya $4 lebih mahal. Daging sapi randangnya kering dan alot. Ayam Hainannya kurang berasa (dan 60% bertulang), begitu pula nasi yang disajikan. Pan Mee-nya mengandalkan ikan teri untuk penyedap rasa, dan rasanya hambar. Lagipula, tempat ini tidak menyediakan minyak cabai? Saya menghabiskan waktu berbulan-bulan di Asia Tenggara, jadi saya datang untuk mencari rasa-rasa itu, siap membayar mahal untuk keasliannya, dan tempat ini tidak mengantar meskipun harganya mahal.

Orang-orangnya baik, dan minuman Milo-nya enak!

reviews.author: Wei Lu
reviews.text: Dirty, crowded, no AC, very fragile chairs and patched with tape, boxes of supplies on the floor area. Rice was still a little hard. Beef rangdang a bit hard.
reviews.textTranslated: Kotor, penuh sesak, tidak ada AC, kursi sangat rapuh dan ditambal dengan selotip, kotak-kotak persediaan berserakan di lantai. Nasi masih agak keras. Daging sapi rangdang juga agak keras.

reviews.author: Eric Kobuchi
reviews.text:
When you come to Kopitiam, be adventurous and try something new, even though it’s not difficult with so many hard-to-find menu items.

It’s a small place with only about 25 seats and can fill up quickly.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saat berkunjung ke Kopitiam, beranilah mencoba hal baru, meskipun tidak sulit karena banyak menu yang sulit ditemukan.

Tempatnya kecil, hanya sekitar 25 kursi, dan bisa cepat penuh.

reviews.author: Sarah Hui
reviews.text: I’ve been hearing so much about this spot, so I needed to check it out. They don’t take reservations so get here early to grab a spot. The inside of the restaurant is busy and functional, it’s meant for you to dine in quickly and get out. Try many menu options, but not really stood out.
